papers.title: Complex Equation Learner: Rational Symbolic Regression with Gradient Descent in Complex Domain
papers.summary: Symbolic regression aims to discover interpretable equations from data, yet modern gradient-based methods fail for operators that introduce singularities or domain constraints, including division, logarithms, and square roots. As a result, Equation Learner-type models typically avoid these operators or impose restrictions, e.g. constraining denominators to prevent poles, which narrows the hypothesis class. We propose a complex weight extension of the Equation Learner that mitigates real-valued optimization pathologies by allowing optimization trajectories to bypass real-axis degeneracies. The proposed approach converges stably even when the target expression has real-domain poles, and it enables unconstrained use of operations such as logarithm and square root. We Validate the method on symbolic regression benchmarks and show it can recover singular behavior from experimental frequency response data.

ai.tldr: 提出一种复数域扩展的方程学习器，通过复数权重优化绕过实轴奇点，实现含除法、对数、平方根等算子的符号回归。
ai.motivation: 现有梯度符号回归方法因实域奇点（如极点）无法稳定处理除法、对数等算子，限制了可发现方程的类型。
ai.method: 将方程学习器的权重扩展至复数域，使优化轨迹绕过实轴退化区域，从而无约束使用含奇点算子。
ai.result: 在符号回归基准上稳定收敛，并能从实验频响数据中恢复奇异行为。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户发现包含除法、对数等复杂算子的可解释方程，尤其适用于具有极点或分支点的物理系统建模。

idea_spark.idea: 将复数权重思想与自动微分结合，设计能自动规避实域奇点的通用符号回归框架。
idea_spark.risk: 复数域优化可能引入额外计算开销和收敛到非物理解的风险，需验证解的物理合理性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受复分析中解析延拓概念的启发，将优化路径从实轴延拓到复平面以绕过奇点。

en.tldr: Proposes a complex-weight extension of the Equation Learner that mitigates real-valued optimization pathologies by allowing trajectories to bypass real-axis singularities, enabling unconstrained use of division, logarithm, and square root in symbolic regression.
en.motivation: Existing gradient-based symbolic regression methods fail for operators introducing singularities or domain constraints (e.g., division, logarithms, square roots), limiting the hypothesis class.
en.method: Extends Equation Learner weights to the complex domain, allowing optimization trajectories to circumvent real-axis degeneracies and enabling unconstrained use of singular operators.
en.result: Converges stably on symbolic regression benchmarks and recovers singular behavior from experimental frequency response data.
en.help_to_user: Helps users discover interpretable equations involving complex operators like division and logarithms, particularly useful for modeling physical systems with poles or branch points.

idea_spark.idea: Combine complex weights with automatic differentiation to design a general symbolic regression framework that automatically avoids real-domain singularities.
idea_spark.risk: Complex-domain optimization may introduce extra computational cost and risk of converging to non-physical solutions; physical plausibility must be verified.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the concept of analytic continuation in complex analysis, extending optimization paths from the real axis to the complex plane to bypass singularities.

papers.title: Meta-Inverse Physics-Informed Neural Networks for High-Dimensional Ordinary Differential Equations
papers.summary: Solving inverse problems in dynamical systems governed by high-dimensional coupled ordinary differential equations (ODEs) is a ubiquitous challenge in scientific machine learning. In many real-world applications, researchers seek to uncover unknown parameters or model unknown dynamics even as the underlying physics is only partially characterized, and observations are sparse and limited to specific measurable channels. While physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) are ideal for inverse inference under partial observability, existing PINNs typically rely on task-specific joint optimization, which suffers from optimization difficulties and poor generalization. In this paper, we propose a meta-inverse physics-informed neural network (MI-PINN) that reformulates inverse modeling as a two-stage meta-learning problem. MI-PINN first learns a physics-aware representation across multiple tasks, and then performs inverse modeling by optimizing task-specific unknowns while keeping the learned representation fixed. This two-stage formulation significantly reduces the parameter search dimension, thereby improving sample efficiency and enabling accurate inference. To handle multi-scale dynamics common in these high-dimensional ODE systems, we further introduce an adaptive clustering-based multi-branch learning scheme. We demonstrate the effectiveness of MI-PINN on whole-body physiologically based pharmacokinetic (PBPK) models with up to 33 coupled ODEs, using paracetamol and theophylline under intravenous and oral dosing scenarios. Experimental results show that MI-PINN enables accurate recovery of masked kinetic parameters and reconstruction of missing mechanistic terms despite limited clinical observations.

ai.tldr: 提出元逆物理信息神经网络（MI-PINN），通过两阶段元学习解决高维常微分方程系统的逆问题，在生理药代动力学模型中实现参数恢复和缺失项重建。
ai.motivation: 现有PINN在部分可观测的高维ODE逆问题中面临优化困难和泛化性差的问题。
ai.method: 将逆建模转化为两阶段元学习：先跨任务学习物理感知表示，再固定表示优化任务特定未知量；引入自适应聚类多分支学习处理多尺度动力学。
ai.result: 在多达33个耦合ODE的PBPK模型上，MI-PINN能准确恢复隐藏动力学参数并重建缺失机制项。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户高效解决高维ODE系统的逆问题，尤其适用于观测稀疏、物理部分已知的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将自适应聚类多分支学习与元学习结合，可能适用于多尺度物理系统的正向模拟。
idea_spark.risk: 元学习阶段需要足够多的任务多样性，否则表示可能过拟合；聚类分支可能引入额外超参数。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受元学习在少样本学习中的成功启发，将其用于科学计算中的逆问题，减少对大量标注数据的依赖。

idea_spark.idea: 将自适应聚类多分支学习与元学习结合，可能适用于多尺度物理系统的正向模拟。
idea_spark.risk: 元学习阶段需要足够多的任务多样性，否则表示可能过拟合；聚类分支可能引入额外超参数。

en.tldr: Proposes Meta-Inverse Physics-Informed Neural Networks (MI-PINN) that reformulates inverse modeling as a two-stage meta-learning problem, achieving accurate parameter recovery and missing term reconstruction in high-dimensional ODE systems such as PBPK models.
en.motivation: Existing PINNs suffer from optimization difficulties and poor generalization in inverse problems with high-dimensional ODEs under partial observability.
en.method: Two-stage meta-learning: first learn a physics-aware representation across tasks, then optimize task-specific unknowns with fixed representation; adaptive clustering-based multi-branch learning handles multi-scale dynamics.
en.result: On PBPK models with up to 33 coupled ODEs, MI-PINN accurately recovers masked kinetic parameters and reconstructs missing mechanistic terms from limited clinical observations.
en.help_to_user: Helps users efficiently solve inverse problems in high-dimensional ODE systems, especially when observations are sparse and physics is partially known.

idea_spark.idea: Combining adaptive clustering multi-branch learning with meta-learning may benefit forward simulation of multi-scale physical systems.
idea_spark.risk: Meta-learning requires sufficient task diversity to avoid representation overfitting; clustering branches may introduce extra hyperparameters.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the success of meta-learning in few-shot learning, applied to scientific computing inverse problems to reduce reliance on large labeled datasets.

papers.title: Calibration of the underlying surface parameters for urban flood using latent variables and adjoint equation
papers.summary: Calibrating the urban underlying surface parameters is crucial for urban flood simulation. We formulate the parameter calibration problem into an optimization problem within the Bayesian framework using the maximum likelihood principle. We adopt the urban flood dynamical system model as the surrogate model and innovatively introduce latent variables inspired by machine learning to represent more uncertainties, which can also be compatible with common physical parameter calibration. For more efficient optimization, we construct the adjoint equation of the surrogate model to obtain gradient information and propose the parameter sharing technique and the localization technique to reduce the computation complexity of the adjoint equation. A simple case verifies the proposed method can converge quickly and is insensitive to the observation time interval. In the case derived from Test 8A, we calibrate Manning's coefficient of urban roads, with a maximum relative error of 13.88% and a minimum of 1.16%.

ai.tldr: 提出一种结合潜变量和伴随方程的城市下垫面参数校准方法，在贝叶斯框架下将校准问题转化为优化问题，通过伴随方程获取梯度信息，并采用参数共享和局部化技术降低计算复杂度。
ai.motivation: 城市下垫面参数校准对洪水模拟至关重要，现有方法难以高效处理参数不确定性。
ai.method: 将参数校准构建为贝叶斯最大似然优化问题，引入潜变量表征更多不确定性，利用伴随方程计算梯度，结合参数共享和局部化技术加速求解。
ai.result: 简单案例验证方法快速收敛且对观测时间间隔不敏感；在Test 8A案例中校准曼宁系数，最大相对误差13.88%，最小1.16%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、鲁棒的城市洪水模型参数校准方案，可推广至其他物理参数校准任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将机器学习中的潜变量思想融入物理模型校准，同时利用伴随方程实现高效梯度优化。
idea_spark.risk: 潜变量的引入可能增加模型复杂度，需谨慎设计以避免过拟合或物理不一致。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合数据驱动和物理驱动方法，为复杂系统参数校准提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes a method for calibrating urban underlying surface parameters using latent variables and adjoint equation within a Bayesian framework, achieving efficient gradient-based optimization with parameter sharing and localization techniques.
en.motivation: Calibrating underlying surface parameters is critical for urban flood simulation, but existing methods struggle with efficiency and uncertainty handling.
en.method: Formulates calibration as a Bayesian maximum likelihood optimization, introduces latent variables to represent uncertainties, constructs adjoint equation for gradient computation, and employs parameter sharing and localization to reduce complexity.
en.result: Simple case shows fast convergence and insensitivity to observation interval; in Test 8A, Manning's coefficient is calibrated with max relative error 13.88% and min 1.16%.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and robust parameter calibration approach for urban flood models, applicable to other physical parameter estimation tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Integrate machine learning-inspired latent variables into physical model calibration while leveraging adjoint equation for efficient gradient optimization.
idea_spark.risk: Introducing latent variables may increase model complexity; careful design is needed to avoid overfitting or physical inconsistency.
idea_spark.inspiration: Blending data-driven and physics-driven methods offers new insights for calibrating complex system parameters.

papers.title: ISAAC: Auditing Causal Reasoning in Deep Models for Drug-Target Interaction
papers.summary: Deep learning models for drug--target interaction (DTI) prediction often achieve strong benchmark performance without necessarily relying on mechanistically meaningful molecular features, a limitation that standard accuracy-based evaluation cannot detect. We introduce ISAAC (Intervention-based Structural Auditing Approach for Causal Reasoning), a post-hoc framework that evaluates prior-relative structural sensitivity by probing frozen models through matched mechanistic and spurious input-level interventions, independently of predictive accuracy. Applied to three sequence-based DTI architectures on the Davis benchmark, ISAAC reveals approximately 25\% relative differences in reasoning scores across models with comparable AUROC (within around 3\%), stable across training and intervention seeds and two distinct perturbation operators. These discrepancies, undetectable under conventional accuracy metrics, motivate the use of post-hoc structural auditing as a complement to standard performance evaluation in scientific machine learning for molecular modeling.

ai.tldr: 提出ISAAC框架，通过干预测试评估深度模型在药物-靶点相互作用预测中的因果推理能力，发现AUROC相近的模型在推理分数上存在约25%的相对差异。
ai.motivation: 标准准确率指标无法检测模型是否依赖有意义的分子特征进行预测，需要一种独立于预测性能的结构性审计方法。
ai.method: ISAAC通过匹配的机制性和虚假输入级干预，探测冻结模型对先验相关结构的敏感性，计算推理分数。
ai.result: 在Davis基准上对三个序列型DTI模型应用ISAAC，发现AUROC差异仅约3%时，推理分数相对差异约25%，且对训练和干预种子稳定。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员识别模型是否真正学习到因果相关的分子特征，而非依赖虚假关联。

idea_spark.idea: 结合领域知识设计更精细的干预集，或扩展到图神经网络等非序列架构。
idea_spark.risk: 干预设计可能依赖先验知识，若先验不准确会导致审计偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将因果审计作为标准评估流程的补充，推动科学机器学习中更可靠的模型选择。

idea_spark.risk: 干预设计可能依赖先验知识，若先验不准确会导致审计偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将因果审计作为标准评估流程的补充，推动科学机器学习中更可靠的模型选择。

en.tldr: ISAAC audits causal reasoning in deep DTI models via matched mechanistic and spurious interventions, revealing ~25% reasoning score differences among models with similar AUROC.
en.motivation: Standard accuracy metrics cannot detect whether models rely on mechanistically meaningful features; a post-hoc structural auditing method is needed.
en.method: ISAAC probes frozen models through matched mechanistic and spurious input-level interventions to compute prior-relative structural sensitivity scores.
en.result: On the Davis benchmark, three sequence-based DTI models show ~25% relative reasoning score differences despite AUROC within ~3%, stable across seeds and perturbation operators.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers identify whether models learn causally relevant molecular features rather than spurious correlations.

idea_spark.idea: Design more fine-grained intervention sets using domain knowledge, or extend to non-sequence architectures like graph neural networks.
idea_spark.risk: Intervention design relies on prior knowledge; inaccurate priors may bias the audit.
idea_spark.inspiration: Adopt causal auditing as a complement to standard evaluation for more reliable model selection in scientific machine learning.

papers.title: Donor-Aware scRNA-seq Benchmarks for IBD Classification
papers.summary: Donor-level disease classification from single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) requires strict donor-aware cross-validation: naive pipelines that split cells randomly conflate training and test donors, inflating reported performance through pseudoreplication. We present a donor-aware benchmark evaluating three feature representations across two independent IBD cohorts: centered log-ratio (CLR) transformed cell-type composition, GatedStructuralCFN dependency embeddings, and scVI variational autoencoder latent embeddings. The cohorts are the SCP259 ulcerative colitis atlas (UC vs. Healthy, n=30 donors, 51 cell types) and the Kong 2023 Crohn's disease atlas (CD vs. Healthy, n=71 donors, 55-68 cell types across three intestinal regions).   Compartment-stratified CLR composition achieves AUROC 0.956 +/- 0.061 on SCP259; GatedStructuralCFN on the same features achieves 0.978 +/- 0.050. In the Kong cohort, CFN achieves its best performance in the colon region (0.960 +/- 0.055 after feature filtering), exceeding linear CLR (0.900 +/- 0.100), while terminal ileum classification is dominated by linear models (CatBoost CLR 0.967 +/- 0.075 vs. CFN 0.811 +/- 0.164). Cross-dataset transfer (CD->UC, four shared cell types) achieves AUC 0.833 with XGBoost CLR; the reverse direction performs at chance. CFN edge stability analysis shows that compartment-wise composition eliminates spurious unit-sum-induced instability present in global composition (Jaccard 0.026 vs. top-20 recurrence 1.0). CFN shows a consistent numerical advantage over linear models in the colon region of CD (AUROC 0.960 vs. 0.900), though no inter-method comparison reached statistical significance at n<=34 donors per region. Compartment-aware feature construction is critical for both classification performance and structural interpretability. Code: https://github.com/Jonathan-321/sfn-scrna-study

ai.tldr: 提出供体感知的交叉验证基准，评估三种特征表示在IBD单细胞RNA-seq分类中的表现，发现区室感知特征构建对性能和可解释性至关重要。
ai.motivation: 现有单细胞RNA-seq疾病分类管道常忽略供体间独立性，导致性能虚高。需要严格供体感知的基准来公平评估不同特征表示。
ai.method: 采用供体感知交叉验证，比较CLR细胞类型组成、GatedStructuralCFN依赖嵌入和scVI变分自编码器嵌入，在两个独立IBD队列（UC和CD）上测试。
ai.result: 区室分层CLR组成在UC队列AUROC达0.956，CFN达0.978；CD结肠区域CFN优于线性模型（0.960 vs 0.900），但统计不显著；跨数据集迁移仅部分有效。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解单细胞RNA-seq分类中供体感知验证的重要性，并指导选择特征表示和区室感知策略。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将区室感知特征与图神经网络结合，以捕捉细胞类型间的空间或功能依赖关系。
idea_spark.risk: 跨数据集迁移性能有限，可能因批次效应或细胞类型差异导致泛化困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受CFN边缘稳定性分析启发，可设计更鲁棒的依赖结构学习算法，减少单位总和假象干扰。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受CFN边缘稳定性分析启发，可设计更鲁棒的依赖结构学习算法，减少单位总和假象干扰。

en.tldr: Proposes a donor-aware cross-validation benchmark evaluating three feature representations for IBD classification from scRNA-seq, showing compartment-aware feature construction is critical for performance and interpretability.
en.motivation: Existing scRNA-seq disease classification pipelines often ignore donor independence, inflating performance. A rigorous donor-aware benchmark is needed to fairly evaluate different feature representations.
en.method: Uses donor-aware cross-validation to compare CLR cell-type composition, GatedStructuralCFN dependency embeddings, and scVI variational autoencoder embeddings on two independent IBD cohorts (UC and CD).
en.result: Compartment-stratified CLR composition achieves AUROC 0.956 on UC cohort, CFN 0.978; CFN outperforms linear models in CD colon region (0.960 vs 0.900) but not statistically significant; cross-dataset transfer is partially effective.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the importance of donor-aware validation in scRNA-seq classification and guides selection of feature representations and compartment-aware strategies.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining compartment-aware features with graph neural networks to capture spatial or functional dependencies among cell types.
idea_spark.risk: Limited cross-dataset transfer performance may arise from batch effects or cell-type differences, hindering generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by CFN edge stability analysis, design more robust dependency structure learning algorithms to mitigate unit-sum artifacts.

papers.title: Analytic Bridge Diffusions for Controlled Path Generation
papers.summary: Most modern bridge-diffusion methods achieve finite-time transport by specifying an interpolation, Schrödinger-bridge, or stochastic-control objective and then learning the associated score or drift field with a neural network. In contrast, we identify a restricted but sufficiently broad and analytically solvable class in which the score, intermediate marginals, and protocol gradients are available in closed form without inner stochastic simulation loops and without neural networks in the optimization loop. We recast the classical linear--quadratic--Gaussian (LQG) stochastic-control structure as a transport problem of the Path Integral Diffusion (PID) type. In classical LQG control, linear dynamics, Gaussian noise, and quadratic costs lead to Riccati equations and closed-form optimal feedback. In LQ-GM-PID, we retain the linear--quadratic stochastic-control backbone, but replace terminal state regulation by a prescribed terminal probability density and allow both the initial and terminal laws to be Gaussian Mixtures (GM).   Moreover, LQ-GM-PID turns bridge diffusion from a tool for terminal target matching alone into a tool for path shaping. We demonstrate this on a 2D corridor task, a 2D multi-entrance transport task, and a high-dimensional scaling study with $d=32$ and $M=16$ Gaussian-mixture terminal modes, all with sub-50\,ms analytic precompute on a laptop. We position LQ-GM-PID as an analytically solvable reference model for the state-of-the-art neural bridge-diffusion and generative-transport methods: a controlled setting in which neural approximations, score estimates, path-shaping objectives, and protocol-learning procedures can be tested against exact quantities.

papers.title: Graph Neural Networks in the Wilson Loop Representation of Abelian Lattice Gauge Theories
papers.summary: Local gauge structures play a central role in a wide range of condensed matter systems and synthetic quantum platforms, where they emerge as effective descriptions of strongly correlated phases and engineered dynamics. We introduce a gauge-invariant graph neural network (GNN) architecture for Abelian lattice gauge models, in which symmetry is enforced explicitly through local gauge-invariant inputs, such as Wilson loops, and preserved throughout message passing, eliminating redundant gauge degrees of freedom while retaining expressive power. We benchmark the approach on both $\mathbb{Z}_2$ and $\mathrm{U}(1)$ lattice gauge models, achieving accurate predictions of global observables and spatially resolved quantities despite the nonlocal correlations induced by gauge-matter coupling. We further demonstrate that the learned model serves as an efficient surrogate for semiclassical dynamics in $\mathrm{U}(1)$ quantum link models, enabling stable and scalable time evolution without repeated fermionic diagonalization, while faithfully reproducing both local dynamics and statistical correlations. These results establish gauge-invariant message passing as a compact and physically grounded framework for learning and simulating Abelian lattice gauge systems.

ai.tldr: 提出一种规范不变的图神经网络架构，以Wilson环为输入，用于阿贝尔格点规范模型的学习与模拟。
ai.motivation: 格点规范理论在凝聚态物理和量子模拟中至关重要，但传统方法受冗余规范自由度和非局域关联的困扰。
ai.method: 设计规范不变的图神经网络，输入为局域规范不变量（Wilson环），消息传递过程保持规范对称性。
ai.result: 在Z2和U(1)模型上准确预测全局和空间分辨可观测量，并作为U(1)量子链接模型半经典动力学的高效代理。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种物理约束的深度学习框架，用于高效模拟格点规范系统，避免重复费米子对角化。

idea_spark.idea: 将规范不变GNN与强化学习结合，自动搜索最优规范场构型。
idea_spark.risk: 对强耦合或拓扑相变区域的泛化能力可能受限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受格点规范理论中Wilson圈作为基本规范不变量启发，设计物理嵌入的神经网络。

en.tldr: A gauge-invariant graph neural network architecture using Wilson loops as inputs is introduced for learning and simulating Abelian lattice gauge theories.
en.motivation: Lattice gauge theories are central to condensed matter and quantum simulation, but conventional methods suffer from redundant gauge degrees of freedom and nonlocal correlations.
en.method: A gauge-invariant GNN is designed with local gauge-invariant inputs (Wilson loops) and message passing that preserves gauge symmetry.
en.result: Accurate predictions of global and spatially resolved observables on Z2 and U(1) models, and serves as an efficient surrogate for semiclassical dynamics in U(1) quantum link models.
en.help_to_user: Provides a physically constrained deep learning framework for efficient simulation of lattice gauge systems, avoiding repeated fermionic diagonalization.

idea_spark.idea: Combine gauge-invariant GNN with reinforcement learning to automatically search for optimal gauge field configurations.
idea_spark.risk: Generalization may be limited in strong-coupling or topological phase transition regimes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the use of Wilson loops as fundamental gauge invariants in lattice gauge theory to design physically embedded neural networks.

keywords_raw: z2 and u 1 lattice gauge models

papers.title: Relation Reasoning with LLMs in Expensive Optimization
papers.summary: Expensive optimization problems (EOPs) are black-box tasks with costly objective evaluations and no gradient access, making the evaluation budget the key bottleneck. Surrogate-assisted evolutionary algorithms (SAEAs) reduce evaluations via surrogate predictions, but conventional surrogates often require frequent retraining as populations evolve, incurring overhead. This paper proposes R2SAEA, a reinforcement-trained relation-based large language model (LLM) surrogate assisted evolutionary algorithm. We cast relation-based surrogate modeling as an in-context pairwise reasoning task. To enable efficient inference in evolutionary loops, we develop an anchor-based iterative context construction strategy that reduces prompt complexity from quadratic to linear in population size, and a voting-based aggregation scheme that converts predicted relations into scores for offspring selection. We further build an RL pipeline from evolutionary trajectories and fine-tune Qwen2.5 with GRPO. Experiments on single- and multi-objective benchmarks show improved relation prediction and state-of-the-art optimization performance over strong SAEA baselines and general LLMs. Quantization also enables efficient edge deployment, supporting a zero-shot surrogate paradigm without per-generation retraining. Code and models are available at https://github.com/Septend9/R2SAEA.

ai.tldr: 提出R2SAEA，将关系推理与LLM结合，用于昂贵优化问题，无需每代重训练。
ai.motivation: 昂贵优化问题中评估预算有限，传统代理模型需频繁重训练，开销大。
ai.method: 将关系代理建模转化为上下文成对推理任务，设计锚点迭代上下文构建策略降低复杂度，投票聚合预测关系，并用强化学习微调LLM。
ai.result: 在单目标和多目标基准上取得最优优化性能，支持零样本代理范式。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、可部署的昂贵优化方法，减少计算成本。

idea_spark.idea: 利用LLM的上下文学习能力替代传统代理模型，避免每代重训练。
idea_spark.risk: LLM推理延迟可能影响进化循环效率，量化后性能需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将优化中的关系预测视为自然语言推理任务，启发跨领域应用。

en.tldr: Proposes R2SAEA, combining relation reasoning with LLMs for expensive optimization without per-generation retraining.
en.motivation: Expensive optimization problems have limited evaluation budgets; traditional surrogates require frequent retraining, incurring overhead.
en.method: Casts relation-based surrogate modeling as in-context pairwise reasoning, uses anchor-based context construction to reduce complexity, aggregates predictions via voting, and fine-tunes LLM with reinforcement learning.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art optimization performance on single- and multi-objective benchmarks, enabling a zero-shot surrogate paradigm.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient, deployable method for expensive optimization, reducing computational cost.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage LLM in-context learning to replace traditional surrogates, avoiding per-generation retraining.
idea_spark.risk: LLM inference latency may impact evolutionary loop efficiency; quantization performance needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treating optimization relation prediction as natural language reasoning inspires cross-domain applications.

papers.title: GRIFDIR: Graph Resolution-Invariant FEM Diffusion Models in Function Spaces over Irregular Domains
papers.summary: Score-based diffusion models in infinite-dimensional function spaces provide a mathematically principled framework for modelling function-valued data, offering key advantages such as resolution invariance and the ability to handle irregular discretisations. However, practical implementations have struggled to fully realise these benefits. Existing backbones like Fourier neural operators are often biased towards regular grids and fail to generalise to complex domain topologies. We propose a novel architecture for function-space diffusion models that represents generalised graph convolutional kernels as finite element functions, enabling the model to naturally handle unstructured meshes and complex geometries. We demonstrate the efficacy of our network architecture through a series of unconditional and conditional sampling experiments across diverse geometries, including non-convex and multiply-connected domains. Our results show that the proposed method maintains resolution invariance and achieves high fidelity in capturing functional distributions on non-trivial geometries.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于有限元函数的图卷积核架构，使扩散模型能在不规则域和复杂几何上保持分辨率不变性。
ai.motivation: 现有函数空间扩散模型（如傅里叶神经算子）偏向规则网格，难以处理复杂域拓扑。
ai.method: 将广义图卷积核表示为有限元函数，构建分辨率不变的扩散模型。
ai.result: 在非凸和多连通域上实现无条件/条件采样，保持高保真度和分辨率不变性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供处理不规则网格和复杂几何的函数数据生成方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将有限元函数与图卷积结合，实现几何自适应扩散模型。
idea_spark.risk: 有限元网格质量可能影响模型性能，计算成本较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受有限元方法在偏微分方程求解中的成功启发，将其引入生成模型架构。

idea_spark.idea: 将有限元函数与图卷积结合，实现几何自适应扩散模型。
idea_spark.risk: 有限元网格质量可能影响模型性能，计算成本较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受有限元方法在偏微分方程求解中的成功启发，将其引入生成模型架构。

en.tldr: Proposes a graph convolutional kernel architecture based on finite element functions, enabling diffusion models to maintain resolution invariance on irregular domains and complex geometries.
en.motivation: Existing function-space diffusion models (e.g., Fourier neural operators) are biased toward regular grids and fail to generalize to complex domain topologies.
en.method: Represents generalized graph convolutional kernels as finite element functions to build resolution-invariant diffusion models.
en.result: Achieves unconditional and conditional sampling on non-convex and multiply-connected domains with high fidelity and resolution invariance.
en.help_to_user: Provides a method for generating functional data on irregular meshes and complex geometries.

idea_spark.idea: Combines finite element functions with graph convolutions for geometry-adaptive diffusion models.
idea_spark.risk: Mesh quality may affect performance; computational cost can be high.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the success of finite element methods in solving PDEs, applied to generative model architectures.

papers.title: Programmatic Context Augmentation for LLM-based Symbolic Regression
papers.summary: Symbolic regression (SR), the task of discovering mathematical expressions that best describe a given dataset, remains a fundamental challenge in scientific discovery. Traditional approaches, primarily based on genetic algorithms and related evolutionary methods, have proven useful but suffer from scalability and expressivity limitations. Recently, large language model (LLM)-based evolutionary search methods have been introduced into SR and show promise. However, existing LLM-based approaches typically rely on scalar evaluation metrics, such as mean squared error, as the sole source of feedback during the search process, thereby overlooking the rich information embedded in the dataset. To address this limitation, we propose a novel LLM-based evolutionary search framework that incorporates programmatic context augmentation. By enabling code-based interactions with the dataset, our method can actively perform data analysis and extract informative signals, beyond aggregated evaluation scores. We evaluate our framework on advanced benchmarks, such as LLM-SRBench, and demonstrate superior efficiency and accuracy compared to strong baselines.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于大语言模型的程序化上下文增强进化搜索框架，通过代码交互提取数据集中的丰富信息，提升符号回归的效率和准确性。
ai.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的符号回归方法仅依赖标量评估指标（如均方误差），忽略了数据集中嵌入的丰富信息。
ai.method: 在进化搜索中引入程序化上下文增强，使模型能够通过代码与数据集交互，主动进行数据分析并提取信息信号。
ai.result: 在LLM-SRBench等基准测试上，该方法相比强基线取得了更优的效率和准确率。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户更高效地从数据中发现简洁的数学表达式，适用于科学发现和数据分析场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将代码交互作为通用反馈机制，使大语言模型能主动探索数据，而非被动接收聚合指标。

en.tldr: Proposes a novel LLM-based evolutionary search framework with programmatic context augmentation that enables code-based interactions with the dataset to extract rich information beyond scalar metrics, improving efficiency and accuracy in symbolic regression.
en.motivation: Existing LLM-based symbolic regression methods rely solely on scalar evaluation metrics (e.g., MSE), overlooking the rich information embedded in the dataset.
en.method: Introduces programmatic context augmentation into evolutionary search, allowing the model to interact with the dataset via code, actively perform data analysis, and extract informative signals.
en.result: Demonstrates superior efficiency and accuracy on benchmarks such as LLM-SRBench compared to strong baselines.
en.help_to_user: Helps users more efficiently discover concise mathematical expressions from data, applicable to scientific discovery and data analysis.

idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by how human scientists write scripts to analyze data and discover patterns, endowing LLMs with similar capabilities.

papers.title: On Model-Based Clustering With Entropic Optimal Transport
papers.summary: We develop a new methodology for model-based clustering. Optimizing the log-likelihood provides a principled statistical framework for clustering, with solutions found via the EM algorithm. However, because the log-likelihood is nonconvex, only convergence to stationary points can be guaranteed, and practitioners often use multiple starting points in the hope that one will converge to the global solution. We consider a new loss function based on entropic optimal transport that shares the same global optimum as the log-likelihood but has a much better-behaved landscape, thereby avoiding spurious local-optima configurations that are pervasive with the log-likelihood. Similar to the EM algorithm for the log-likelihood, this new loss can be optimized by the Sinkhorn-EM algorithm, which we show converges at a rate comparable to that of EM. By analyzing extensive numerical experiments and two real-world applications in image segmentation in C. elegans microscopy and clustering in spatial transcriptomics, we show that this new loss outperforms log-likelihood optimization, indicating that it represents a valuable clustering methodology for practitioners.

ai.tldr: 提出基于熵最优传输的聚类损失函数，避免对数似然的局部最优问题，并通过Sinkhorn-EM算法优化。
ai.motivation: 对数似然函数非凸，易陷入局部最优，需要多次随机初始化。
ai.method: 用熵最优传输构造新损失函数，保持与对数似然相同的全局最优，但景观更平滑；采用Sinkhorn-EM算法优化。
ai.result: 在数值实验和线虫图像分割、空间转录组聚类中优于对数似然优化。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种更稳健的模型聚类方法，减少对多初始点的依赖。

idea_spark.idea: 将熵最优传输与EM框架结合，设计平滑损失函数。
idea_spark.risk: 计算复杂度可能高于标准EM，需评估大规模数据适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用最优传输的几何性质改善非凸优化景观。

en.tldr: Proposes a clustering loss based on entropic optimal transport that avoids local optima of log-likelihood, optimized via Sinkhorn-EM.
en.motivation: Log-likelihood is nonconvex and prone to spurious local optima, requiring many random restarts.
en.method: Constructs a new loss using entropic optimal transport that shares the same global optimum as log-likelihood but has a smoother landscape; optimized by Sinkhorn-EM algorithm.
en.result: Outperforms log-likelihood optimization in numerical experiments and real-world applications (C. elegans image segmentation, spatial transcriptomics clustering).
en.help_to_user: Provides a more robust model-based clustering method that reduces dependence on multiple initializations.

idea_spark.risk: Computational complexity may be higher than standard EM; scalability to large datasets needs evaluation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage geometric properties of optimal transport to improve nonconvex optimization landscapes.

papers.title: Realizable Bayes-Consistency for General Metric Losses
papers.summary: We study strong universal Bayes-consistency in the realizable setting for learning with general metric losses, extending classical characterizations beyond $0$-$1$ classification \citep{bousquet_theory_2021, hanneke2021universalbayesconsistencymetric} and real-valued regression \citep{attias_universal_2024}. Given an instance space $(\mathcal X,ρ)$, a label space $(\mathcal Y,\ell)$ with possibly unbounded loss, and a hypothesis class $\mathcal H \subseteq \mathcal Y^{\mathcal X}$, we resolve the realizable case of an open problem presented in \citet{pmlr-v178-cohen22a}. Specifically, we find the necessary and sufficient conditions on the hypothesis class $\mathcal H$ under which there exists a distribution-free learning rule whose risk converges almost surely to the best-in-class risk (which is zero) for every realizable data-generating distribution. Our main contribution is this sharp characterization in terms of a combinatorial obstruction: Similarly to \citet{attias2024optimallearnersrealizableregression}, we introduce the notion of an infinite non-decreasing $(γ_k)$-Littlestone tree, where $γ_k \to \infty$. This extends the Littlestone tree structure used in \citet{bousquet_theory_2021} to the metric loss setting.

ai.tldr: 研究了在可实现设定下，一般度量损失函数的强通用贝叶斯一致性，给出了假设类可学习的充要条件。
ai.motivation: 经典贝叶斯一致性刻画仅适用于0-1分类和实值回归，而一般度量损失下的可实现情形尚未解决。
ai.method: 引入无限非递减(γ_k)-Littlestone树这一组合障碍，刻画假设类可学习的条件。
ai.result: 给出了假设类存在分布无关学习规则，使得风险几乎必然收敛到类内最优风险（零）的充要条件。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解一般度量损失下可实现学习的理论边界，指导假设类的设计。

idea_spark.idea: 将Littlestone树结构推广到度量损失，为理论机器学习提供新工具。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果可能依赖于可实现假设，实际应用中未必满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在非标准损失下设计高效学习算法时考虑组合复杂度。

en.tldr: We study strong universal Bayes-consistency in the realizable setting for general metric losses, providing necessary and sufficient conditions for learnability via an infinite non-decreasing (γ_k)-Littlestone tree.
en.motivation: Classical characterizations of Bayes-consistency are limited to 0-1 classification and real-valued regression; the realizable case for general metric losses was open.
en.method: We introduce the notion of an infinite non-decreasing (γ_k)-Littlestone tree as a combinatorial obstruction to characterize learnable hypothesis classes.
en.result: We give sharp necessary and sufficient conditions for the existence of a distribution-free learning rule whose risk converges almost surely to the best-in-class risk (zero) for every realizable distribution.
en.help_to_user: Clarifies the theoretical boundaries of realizable learning under general metric losses, guiding hypothesis class design.

idea_spark.idea: Extending Littlestone tree structures to metric losses provides a new tool for theoretical machine learning.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results may rely on the realizability assumption, which may not hold in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires designing efficient learning algorithms under non-standard losses by considering combinatorial complexity.

papers.title: Pretrained Model Representations as Acquisition Signals for Active Learning of MLIPs
papers.summary: Training machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) for reactive chemistry is often bottlenecked by the high cost of quantum chemical labels and the scarcity of transition state configurations in candidate pools. Active learning (AL) can mitigate these costs, but its effectiveness hinges on the acquisition rule. We investigate whether the latent space of a pretrained MLIP already contains the information necessary for effective acquisition, eliminating the need for auxiliary uncertainty heads, Bayesian training and fine-tuning, or committee ensembles. We introduce two acquisition signals derived directly from a pretrained MACE potential: a finite-width neural tangent kernel (NTK) and an activation kernel built from hidden latent space features. On reactive-chemistry benchmarks, both kernels consistently outperform fixed-descriptor baselines, committee disagreement, and random acquisition, reducing the data required to reach performance targets by an average of 38% for energy error and 28% for force error. We further show that the pretrained model induces similarity spaces that preserve chemically meaningful structure and provide more reliable residual uncertainty estimates than randomly initialised or fixed-descriptor-based kernels. Our results suggest that pretraining aligns latent-space geometry with model error, yielding a practical and sufficient acquisition signal for reactive MLIP fine-tuning.

ai.tldr: 提出利用预训练MLIP的隐空间特征（NTK和激活核）作为主动学习获取信号，无需额外不确定性头或集成，在反应化学基准上减少38%能量误差和28%力误差所需数据。
ai.motivation: 训练反应化学的机器学习原子间势（MLIP）因量子化学标签昂贵且候选池中过渡态构型稀缺而受限，主动学习可降低成本，但获取规则的有效性至关重要。
ai.method: 从预训练MACE势中直接导出两种获取信号：有限宽神经正切核（NTK）和基于隐空间特征的激活核，用于主动学习采样。
ai.result: 两种核方法在反应化学基准上一致优于固定描述符基线、委员会分歧和随机采样，平均减少38%能量误差和28%力误差所需数据；预训练模型诱导的相似空间保留化学结构，提供更可靠的残差不确定性估计。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需额外训练开销的主动学习获取信号，可显著降低MLIP微调所需标签数据量，适用于反应化学等标签稀缺场景。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将预训练模型的隐空间几何与模型误差对齐的思想，推广到其他预训练科学模型（如蛋白质语言模型）的主动学习。
idea_spark.risk: 预训练模型的质量和领域匹配度可能影响获取信号的有效性；核方法计算复杂度随数据规模增加。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用预训练模型隐空间特征直接指导数据采样，避免复杂的不确定性估计模块，为高效主动学习提供新范式。

en.tldr: Proposes using latent space features (NTK and activation kernel) of a pretrained MLIP as acquisition signals for active learning, eliminating auxiliary heads or ensembles, reducing data needed by 38% for energy error and 28% for force error on reactive chemistry benchmarks.
en.motivation: Training MLIPs for reactive chemistry is bottlenecked by expensive quantum chemical labels and scarcity of transition state configurations; active learning can help, but acquisition rules are critical.
en.method: Derives two acquisition signals directly from a pretrained MACE potential: a finite-width neural tangent kernel (NTK) and an activation kernel built from hidden latent space features.
en.result: Both kernels consistently outperform fixed-descriptor baselines, committee disagreement, and random acquisition, reducing data required by 38% for energy error and 28% for force error; pretrained model similarity spaces preserve chemical structure and provide more reliable residual uncertainty estimates.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical acquisition signal for active learning without extra training overhead, significantly reducing labeled data needed for MLIP fine-tuning in label-scarce reactive chemistry scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Explore aligning latent-space geometry with model error in other pretrained scientific models (e.g., protein language models) for active learning.
idea_spark.risk: Effectiveness depends on pretrained model quality and domain match; kernel methods may scale poorly with data size.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging pretrained model latent features directly for data sampling bypasses complex uncertainty estimation, offering a new paradigm for efficient active learning.

papers.title: Explosion versus decay for boundary derivatives of $p$-harmonic functions as $p$ tends to 1: nonlocality
papers.summary: We consider the Dirichlet problem for the $p$-Laplacian on a bounded Lipschitz domain $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^d$ with a $\{0,1\}$-valued function as the boundary condition and study the dependence of the boundary derivative on $p$ as $p\downarrow1$. We provide sufficient conditions for the derivative to explode at rate $\frac{C_Ω}{p-1}$ and to decay at rate $\exp(-\frac{c_Ω}{p-1})$. Surprisingly, whether explosion or decay occurs is not determined locally. We also present a critical example of a cylinder where this derivative explodes at rate $\frac{C_d}{\sqrt{p-1}}$.

ai.tldr: 研究p-调和函数在p趋近于1时边界导数的爆炸与衰减现象，发现其非局部决定性。
ai.motivation: 探索p-拉普拉斯算子Dirichlet问题中边界导数随p→1的奇异行为。
ai.method: 在Lipschitz域上分析{0,1}值边界条件下的p-调和函数，推导爆炸与衰减的充分条件。
ai.result: 爆炸率可达C_Ω/(p-1)，衰减率可达exp(-c_Ω/(p-1))，并给出圆柱上的临界例子。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解p-调和函数在极限情形下的边界行为及其非局部特性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用几何特征（如圆柱）构造临界例子，揭示爆炸率与维数相关。
idea_spark.risk: 非局部性可能导致局部方法失效，需全局分析。
idea_spark.inspiration: 边界导数行为可能受域的整体形状而非局部曲率控制。

zh.method: 在Lipschitz域上分析{0,1}值边界条件下的p-调和函数，推导爆炸与衰减的充分条件。

en.tldr: Studies explosion vs decay of boundary derivatives of p-harmonic functions as p→1, revealing nonlocal determination.
en.motivation: To explore the singular behavior of boundary derivatives in the p-Laplacian Dirichlet problem as p tends to 1.
en.method: Analyzes p-harmonic functions on Lipschitz domains with {0,1}-valued boundary data, deriving sufficient conditions for explosion and decay.
en.result: Explosion rate C_Ω/(p-1) and decay rate exp(-c_Ω/(p-1)) are found, with a critical cylinder example yielding rate C_d/√(p-1).
en.help_to_user: Helps understand boundary behavior of p-harmonic functions at the limit and its nonlocal nature.

idea_spark.idea: Use geometric features (e.g., cylinders) to construct critical examples revealing dimension-dependent explosion rates.
idea_spark.risk: Nonlocality may render local methods ineffective, requiring global analysis.
idea_spark.inspiration: Boundary derivative behavior may be governed by the global shape of the domain rather than local curvature.

papers.title: Flow Matching on Symmetric Spaces
papers.summary: We introduce a general framework for training flow matching models on Riemannian symmetric spaces, a large class of manifolds that includes the sphere, hyperbolic space and Grassmannians. We exploit their algebraic structure to reformulate flow matching on symmetric spaces as flow matching on a subspace of the Lie algebra of their isometry group, thus linearizing the problem and greatly simplifying the handling of geodesics. As an application, we showcase our framework on the real Grassmannians $\operatorname{SO}(n) / \operatorname{SO}(k) \times \operatorname{SO}(n-k)$.

ai.tldr: 提出在黎曼对称空间上训练流匹配模型的通用框架，利用李代数线性化问题。
ai.motivation: 现有流匹配模型局限于欧氏空间，难以处理流形上的数据生成。
ai.method: 利用对称空间的代数结构，将流匹配转化为等距群李代数子空间上的流匹配。
ai.result: 在实Grassmann流形上验证了框架的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供处理流形数据生成的新工具，简化测地线计算。

idea_spark.risk: 框架依赖对称空间的代数结构，非对称空间可能不适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用李代数简化流形上的生成模型训练。

en.result: Demonstrates the framework on real Grassmannians.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new tool for generative modeling on manifolds, simplifying geodesic computations.

idea_spark.idea: Linearize the flow matching problem to reduce computational complexity.

idea_spark.inspiration: Use Lie algebra to simplify training of generative models on manifolds.

papers.title: On existence of local and global strong solutions for the stochastic tamed Navier-Stokes equations on $\mathbb{R}^3$
papers.summary: We study the theory of local and global strong solution for the stochastic tamed Navier--Stokes equations with multiplicative Wiener and Lévy jump noise in the whole space $\R^3$. More specifically, we first prove the existence of a pathwise unique maximal local strong solution for $\mathcal{F}_0$-measurable initial data in $L^p(Ω; L^p(\mathbb{R}^3;\mathbb{R}^3)$ for $p > 3$. Furthermore, by assuming initial data in $L^p(Ω; L^p(\mathbb{R}^3;\mathbb{R}^3)) \cap L^2(Ω; H^1(\mathbb{R}^3;\mathbb{R}^3))$, we overcome the non-local pressure obstruction to establish the existence of a unique global strong solution.

ai.tldr: 研究了三维全空间上带乘性Wiener和Lévy跳噪声的随机驯化Navier-Stokes方程局部与全局强解的存在性。
ai.motivation: 为随机驯化Navier-Stokes方程在三维无界区域上建立强解理论，克服非局部压力项带来的障碍。
ai.method: 利用路径唯一性证明最大局部强解的存在性，并通过更强的初始条件（L^p ∩ H^1）建立全局强解。
ai.result: 对p>3的L^p初值得到路径唯一的最大局部强解；对L^p ∩ H^1初值得到唯一全局强解。
ai.help_to_user: 为随机流体力学中带跳噪声的方程提供严格的解存在性理论基础。

idea_spark.idea: 利用L^p ∩ H^1初值克服压力项非局部性，或许可尝试更弱的正则性条件。
idea_spark.risk: 三维全空间上的紧性论证可能依赖于特定驯化形式，推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将驯化项替换为其他耗散机制（如分数阶拉普拉斯）以简化分析。

en.tldr: Studies existence of local and global strong solutions for stochastic tamed Navier-Stokes equations with multiplicative Wiener and Lévy jump noise on the whole space R^3.
en.motivation: To establish strong solution theory for stochastic tamed Navier-Stokes equations in unbounded 3D domains, overcoming the non-local pressure obstruction.
en.method: Proves pathwise unique maximal local strong solution via standard techniques, then obtains global strong solution under stronger initial data (L^p ∩ H^1).
en.result: Pathwise unique maximal local strong solution for L^p initial data (p>3); unique global strong solution for L^p ∩ H^1 initial data.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous existence theory for stochastic fluid equations with jump noise.

idea_spark.risk: Compactness arguments on R^3 may rely on specific taming form; generalization requires caution.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider replacing taming with other dissipative mechanisms (e.g., fractional Laplacian) to simplify analysis.

papers.title: Flow Sampling: Learning to Sample from Unnormalized Densities via Denoising Conditional Processes
papers.summary: Sampling from unnormalized densities is analogous to the generative modeling problem, but the target distribution is defined by a known energy function instead of data samples. Because evaluating the energy function is often costly, a primary challenge is to learn an efficient sampler. We introduce Flow Sampling, a framework built on diffusion models and flow matching for the data-free setting. Our training objective is conditioned on a noise sample and regresses onto a denoising diffusion drift constructed from the energy function. In contrast, diffusion models' objective is conditioned on a data sample and regresses onto a noising diffusion drift. We utilize the interpolant process to minimize the number of energy function evaluations during training, resulting in an efficient and scalable method for sampling unnormalized densities. Furthermore, our formulation naturally extends to Riemannian manifolds, enabling diffusion-based sampling in geometries beyond Euclidean space. We derive a closed-form formula for the conditional drift on constant curvature manifolds, including hyperspheres and hyperbolic spaces. We evaluate Flow Sampling on synthetic energy benchmarks, small peptides, large-scale amortized molecular conformer generation, and distributions supported on the sphere, demonstrating strong empirical performance.

ai.tldr: 提出Flow Sampling框架，通过去噪条件过程从非归一化密度中高效采样，适用于数据缺失场景。
ai.motivation: 从非归一化密度采样成本高，现有方法效率低，需要一种可扩展且高效的采样方法。
ai.method: 基于扩散模型和流匹配，训练目标以噪声样本为条件，回归到由能量函数构造的去噪扩散漂移，并利用插值过程减少训练中能量函数评估次数。
ai.result: 在合成能量基准、小肽、大规模分子构象生成及球面分布上表现优异。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需数据样本即可从复杂分布采样的高效方法，适用于分子模拟等科学计算。

idea_spark.idea: 将扩散模型与流匹配结合，并扩展到黎曼流形，可能启发新的几何感知采样算法。
idea_spark.risk: 在非常规流形上推导闭式漂移公式可能限制通用性，且能量函数评估次数虽减少但仍可能成为瓶颈。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用插值过程最小化能量函数评估次数的思路，可启发其他科学计算中昂贵函数调用的优化策略。

en.tldr: Flow Sampling is a framework for efficient sampling from unnormalized densities using denoising conditional processes, without requiring data samples.
en.motivation: Sampling from unnormalized densities is costly due to expensive energy evaluations; existing methods lack efficiency and scalability.
en.method: Built on diffusion models and flow matching, the training objective conditions on noise samples and regresses onto a denoising drift derived from the energy function, using an interpolant process to minimize energy evaluations.
en.result: Achieves strong performance on synthetic energy benchmarks, small peptides, large-scale molecular conformer generation, and spherical distributions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a data-free, efficient sampling method for complex distributions, useful in scientific computing like molecular simulations.

idea_spark.idea: Combining diffusion models with flow matching and extending to Riemannian manifolds may inspire new geometry-aware sampling algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Deriving closed-form drifts for arbitrary manifolds may limit generality, and energy evaluations, though reduced, could still be a bottleneck.
idea_spark.inspiration: The use of interpolant processes to minimize expensive function evaluations could inspire optimization strategies in other scientific computing tasks.

papers.title: Extended-variable relaxations for the constrained generalized maximum-entropy sampling problem
papers.summary: The constrained generalized maximum-entropy sampling problem (CGMESP) is to select an order-s principal submatrix from an order-n covariance matrix, subject to some linear side constraints, so as to maximize the product of its t greatest eigenvalues, 0 < t <= s <n. GMESP refers to the version with no side constraints. Introduced more than 25 years ago, CGMESP is a natural generalization of two fundamental problems in statistical design theory: (i) constrained maximum-entropy sampling problem (CMESP); (ii) binary D-optimality (D-Opt). In the general case, it can be motivated by a selection problem in the context of principal component analysis (PCA).   We present novel non-convex extended variable formulations for CGMESP. Using these formulations as points of departure, we present, first non-convex and then convex, continuous relaxations for CGMESP. We demonstrate many relations between different upper bounds for CGMESP, including upper bounds from the literature and our new upper bounds. We investigate the behavior of our relaxations related to the constraints linking the natural variables with the extended variables. We propose and investigate a generalized scaling technique for bound improvement. In the context of branch-and-bound, we determine the better of two natural branching techniques for fixing variables to zero. Finally, we present numerical experiments illustrating the value of our methods.

ai.tldr: 针对带线性约束的广义最大熵抽样问题，提出了新的非凸扩展变量模型，并由此导出非凸和凸连续松弛，分析了多种上界关系，提出了广义缩放技术改进界，并在分支定界中比较了两种分支策略。
ai.motivation: CGMESP 是统计设计理论中两个基本问题（CMESP 和二元 D-最优性）的自然推广，在 PCA 选择问题中有重要应用，但现有求解方法有限。
ai.method: 提出非凸扩展变量公式，进而构造非凸和凸连续松弛；分析自然变量与扩展变量约束的行为；提出广义缩放技术；在分支定界框架下比较两种零变量固定分支策略。
ai.result: 建立了多种上界（包括文献已有和新上界）之间的关系；数值实验验证了所提松弛和缩放技术的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 为求解带约束的广义最大熵抽样问题提供了新的松弛方法和界改进技术，可用于统计设计、PCA 特征选择等场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将非凸扩展变量公式与凸松弛结合，并利用缩放技术改进上界，可能启发更高效的全局优化算法。
idea_spark.risk: 扩展变量引入可能增加问题规模，缩放技术的参数选择需谨慎，否则可能降低松弛质量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从统计设计理论中的经典问题出发，通过变量扩展和松弛构造，为组合优化中的上界改进提供了新思路。

idea_spark.risk: 扩展变量引入可能增加问题规模，缩放技术的参数选择需谨慎，否则可能降低松弛质量。

en.tldr: For the constrained generalized maximum-entropy sampling problem, we propose novel non-convex extended-variable formulations, derive non-convex and convex continuous relaxations, analyze relationships among various upper bounds, introduce a generalized scaling technique for bound improvement, and compare two branching strategies in branch-and-bound.
en.motivation: CGMESP generalizes two fundamental problems in statistical design (CMESP and binary D-optimality) and has applications in PCA-based selection, but lacks efficient solution methods.
en.method: We develop non-convex extended-variable formulations, then construct non-convex and convex continuous relaxations; study constraints linking natural and extended variables; propose a generalized scaling technique; compare two branching rules for fixing variables to zero in branch-and-bound.
en.result: We establish relations among multiple upper bounds (existing and new); numerical experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our relaxations and scaling technique.
en.help_to_user: Provides new relaxation methods and bound improvement techniques for solving CGMESP, applicable to statistical design and PCA feature selection.

idea_spark.idea: Combining non-convex extended-variable formulations with convex relaxations and scaling may lead to more efficient global optimization algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Extended variables increase problem size; scaling parameters require careful tuning to avoid degrading relaxation quality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from classical problems in statistical design, variable extension and relaxation offer a new avenue for improving upper bounds in combinatorial optimization.

papers.title: Solution of second-order hyperbolic quasilinear systems with spatio-characteristic initial data in weighted Sobolev-type spaces under finite differentiability assumptions on the data
papers.summary: The aim of this work is to establish an existence and uniqueness solution for spatiocharacteristic second-order quasilinear hyperbolic problems in Sobolev type spaces with weights to clarify and complete the previous work done by H. Muller Zum Hagen and H.J. Seifert, Gen. Rel. and Gravit. 1977. We use this result in P. G. Louokdom tamto, PhD thesis ongoing, 2026 to establish a semi-global existence and uniqueness result for second-order quasilinear Goursat problems where the coefficients of the second derivatives depend linearly on the unknown in weighted Sobolev-type spaces, which we will apply to the harmonic gauge vacuum Einstein equations

ai.tldr: 本文在加权Sobolev型空间中，针对具有时空特征初始数据的二阶拟线性双曲系统，在数据有限可微性假设下建立了存在唯一性定理，并应用于调和规范真空爱因斯坦方程。
ai.motivation: 澄清并完善H. Muller Zum Hagen和H.J. Seifert在1977年关于此类问题的先前工作，并为后续半全局Goursat问题研究奠定基础。
ai.method: 采用加权Sobolev型空间框架，结合有限可微性假设，通过分析二阶拟线性双曲系统的结构来证明解的存在唯一性。
ai.result: 建立了具有时空特征初始数据的二阶拟线性双曲系统在加权Sobolev型空间中的存在唯一性结果，并指出该结果可应用于调和规范真空爱因斯坦方程。
ai.help_to_user: 如果您研究广义相对论中的初值问题或拟线性双曲系统，本文提供了严格的理论基础和分析工具。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将本文的存在唯一性结果扩展到更一般的非线性双曲系统，或应用于其他规范下的爱因斯坦方程。
idea_spark.risk: 加权空间的选择和有限可微性条件可能限制实际应用，需要验证具体物理问题的适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合数值方法，验证理论结果在模拟引力波或黑洞形成等场景中的有效性。

en.tldr: This paper establishes an existence and uniqueness result for second-order quasilinear hyperbolic systems with spatio-characteristic initial data in weighted Sobolev-type spaces under finite differentiability assumptions, and applies it to the harmonic gauge vacuum Einstein equations.
en.motivation: To clarify and complete previous work by H. Muller Zum Hagen and H.J. Seifert (1977), and to provide a foundation for semi-global existence results for Goursat problems.
en.method: Using weighted Sobolev-type spaces and finite differentiability assumptions, the existence and uniqueness are proved by analyzing the structure of second-order quasilinear hyperbolic systems.
en.result: Existence and uniqueness are established for spatio-characteristic second-order quasilinear hyperbolic problems in weighted Sobolev spaces, with application to the harmonic gauge vacuum Einstein equations.
en.help_to_user: If you study initial value problems in general relativity or quasilinear hyperbolic systems, this paper provides rigorous theoretical foundations and analytical tools.

idea_spark.idea: Try to generalize the existence-uniqueness result to more general nonlinear hyperbolic systems or to Einstein equations in other gauges.
idea_spark.risk: The choice of weighted spaces and finite differentiability conditions may limit practical applicability; verification for specific physical problems is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine with numerical methods to test the theoretical results in simulations of gravitational wave or black hole formation.

papers.title: Singular semilinear elliptic equations in nondivergence form
papers.summary: We study the singular semilinear equation $-Pu = \frac{f}{u^γ}$ on a bounded domain $Ω$ with Dirichlet condition $u \equiv 0$ on $\partial Ω$ , where $P$ is a second-order elliptic differential operator in nondivergence form. We obtain the existence of a solution under the assumptions that $Ω\in C^{1,1}$ and $P$ has $C^1$ coefficients, as well as the uniqueness of solutions in $L^1(Ω)$, under the assumptions that $Ω\in C^2$ and $P$ has $C^2$ coefficients. Our proofs are based on a novel combination of tools, such as recently obtained nonlinear variants of Gagliardo--Nirenberg inequalities, estimates of Green functions, and new variants of Kato-type inequalities.

ai.tldr: 研究非散度型椭圆算子的奇异半线性方程，在C^1,1和C^2边界条件下分别证明了解的存在性和唯一性。
ai.motivation: 非散度型椭圆算子的奇异半线性方程在数学物理中具有重要应用，但现有理论对这类方程的解的存在性和唯一性研究不足。
ai.method: 结合新近的非线性Gagliardo-Nirenberg不等式、Green函数估计和Kato型不等式变体进行证明。
ai.result: 在Ω∈C^1,1且P系数C^1时解存在；在Ω∈C^2且P系数C^2时解在L^1中唯一。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理非散度型椭圆算子的奇异问题提供了新的存在性和唯一性理论工具。

zh.tldr: 研究非散度型椭圆算子的奇异半线性方程，在C^1,1和C^2边界条件下分别证明了解的存在性和唯一性。
zh.motivation: 非散度型椭圆算子的奇异半线性方程在数学物理中具有重要应用，但现有理论对这类方程的解的存在性和唯一性研究不足。
zh.method: 结合新近的非线性Gagliardo-Nirenberg不等式、Green函数估计和Kato型不等式变体进行证明。
zh.result: 在Ω∈C^1,1且P系数C^1时解存在；在Ω∈C^2且P系数C^2时解在L^1中唯一。

en.tldr: We study singular semilinear equations with nondivergence form elliptic operators, proving existence under C^1,1 domain and C^1 coefficients, and uniqueness in L^1 under C^2 domain and C^2 coefficients.
en.motivation: Singular semilinear equations in nondivergence form arise in mathematical physics, yet existence and uniqueness theory is underdeveloped.
en.method: Proofs rely on a novel combination of nonlinear Gagliardo-Nirenberg inequalities, Green function estimates, and new variants of Kato-type inequalities.
en.result: Existence holds when Ω∈C^1,1 and P has C^1 coefficients; uniqueness in L^1 holds when Ω∈C^2 and P has C^2 coefficients.
en.help_to_user: Provides new existence and uniqueness tools for singular problems involving nondivergence form elliptic operators.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the method to nondivergence form parabolic equations or higher-order elliptic systems with singular terms.
idea_spark.risk: Higher order or more complex boundary conditions may break the inequalities or require finer estimates.
idea_spark.inspiration: The combination of different inequality techniques to handle singular nonlinearities can inspire other degenerate or singular PDE problems.

papers.title: Data-driven Initial Gap Identification of Piecewise-linear Systems using Sparse Regression and Universal Approximation Theorem
papers.summary: This paper proposes a method for identifying an initial gap in piecewise-linear systems from data. Piecewise-linear systems appear in many engineered systems such as degraded mechanical systems and infrastructures, and are known to show strong nonlinearities. To analyze the behavior of such piecewise-linear systems, it is necessary to identify the initial gap, at which the system behavior switches. The proposed method identifies the initial gap by discovering the governing equations using sparse regression and calculating the gap based on the universal approximation theorem. A key step to achieve this is to approximate a piecewise-linear function by a finite sum of piecewise-linear functions in sparse regression. The equivalent gap is then calculated from the coefficients of the multiple piecewise-linear functions and their respective switching points in the obtained equation. The proposed method is first applied to a numerical model to confirm its applicability to piecewise-linear systems. Experimental validation of the proposed method has then been conducted with a simple mass-spring-hopping system, where the method successfully identifies the initial gap in the system with high accuracy.

ai.tldr: 提出一种数据驱动方法，通过稀疏回归和通用逼近定理识别分段线性系统的初始间隙。
ai.motivation: 分段线性系统在工程中常见且呈现强非线性，需要识别系统行为切换的初始间隙以分析其行为。
ai.method: 利用稀疏回归发现控制方程，并用多个分段线性函数之和近似分段线性函数，从系数和切换点计算等效间隙。
ai.result: 数值模型和弹簧-质量-跳跃系统实验验证了该方法能高精度识别初始间隙。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户从数据中自动识别分段线性系统的关键切换点，无需先验模型。

idea_spark.idea: 结合稀疏回归与通用逼近定理，将复杂非线性函数分解为可解释的分段线性成分。
idea_spark.risk: 对噪声敏感，且需要足够数据覆盖所有工作模式。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将函数逼近与稀疏回归结合，用于发现混合动态系统的切换规则。

en.tldr: A data-driven method to identify the initial gap in piecewise-linear systems using sparse regression and the universal approximation theorem.
en.motivation: Piecewise-linear systems exhibit strong nonlinearities and require identification of the switching initial gap for behavior analysis.
en.method: Discover governing equations via sparse regression, approximate the piecewise-linear function as a sum of piecewise-linear functions, and compute the equivalent gap from coefficients and switching points.
en.result: Numerical and experimental validation on a mass-spring-hopping system shows high accuracy in identifying the initial gap.
en.help_to_user: Enables automatic identification of critical switching points in piecewise-linear systems from data without prior models.

idea_spark.idea: Combine sparse regression with the universal approximation theorem to decompose complex nonlinear functions into interpretable piecewise-linear components.
idea_spark.risk: Sensitive to noise and requires sufficient data covering all operating modes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires combining function approximation with sparse regression to discover switching rules in hybrid dynamical systems.

papers.title: From Information Geometry to Jet Substructure: A Triality of Cumulant Tensors, Energy Correlators, and Hypergraphs
papers.summary: Pairwise Fisher graphs capture local covariance information, but they cannot distinguish an irreducible multi-observable radiation pattern from a collection of ordinary pairwise correlations. We show that this missing structure is naturally supplied by higher-order Fisher tensors. In a finite basis of binned EECs, ECFs, or EFPs, and in the natural exponential-family coordinates generated by that basis, the same local tensor has three equivalent interpretations: a coefficient in the local Kullback-Leibler expansion, a connected cumulant of the chosen correlator observables, and a signed weight on a hyperedge linking those observables. This gives an exact Fisher-correlator-hypergraph triality in the local exponential-family embedding. The triality provides a direct construction of physics-informed hypergraphs from correlator data. Extending the quadratic Fisher matrix to the first non-trivial higher tensor identifies genuinely connected multi-observable radiation patterns, supplies hyperedge weights for higher-order Laplacians and message passing, and gives a principled criterion for compressing observable bases beyond pairwise information. We develop these constructions and spell out why the exact cumulant interpretation is special to natural exponential-family coordinates. We illustrate the framework in four applications. In a minimal local-KL study, the cubic Fisher tensor reduces the KL truncation error and isolates the dominant triplet structure. In a two-versus-three prong jet substructure benchmark, the hypergraph selector improves compressed-basis classification. In a 33-observable basis-design problem, the Fisher hypergraph retains more third-order local response at twelve observables. A low-capacity learning benchmark then shows how the same Fisher hyperedges can be used as an interpretable inductive bias for message passing on correlator observables.

ai.tldr: 本文提出Fisher-相关器-超图三重性，将高阶Fisher张量解释为累积量张量和超边权重，用于喷注子结构分析。
ai.motivation: 成对Fisher图无法区分多观测量辐射模式与普通成对关联，需要高阶结构来捕捉真实的多体关联。
ai.method: 在自然指数族坐标下，将高阶Fisher张量等价为局部KL展开系数、连接累积量和超边权重，构建物理启发的超图。
ai.result: 立方Fisher张量减少KL截断误差，超图选择器改善压缩基分类，在33观测量基设计中保留更多三阶局部响应，并作为可解释归纳偏置用于消息传递。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种从关联子数据直接构造物理超图的方法，用于喷注子结构中的多观测量模式识别和基压缩。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Fisher超图作为可解释的归纳偏置，在消息传递网络中嵌入物理先验，提升低容量学习性能。
idea_spark.risk: 超图构造依赖自然指数族坐标，若基选择不当可能丢失信息；高阶张量计算复杂度高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将信息几何与图学习结合，为高能物理中的特征工程提供新视角。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a Fisher-correlator-hypergraph triality, interpreting higher-order Fisher tensors as cumulant tensors and hyperedge weights for jet substructure analysis.
en.motivation: Pairwise Fisher graphs cannot distinguish irreducible multi-observable radiation patterns from ordinary pairwise correlations, necessitating higher-order structures.
en.method: In natural exponential-family coordinates, the higher-order Fisher tensor is equivalently a local KL expansion coefficient, a connected cumulant, and a hyperedge weight, constructing physics-informed hypergraphs.
en.result: The cubic Fisher tensor reduces KL truncation error; the hypergraph selector improves compressed-basis classification; in a 33-observable basis design, it retains more third-order local response; and it serves as an interpretable inductive bias for message passing.
en.help_to_user: Provides a direct construction of physics-informed hypergraphs from correlator data for multi-observable pattern recognition and basis compression in jet substructure.

idea_spark.idea: Use Fisher hypergraphs as an interpretable inductive bias in message-passing networks to embed physical priors and improve low-capacity learning.
idea_spark.risk: Hypergraph construction relies on natural exponential-family coordinates; poor basis choice may lose information; higher-order tensor computation is costly.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining information geometry with graph learning offers a new perspective for feature engineering in high-energy physics.

papers.title: Quantitative Convergence of Proximal Splitting Iterations in Uniformly Convex Metric Spaces
papers.summary: We provide sufficient conditions for quantitative convergence of the iterates of proximal splitting algorithms for minimizing a sum of functions on a metric space. The theory does not assume that the functions have common minima, nor does it require vanishing proximal parameters or step sizes. Our results are stated for general $p$-uniformly convex spaces with curvature bounded above, and a corollary specializes the main theorem to Hadamard spaces, where many assumptions for the more general setting can be dropped. The theory is demonstrated with computation of Fréchet means in the space of SPD matrices with the affine invariant metric (a Hadamard space) and the sphere with the usual geodesic metric (a CAT($κ$) metric space).

ai.tldr: 本文给出了在一致凸度量空间上，近端分裂算法迭代的定量收敛条件，不要求函数有公共最小值或步长趋于零，并在Hadamard空间和CAT(κ)空间上进行了验证。
ai.motivation: 现有近端分裂算法的收敛分析通常要求函数有公共最小值或步长衰减，限制了在非欧几何（如SPD矩阵流形、球面）上的应用。
ai.method: 利用p-一致凸度量空间和曲率有上界的几何性质，建立不依赖步长衰减的定量收敛条件，并针对Hadamard空间简化假设。
ai.result: 证明了在一般一致凸度量空间中近端分裂迭代的定量收敛，并在SPD矩阵空间（仿射不变度量）和球面（CAT(κ)）上通过Fréchet均值计算展示了有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解在非欧几何优化问题中，近端分裂算法何时以及如何保证收敛，无需步长衰减。

idea_spark.idea: 利用一致凸性和曲率上界，设计不依赖步长衰减的收敛条件，可能推广到更一般的度量空间或非凸目标。
idea_spark.risk: 理论假设（p-一致凸、曲率有上界）在复杂实际应用中可能难以验证，且数值实验仅涉及简单示例。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受启发于经典欧氏空间近端分裂收敛理论，将其扩展到度量几何框架，为流形优化提供新工具。

en.tldr: This paper provides sufficient conditions for quantitative convergence of proximal splitting iterations in uniformly convex metric spaces, without requiring common minima or vanishing step sizes, and demonstrates results on Hadamard spaces and CAT(κ) spaces.
en.motivation: Existing convergence analyses for proximal splitting often require common minima or decaying step sizes, limiting applicability in non-Euclidean geometries such as SPD matrix manifolds and spheres.
en.method: Leveraging p-uniform convexity and curvature bounded above, the authors establish quantitative convergence conditions independent of step-size decay, with simplified assumptions for Hadamard spaces.
en.result: Quantitative convergence is proven for proximal splitting in general uniformly convex metric spaces, and validated via Fréchet mean computation on SPD matrices (affine invariant metric) and spheres (CAT(κ)).
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand when and how proximal splitting algorithms converge in non-Euclidean optimization without step-size decay.

idea_spark.idea: Design convergence conditions independent of step-size decay using uniform convexity and curvature bounds, potentially extendable to more general metric spaces or non-convex objectives.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical assumptions (p-uniform convexity, bounded curvature) may be hard to verify in complex real-world applications, and numerical experiments are limited to simple examples.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by classical Euclidean proximal splitting convergence theory, extended to metric geometry, offering new tools for manifold optimization.

papers.title: One-Dimensional Nonnegative Spline Smoothing via Convex Semi-Infinite Programming with a Cutting-Plane Method
papers.summary: Spline functions are smooth piecewise polynomials widely used for interpolation and smoothing, and nonnegative spline smoothing is also studied for nonnegative data. Previous research used sufficient conditions for the nonnegativity of spline functions because necessary and sufficient conditions for the nonnegativity are infinitely many linear inequalities, which are difficult to handle in optimization algorithms. This conventional method quickly computes a nonnegative spline function via quadratic programming (QP), but the optimal solution may be slightly degraded by using the sufficient condition. In this paper, we express 1D nonnegative spline smoothing as a convex semi-infinite programming (CSIP) problem that directly deals with infinite inequality constraints. As optimization algorithms for general SIP problems, local-reduction-based sequential quadratic programming (LRSQP) methods are used, but their convergence performance deteriorates for certain problems due to multiple approximations during updates. To quickly solve the CSIP problem, we propose a cutting-plane (CP) method. In the proposed method, after giving an initial solution by the standard spline smoothing, we find the minimizer of each polynomial piece by using the closed-form solution for a low-degree polynomial or a numerical solution for a high-degree polynomial. If the minimum value is negative, then such minimizer is added into the constraint of the problem to guarantee the nonnegativity. This constrained problem is quickly solved via QP, and we find the minimizer of each polynomial piece again. We repeat these procedures until there are no negative minimum values. The proposed method guarantees convergence to the original CSIP solution, and its effectiveness is demonstrated in numerical experiments by comparison to the conventional methods, QP under the sufficient condition and CSIP using the MATLAB LRSQP algorithm.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于切割平面法的凸半无限规划方法，直接处理一维非负样条平滑中的无限不等式约束，保证收敛到原问题解。
ai.motivation: 现有方法使用非负性的充分条件导致最优解轻微退化，而必要充分条件涉及无限多个线性不等式难以处理。
ai.method: 将一维非负样条平滑建模为凸半无限规划，采用切割平面法迭代求解：从标准样条平滑初始解出发，计算每个多项式段的最小值，若为负则将该点加入约束，通过二次规划快速求解，重复直至无负最小值。
ai.result: 数值实验表明，所提方法收敛到原凸半无限规划解，且优于基于充分条件的二次规划和MATLAB LRSQP算法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效且保证收敛的非负样条平滑算法，适用于非负数据插值与平滑。

idea_spark.idea: 利用低次多项式的闭式解快速定位违反约束的点，避免全局优化。
idea_spark.risk: 对于高次多项式或高维问题，闭式解可能不存在，需依赖数值方法，可能影响效率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将无限约束离散化为有限个关键约束的迭代策略，可启发其他半无限规划问题的求解。

zh.tldr: 提出一种基于切割平面法的凸半无限规划方法，直接处理一维非负样条平滑中的无限不等式约束，保证收敛到原问题解。
zh.motivation: 现有方法使用非负性的充分条件导致最优解轻微退化，而必要充分条件涉及无限多个线性不等式难以处理。

zh.result: 数值实验表明，所提方法收敛到原凸半无限规划解，且优于基于充分条件的二次规划和MATLAB LRSQP算法。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种高效且保证收敛的非负样条平滑算法，适用于非负数据插值与平滑。

idea_spark.idea: 利用低次多项式的闭式解快速定位违反约束的点，避免全局优化。
idea_spark.risk: 对于高次多项式或高维问题，闭式解可能不存在，需依赖数值方法，可能影响效率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将无限约束离散化为有限个关键约束的迭代策略，可启发其他半无限规划问题的求解。

en.tldr: Proposes a cutting-plane method for convex semi-infinite programming to directly handle infinite inequality constraints in one-dimensional nonnegative spline smoothing, guaranteeing convergence to the original solution.
en.motivation: Existing methods using sufficient conditions for nonnegativity degrade the optimal solution, while necessary and sufficient conditions involve infinitely many linear inequalities that are difficult to handle.
en.method: Formulates 1D nonnegative spline smoothing as a convex semi-infinite programming problem and solves it via a cutting-plane method: starting from standard spline smoothing, compute the minimizer of each polynomial piece; if negative, add that point as a constraint and solve via quadratic programming; repeat until no negative minima.
en.result: Numerical experiments demonstrate convergence to the original CSIP solution and superiority over quadratic programming with sufficient conditions and MATLAB LRSQP.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and convergent algorithm for nonnegative spline smoothing, suitable for interpolation and smoothing of nonnegative data.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit closed-form solutions for low-degree polynomials to quickly locate constraint-violating points, avoiding global optimization.
idea_spark.risk: For high-degree polynomials or higher dimensions, closed-form solutions may be unavailable, requiring numerical methods that could affect efficiency.
idea_spark.inspiration: The iterative discretization of infinite constraints into a finite set of critical constraints can inspire solutions for other semi-infinite programming problems.

papers.title: Heat equations driven by mixed local-nonlocal operators with exponential nonlinearity
papers.summary: We investigate the Cauchy problem for a heat equation driven by the mixed local-nonlocal operator $\mathcal{L}:=-Δ+(-Δ)^s$, $s\in(0,1)$, with exponential nonlinearity \[ \partial_tu(x,t)+\mathcal{L}u(x,t)=f(u(x,t)), \qquad (x,t)\in \mathbb{R}^{d}\times(0,\infty), \] where $f:\mathbb{R}\to\mathbb{R}$ exhibits exponential growth at infinity and satisfies $f(0)=0$. We establish local well-posedness in a suitable Orlicz space in the case where $f(u)\sim e^{|u|^p}$ as $|u|\to\infty$, with $p>1$. We further prove the existence of global solutions for small initial data under the assumption that $f$ satisfies the growth condition $|f(u)|\sim |u|^m$ near the origin. Moreover, we derive large-time decay estimates in Lebesgue spaces, showing that the behavior of the nonlinearity near the origin determines the decay rate of solutions and highlights a unique asymptotic transition that bridges local and non-local diffusion theories.

ai.tldr: 研究由混合局部-非局部算子驱动的热方程柯西问题，指数非线性项，建立局部适定性、小初值全局解及大时间衰减估计。
ai.motivation: 探索混合局部-非局部扩散与指数非线性耦合下的解行为，揭示局部与非局部扩散理论之间的渐近过渡。
ai.method: 利用Orlicz空间框架处理指数增长非线性，通过不动点定理和能量估计建立适定性和衰减率。
ai.result: 得到局部适定性（p>1）、小初值全局解（原点附近幂次增长）以及Lebesgue空间中的大时间衰减估计，衰减率由非线性在原点附近行为决定。
ai.help_to_user: 为混合扩散模型提供严格的数学分析工具，可用于材料科学或生物扩散中指数增长过程的建模。

idea_spark.inspiration: 非线性在原点附近的幂次行为决定衰减率，启发设计可控衰减的扩散过程。

en.tldr: Investigates the Cauchy problem for a heat equation with mixed local-nonlocal operator and exponential nonlinearity, establishing local well-posedness, global existence for small data, and large-time decay estimates.
en.motivation: To understand solution behavior under mixed diffusion and exponential nonlinearity, revealing an asymptotic transition bridging local and nonlocal diffusion theories.
en.method: Uses Orlicz space framework for exponential growth, fixed-point arguments, and energy estimates to prove well-posedness and decay rates.
en.result: Local well-posedness (p>1), global existence for small initial data (power-like growth near origin), and large-time decay estimates in Lebesgue spaces; decay rate determined by nonlinearity near origin.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous mathematical tools for mixed diffusion models, applicable to material science or biological diffusion with exponential growth.

idea_spark.idea: Apply Orlicz space techniques to fractional reaction-diffusion systems with exponential nonlinearity to study traveling waves or blow-up.
idea_spark.risk: Exponential nonlinearity may cause finite-time blow-up; careful control of initial data is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Power-like behavior near origin determines decay rate, inspiring design of controllable decay diffusion processes.

papers.title: Exponential integrability of the solution to the stochastic Burgers equation driven by white noise
papers.summary: We study stochastic Burgers equation driven by a rough noise $(-Δ)^γ dW_t$, where $Δ$ is the Laplacian in one dimension with Dirichlet boundary conditions, and $γ\in [0,1/4)$. We prove exponential estimates for the solution $X_t^x$, starting from $x \in L^2(0,1)$, by showing that there exists some constant $λ>0$ for which \begin{equation} \label{ds} \mathbb{E}   \left[\exp\left(λ\sup_{t\in[0,T]}\|X_t^x\|_{L^2(0,1)}^2 \right) \right]< \infty. \end{equation} This estimate was known only in the case of trace class noise when $-1/2 <γ< -1/4 $ since in that case one can use the Itô formula. To prove the exponential estimate we combine the Boué-Dupuis method with an argument used in [Da Prato-Debussche, Potential Anal. 2007]. The exponential estimate have important applications in large deviation theory, among others. We also deduce a new Lipschitz regularizing effect for the corresponding Markov semigroup.

ai.tldr: 研究白噪声驱动的随机Burgers方程解的指数可积性，并证明存在常数λ使得指数矩有限。
ai.motivation: 先前仅在迹类噪声情形下获得指数估计，本文希望推广到更粗糙的噪声情形。
ai.method: 结合Boué-Dupuis方法与Da Prato-Debussche论证技巧。
ai.result: 对γ∈[0,1/4)的粗糙噪声，证明了解的L²范数平方的指数矩有限，并推导出Markov半群的新Lipschitz正则化效应。
ai.help_to_user: 为随机Burgers方程的大偏差理论提供关键估计工具。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将类似方法应用于二维或三维随机Navier-Stokes方程。
idea_spark.risk: 高维情形下非线性项的处理可能更复杂，需要新的先验估计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用粗糙路径理论或重整化技术处理更一般的乘性噪声。
