en.tldr: We prove exponential integrability for the solution of the stochastic Burgers equation driven by rough white noise, showing that the exponential moment of the squared L² norm is finite.
en.motivation: Previous exponential estimates only covered trace-class noise; this work extends to rougher noise regimes.
en.method: Combination of the Boué-Dupuis variational method and an argument from Da Prato-Debussche.
en.result: For γ∈[0,1/4), we establish the exponential estimate and derive a new Lipschitz regularizing effect for the associated Markov semigroup.
en.help_to_user: Provides a crucial estimate for large deviation theory of the stochastic Burgers equation.

idea_spark.idea: Apply similar techniques to the 2D or 3D stochastic Navier-Stokes equations.
idea_spark.risk: Higher dimensions may require more sophisticated nonlinearity handling and new a priori bounds.
idea_spark.inspiration: Incorporate rough path theory or renormalization to handle more general multiplicative noises.

papers.title: Analysis and Explainability of LLMs Via Evolutionary Methods
papers.summary: Evolutionary methods have long been useful for analysis and explanation in genetics, biology, ecology, and related fields. In this work, we extend these methods to neural networks, specifically large language models (LLMs), to better analyze and explain relationships among models. We show how relating weights to genotypes and output text to phenotypes can improve our understanding of model lineage, important datasets, the roles of different model layers, and visualization of model relationships. We demonstrate this in a controlled experiment, where our estimated evolutionary trees reliably recover the topology of the ground-truth training tree. We further identify the most important weight layers according to weight differences and show through phenotypic experiments that one training dataset appears to contribute more useful information than the others. Finally, we generate an unsupervised evolutionary tree of black-box foundation models. Throughout, we provide visualizations that support a clearer understanding of evolutionary relationships among LLMs.

ai.tldr: 将进化方法应用于大型语言模型，通过权重-基因型和输出文本-表型的类比，分析模型间关系、重要数据集、层角色，并构建进化树。
ai.motivation: 进化方法在遗传学等领域已成功用于分析和解释，但尚未系统应用于神经网络。本文旨在将其扩展到LLM，以揭示模型间的进化关系。
ai.method: 将模型权重类比为基因型，输出文本类比为表型，构建进化树；通过受控实验验证树拓扑恢复能力；识别重要权重层；进行表型实验比较数据集贡献；对黑盒基础模型生成无监督进化树。
ai.result: 受控实验可靠恢复真实训练树拓扑；识别出最重要的权重层；一个训练数据集贡献更多有用信息；成功生成黑盒基础模型的无监督进化树。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解LLM之间的进化关系、重要数据集和层角色，提供可视化支持。

idea_spark.idea: 利用进化树指导模型压缩或知识蒸馏，选择关键层或数据集。
idea_spark.risk: 进化树可能受训练顺序或超参数影响，需验证鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受生物学系统发育分析启发，将模型训练视为进化过程。

en.tldr: Extends evolutionary methods to LLMs by analogizing weights to genotypes and output text to phenotypes, enabling analysis of model lineage, important datasets, layer roles, and evolutionary tree construction.
en.motivation: Evolutionary methods have proven useful for analysis in genetics and biology but have not been systematically applied to neural networks. This work aims to extend them to LLMs to reveal evolutionary relationships among models.
en.method: Analogizes model weights to genotypes and output text to phenotypes; constructs evolutionary trees; validates tree topology recovery via controlled experiments; identifies important weight layers; conducts phenotypic experiments to compare dataset contributions; generates unsupervised evolutionary trees for black-box foundation models.
en.result: Controlled experiments reliably recover ground-truth training tree topology; identify the most important weight layers; one training dataset contributes more useful information; successfully generate unsupervised evolutionary trees for black-box foundation models.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand evolutionary relationships among LLMs, important datasets, and layer roles, supported by visualizations.

idea_spark.idea: Use evolutionary trees to guide model compression or knowledge distillation by selecting key layers or datasets.
idea_spark.risk: Evolutionary trees may be sensitive to training order or hyperparameters; robustness needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by phylogenetic analysis in biology, treating model training as an evolutionary process.

papers.title: Stochastic Itô Equations and Parabolic Second-Order Equations with singular Drift
papers.summary: The aim of the book is to present some recent results in the theory of stochastic Itô equations with singular deterministic part (drift) and its applications to second-order elliptic and parabolic equations with singular first-order coefficients. The singularity is characterized by means of Morrey spaces and this allows for much more singular coefficients than those from Lebesgue spaces. For instance, first-order coefficients having behavior like $1/|x|$ near the origin are allowed.   In the first part of the book we are dealing with equations having just measurable coefficients and treat the Markov diffusion time-inhomogeneous processes $X$ corresponding to parabolic operators. In particular, mixed-norm parabolic Aleksandrov estimates, Harnack inequality and Hölder continuity of $X$-caloric functions are investigated. This produces the corresponding results in PDEs such as extended Aleksandrov maximum principle, Harnack inequality and Hölder continuity of PDE-caloric functions.   In two remaining chapters we concentrate on weak and strong solutions of Itô equations which requires some regularity restrictions on the diffusion matrix (or second-order coefficients in the PDE language). We give the best to date conditions in terms of Morrey spaces for the existence and uniqueness of weak and strong solutions of Itô equations with singular drift. The majority of our main results are new even if the drift part is zero.

ai.tldr: 本书介绍了带奇异漂移的随机伊藤方程及其在二阶椭圆和抛物方程中的应用，其中奇异性通过Morrey空间刻画，允许系数在原点附近具有1/|x|行为。
ai.motivation: 现有理论中，Lebesgue空间对系数的奇异性限制较强，无法处理如1/|x|这样的强奇异系数。
ai.method: 利用Morrey空间刻画漂移项的奇异性，结合混合范数抛物Aleksandrov估计、Harnack不等式和Hölder连续性分析。
ai.result: 给出了在Morrey空间框架下弱解和强解存在唯一性的迄今最优条件，并推广了PDE中的Aleksandrov最大原理、Harnack不等式和Hölder连续性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解带强奇异系数的随机微分方程和抛物型偏微分方程的理论基础及最新进展。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将Morrey空间框架应用于带奇异漂移的分数阶随机方程或非线性抛物系统。
idea_spark.risk: Morrey空间条件可能难以验证，且对扩散系数的正则性要求较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从PDE中Aleksandrov估计的推广出发，启发随机方程中更精细的正则性理论。

en.tldr: This book presents recent results on stochastic Itô equations with singular drift characterized by Morrey spaces, and their applications to second-order elliptic and parabolic equations with singular first-order coefficients.
en.motivation: Lebesgue spaces impose strong restrictions on coefficient singularities, failing to cover cases like 1/|x| near the origin.
en.method: Singularity is described via Morrey spaces; mixed-norm parabolic Aleksandrov estimates, Harnack inequality, and Hölder continuity are employed.
en.result: Best-to-date conditions in Morrey spaces for existence and uniqueness of weak and strong solutions are given; corresponding PDE results (Aleksandrov maximum principle, Harnack inequality, Hölder continuity) are extended.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical foundation and recent advances for stochastic and parabolic equations with highly singular coefficients.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the Morrey space framework to fractional stochastic equations or nonlinear parabolic systems with singular drift.
idea_spark.risk: Morrey space conditions may be hard to verify and require high regularity of the diffusion matrix.
idea_spark.inspiration: Generalizing Aleksandrov estimates from PDEs inspires finer regularity theories for stochastic equations.

papers.title: On the shape of the positivity region for a free boundary problem describing cell polarization
papers.summary: In this paper we study a mass-constrained free boundary problem modeling cell polarization, in the regime where the mass is small. In the generic case of a signal with nondegenerate maxima, we prove that the solution converges locally to a global, integrable solution to an obstacle problem in the plane. We further show that the interface of the solution to the limit problem is an ellipse, the equation of which is explicit. We also study some cases where the signal has degenerate maxima, highlighting a variety of possible behaviors.

ai.tldr: 研究细胞极化自由边界问题在小质量下的形状，证明极限问题的界面是椭圆。
ai.motivation: 理解细胞极化过程中质量小的情况下界面的几何形状。
ai.method: 通过渐近分析和障碍问题方法，研究信号非退化极大值情形。
ai.result: 极限问题的界面是显式椭圆，并讨论了退化极大值时的多种行为。
ai.help_to_user: 提供细胞极化自由边界问题在小质量下的精确几何描述。

idea_spark.idea: 将细胞极化建模为质量约束自由边界问题，并利用障碍问题求解。
idea_spark.risk: 退化极大值情形行为复杂，可能缺乏统一几何描述。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从细胞极化问题中抽象出自由边界与障碍问题的联系。

en.tldr: Studies the shape of the positivity region in a free boundary problem for cell polarization under small mass, proving the limit interface is an ellipse.
en.motivation: To understand the geometric shape of the interface in cell polarization when mass is small.
en.method: Asymptotic analysis and obstacle problem approach for nondegenerate signal maxima.
en.result: The limit interface is an explicit ellipse; degenerate maxima lead to diverse behaviors.
en.help_to_user: Provides an exact geometric description of the free boundary in cell polarization under small mass.

idea_spark.idea: Model cell polarization as a mass-constrained free boundary problem solved via obstacle problem.
idea_spark.risk: Degenerate maxima cases may lack a unified geometric description.
idea_spark.inspiration: Abstract the connection between free boundary problems and obstacle problems from cell polarization.

papers.title: Berry-Esseen bounds for multivariate martingale difference sequences in the Kolmogorov distance
papers.summary: We derive new Gaussian approximation for finite martingale difference sequences in $\mathbb{R}^d$ with respect to the Kolmogorov distance. Under appropriate conditions, our bounds exhibit a dependence of order $n^{-1/4}$ on the length of the sequence and of order $\mathrm{polylog}(d)$ on the dimension. As an application, we derive a high-dimensional Berry-Esseen bound over hyper-rectangles for martingale sequences generated from Markov chains.

ai.tldr: 针对有限鞅差序列，在Kolmogorov距离下推导了新的高斯近似界，序列长度依赖为n^{-1/4}，维度依赖为polylog(d)，并应用于马尔可夫链生成的高维鞅序列。
ai.motivation: 现有鞅差序列的高斯近似界在维度较高时不够紧，需要更优的维度依赖关系。
ai.method: 利用Kolmogorov距离和鞅差序列的结构，结合概率不等式和截断技术，得到显式误差界。
ai.result: 得到了序列长度n^{-1/4}和维度polylog(d)的Berry-Esseen界，并在超矩形上给出了高维版本。
ai.help_to_user: 为高维时间序列或马尔可夫链的统计推断提供了理论保证，可用于置信区间和假设检验。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将Kolmogorov距离下的界推广到其他距离（如Wasserstein距离），或用于非参数统计。
idea_spark.risk: 理论界可能依赖于较强的矩条件或混合条件，实际数据中未必满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合鞅差序列的局部依赖性和高维稀疏性，可能设计更高效的算法或更紧的界。

idea_spark.risk: 理论界可能依赖于较强的矩条件或混合条件，实际数据中未必满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合鞅差序列的局部依赖性和高维稀疏性，可能设计更高效的算法或更紧的界。

en.tldr: New Gaussian approximation bounds for finite martingale difference sequences in Kolmogorov distance, with n^{-1/4} dependence on sequence length and polylog(d) on dimension, applied to Markov chain generated sequences.
en.motivation: Existing Gaussian approximation bounds for martingale difference sequences are not tight in high dimensions; better dimension dependence is needed.
en.method: Leverages Kolmogorov distance and martingale structure, combined with probability inequalities and truncation techniques, to derive explicit error bounds.
en.result: Obtained Berry-Esseen bounds of order n^{-1/4} in sequence length and polylog(d) in dimension, with a high-dimensional version over hyper-rectangles.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical guarantees for statistical inference on high-dimensional time series or Markov chains, useful for confidence intervals and hypothesis testing.

idea_spark.idea: Try to extend the Kolmogorov distance bounds to other distances (e.g., Wasserstein) or apply to nonparametric statistics.
idea_spark.risk: The theoretical bounds may rely on strong moment or mixing conditions that are not satisfied in real data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining local dependence of martingale sequences with high-dimensional sparsity may lead to more efficient algorithms or tighter bounds.

papers.title: Dimer models on astroidal zig-zag graphs
papers.summary: On a finite weighted graph, the dimer model is a probability measure on its dimer covers, that assigns to any cover a probability proportional to the product of the weights of its edges. For planar bipartite graphs, dimer correlations are encoded by the inverse of the so-called Kasteleyn matrix; for a large graph, typically taken as a finite domain in a periodic graph, this inverse matrix is known explicitly only for a handful of examples. In all previously known examples, the Newton polygon -- a convex lattice polygon that classifies periodic graphs up to local moves -- is either a triangle or a quadrilateral.   Our main results are the following.   For any (minimal) periodic planar bipartite graph, we construct an $(n-3)$-dimensional family of finite subgraphs for which we obtain an explicit inverse Kasteleyn matrix; here $n$ is the number of sides of the Newton polygon. Their boundaries are formed by zig-zag paths and their overall shape is reminiscent of an astroid; we call them astroidal zig-zag graphs (AZ graphs). If the Newton polygon is the unit square then the corresponding AZ graph is the celebrated Aztec diamond with its size as the parameter.   Our inverse Kasteleyn matrices are given by a double contour integral on the corresponding spectral curve for any Fock weighting of the graph. This includes, in particular, all periodic weightings.   For periodic weightings, we asymptotically analyze the resulting inverse Kasteleyn matrices. We establish a phase separation in large AZ graphs into asymptotically frozen, rough (liquid), and smooth (gaseous) regions, and obtain an explicit parametrization of the `arctic curve'.   We also compute the deterministic limit of the height function, known as the limit shape, and prove the convergence of the local dimer correlations to the translation-invariant Gibbs measure of the slope predicted by the limit shape.

ai.tldr: 本文对星形锯齿图上的二聚体模型进行了研究，给出了任意周期平面二部图的一类有限子图的显式逆Kasteleyn矩阵，并分析了周期权重下的渐近行为，包括相分离和极限形状。
ai.motivation: 对于大周期平面二部图上的二聚体模型，逆Kasteleyn矩阵的显式表达式仅在少数例子中已知，且这些例子的牛顿多边形均为三角形或四边形。本文旨在推广到任意边数的牛顿多边形。
ai.method: 构造了星形锯齿图（AZ图），其边界由锯齿路径构成，形状类似星形线。利用谱曲线上的双围道积分给出了任意Fock加权下的逆Kasteleyn矩阵。
ai.result: 得到了AZ图的显式逆Kasteleyn矩阵；对于周期加权，分析了渐近行为，揭示了冻结、粗糙（液体）和光滑（气体）区域的相分离，给出了北极曲线的显式参数化，并证明了高度函数的极限形状及局部关联收敛到平移不变吉布斯测度。
ai.help_to_user: 本文为二聚体模型提供了新的可解族，其逆Kasteleyn矩阵具有显式积分表示，有助于研究相变和极限形状。

idea_spark.idea: 利用AZ图的构造，可以探索牛顿多边形边数与相分离区域数之间的关系，或研究非周期权重下的类似现象。
idea_spark.risk: AZ图是特定子图族，其性质可能不适用于一般边界条件；谱曲线上的积分计算可能复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Aztec钻石的启发，将星形线形状与牛顿多边形边数联系起来，开辟了构造可解二聚体模型的新途径。

en.tldr: This paper studies dimer models on astroidal zig-zag graphs, providing explicit inverse Kasteleyn matrices for a family of finite subgraphs of any periodic planar bipartite graph, and analyzes asymptotic behavior under periodic weightings, including phase separation and limit shape.
en.motivation: Explicit inverse Kasteleyn matrices for large periodic planar bipartite dimer models were known only for a handful of examples whose Newton polygons are triangles or quadrilaterals. This work aims to generalize to Newton polygons with any number of sides.
en.method: Constructs astroidal zig-zag (AZ) graphs whose boundaries consist of zig-zag paths and whose shape resembles an astroid. The inverse Kasteleyn matrix is given by a double contour integral on the spectral curve for any Fock weighting.
en.result: Explicit inverse Kasteleyn matrices for AZ graphs; for periodic weightings, asymptotic analysis reveals phase separation into frozen, rough (liquid), and smooth (gaseous) regions, an explicit parametrization of the arctic curve, and convergence of the height function to a limit shape and local correlations to translation-invariant Gibbs measures.
en.help_to_user: This work provides a new solvable family of dimer models with explicit integral representation of the inverse Kasteleyn matrix, facilitating the study of phase transitions and limit shapes.

idea_spark.idea: Using the AZ graph construction, one can explore the relationship between the number of sides of the Newton polygon and the number of phase separation regions, or investigate similar phenomena under non-periodic weightings.
idea_spark.risk: AZ graphs are a specific family of subgraphs, and their properties may not hold for general boundary conditions; the spectral curve integrals may be computationally involved.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the Aztec diamond, the connection between astroid shape and Newton polygon side count opens new avenues for constructing solvable dimer models.

papers.title: Contact discontinuities for axisymmetric subsonic flows in three-dimensional infinitely long cylinders
papers.summary: We prove the existence of contact discontinuities for axisymmetric subsonic Euler flows with non-zero vorticity and non-zero angular momentum density in three-dimensional infinitely long cylinders. The problem is formulated as a two-phase free boundary problem in a cylinder of infinite length. We first solve the cut-off domain problem and take the limit. The cut-off domain problem is reformulated by using a Helmholtz decomposition method and solved via an iteration method. A sophisticated iteration scheme is devised to solve the two-phase free boundary problem.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了在三维无限长圆柱中，具有非零涡度和非零角动量密度的轴对称亚音速欧拉流存在接触间断。
ai.motivation: 研究轴对称亚音速流中接触间断的存在性，这是流体力学中一个重要的理论问题。
ai.method: 将问题表述为无限长圆柱中的两相自由边界问题，先求解截断区域问题，再取极限；截断区域问题通过亥姆霍兹分解和迭代方法求解。
ai.result: 成功证明了接触间断的存在性。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解亚音速流中接触间断的形成和性质提供了理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 将无限长区域问题转化为截断区域问题并取极限，是一种处理无限域问题的有效策略。
idea_spark.risk: 迭代方法的收敛性可能依赖于特定假设，需要严格验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将类似方法应用于其他轴对称流中的间断问题。

en.tldr: This paper proves the existence of contact discontinuities for axisymmetric subsonic Euler flows with non-zero vorticity and non-zero angular momentum density in three-dimensional infinitely long cylinders.
en.motivation: To investigate the existence of contact discontinuities in axisymmetric subsonic flows, a fundamental theoretical problem in fluid dynamics.
en.method: The problem is formulated as a two-phase free boundary problem in an infinite cylinder. The cut-off domain problem is first solved using Helmholtz decomposition and an iteration method, and then the limit is taken.
en.result: The existence of contact discontinuities is successfully established.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical foundation for understanding the formation and properties of contact discontinuities in subsonic flows.

idea_spark.idea: Transforming an infinite domain problem into a cut-off domain problem and taking the limit is an effective strategy for handling infinite domains.
idea_spark.risk: Convergence of the iteration method may depend on specific assumptions and requires rigorous verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying similar methods to discontinuity problems in other axisymmetric flows.

papers.title: Page Curve for Local-Operator Entanglement from Free Probability
papers.summary: The local-operator entanglement (LOE) measures the classical simulability of a Heisenberg operator and is conjectured to witness many-body chaos in locally interacting systems. Using tools from free probability, we analytically compute its value for Haar random dynamics for all Rényi indices. We find that it asymptotically reproduces the Page curve for random states in the case of traceless operators, with exponentially deviating corrections. In contrast to higher-order out-of-time ordered correlators, which depend on operator correlations via free cumulants, the leading-order LOE is independent of the initial operator. Guided by our Haar result, we therefore argue that the long-time value of the LOE entropies in chaotic systems will depend only on autocorrelation functions of the initial operator up to exponentially small corrections, suggesting that the higher-order structure of the full Eigenstate Thermalization Hypothesis is not necessary to describe it.

ai.tldr: 利用自由概率理论解析计算了Haar随机动力学下局域算子纠缠的Page曲线，发现其渐近重现随机态的Page曲线，且长时值仅依赖于初始算子的自关联函数。
ai.motivation: 局域算子纠缠（LOE）被推测为多体混沌的指标，但其解析计算困难，需要发展新方法。
ai.method: 采用自由概率工具，对Haar随机动力学下所有Rényi指标的LOE进行解析计算。
ai.result: 无迹算子的LOE渐近重现随机态的Page曲线，指数小修正偏离；长时值仅依赖初始算子的自关联函数，无需完整本征态热化假设。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解混沌系统中算子纠缠的普遍行为提供解析基准，简化了LOE的预测。

idea_spark.idea: 利用LOE对初始算子自关联的依赖性，设计数值方案高效模拟混沌系统。
idea_spark.risk: 解析结果基于Haar随机性，实际混沌系统可能偏离。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将自由概率与量子混沌结合，开辟算子纠缠的解析研究新路径。

en.tldr: Using free probability, we analytically compute the Page curve for local-operator entanglement under Haar random dynamics, finding it asymptotically matches that of random states, with long-time values depending only on autocorrelation functions.
en.motivation: Local-operator entanglement (LOE) is conjectured to witness many-body chaos, but analytic computation is challenging, requiring new methods.
en.method: We employ free probability tools to analytically compute LOE for all Rényi indices under Haar random dynamics.
en.result: For traceless operators, LOE asymptotically reproduces the Page curve of random states with exponentially small corrections; long-time values depend only on autocorrelation functions, not on full Eigenstate Thermalization Hypothesis.
en.help_to_user: Provides an analytic benchmark for operator entanglement in chaotic systems, simplifying predictions of LOE.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit LOE's dependence on autocorrelation functions to design efficient numerical simulations of chaotic systems.
idea_spark.risk: Analytic results rely on Haar randomness; actual chaotic systems may deviate.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining free probability with quantum chaos opens new analytic avenues for operator entanglement.

papers.title: Approximation of harmonic functions on metric measure spaces of controlled geometry via discrete graphs
papers.summary: Given a complete doubling metric measure space $X$ that supports a $2$-Poincaré inequality, we approximate harmonic functions on a bounded domain $Ω$ with a prescribed Newton-Sobolev boundary data. Our approach is based on the approximation of the underlying space $X$ by a family of graphs. This approximated harmonic function is realized as the weak limit of a sequence of functions obtained from the graph minimizers. We prove that such a function is a minimizer with respect to a nonlinear energy form on $N^{1,2}_0(Ω)$, which is in turn, majorized by the upper gradient energy on $N^{1,2}(X)$. This energy form on $N^{1,2}_0(Ω)$ is obtained as a $Γ$-limit of a sequence of induced energy forms projected from the discrete energy form on the approximating graphs.

ai.tldr: 在满足加倍测度和2-庞加莱不等式的度量测度空间上，通过离散图逼近有界区域上的调和函数。
ai.motivation: 在一般度量测度空间上，调和函数的数值逼近缺乏直接的离散化工具，图逼近提供了一种可行的途径。
ai.method: 用一族离散图近似底层空间X，通过图上的极小化问题得到函数序列，其弱极限即为逼近的调和函数。该极限是N^{1,2}_0(Ω)上非线性能量形式的极小元，该能量形式是图上离散能量形式的Γ-极限。
ai.result: 证明了逼近的调和函数是N^{1,2}_0(Ω)上某个非线性能量形式的极小元，且该能量被X上的上梯度能量所控制。
ai.help_to_user: 为度量测度空间上调和函数的数值计算提供了理论框架，可推广到更一般的几何和分析环境。

idea_spark.idea: 利用图上的离散能量Γ-收敛到连续能量，设计自适应网格或稀疏图以降低计算复杂度。
idea_spark.risk: 图的结构（如顶点选取、边权定义）对收敛性和逼近精度敏感，需要仔细设计。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将连续空间上的变分问题离散化为图上的优化问题，结合Γ-收敛理论保证解的一致性，启发其他非光滑区域上的数值方法。

en.tldr: On metric measure spaces with a doubling measure and a 2-Poincaré inequality, harmonic functions on a bounded domain are approximated via discrete graphs.
en.motivation: Numerical approximation of harmonic functions on general metric measure spaces lacks direct discretization tools; graph approximation offers a feasible route.
en.method: The underlying space X is approximated by a family of graphs. A sequence of functions obtained from graph minimizers converges weakly to the approximated harmonic function, which is a minimizer of a nonlinear energy form on N^{1,2}_0(Ω). This energy form is the Γ-limit of discrete energy forms on the approximating graphs.
en.result: The approximated harmonic function is shown to be a minimizer of a nonlinear energy on N^{1,2}_0(Ω), which is majorized by the upper gradient energy on N^{1,2}(X).
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework for numerical computation of harmonic functions on metric measure spaces, extendable to more general geometric and analytic settings.

idea_spark.idea: Use Γ-convergence of discrete graph energies to continuous energies to design adaptive meshes or sparse graphs that reduce computational cost.
idea_spark.risk: The choice of graph structure (vertex selection, edge weights) is sensitive and may affect convergence and approximation accuracy.
idea_spark.inspiration: Discretizing continuous variational problems as graph optimization problems, combined with Γ-convergence theory, inspires numerical methods on non-smooth domains.

papers.title: Scaling Limits of Bivariate Nearly-Unstable Hawkes Processes and Applications to Rough Volatility
papers.summary: We prove a functional limit theorem for a pair of nearly unstable Hawkes processes coupled through a triangular cross-excitation mechanism, when the two kernels have distinct heavy-tail exponents. This heterogeneous regime produces two different degrees of roughness and, to the best of our knowledge, had not previously been treated in the multivariate nearly unstable setting.   As the system approaches criticality, the renormalized intensity processes converge weakly to the unique solution of a coupled stochastic Volterra system driven by two independent Brownian motions. The first component evolves autonomously as a rough fractional diffusion, while the second is driven both by its own noise and by the first component through a convolution cross-kernel. This kernel, expressed as the convolution of the two associated Mittag-Leffler kernels, encodes both roughness exponents and distinguishes the limit from independent univariate limits or classical bivariate Brownian models.   We also derive a short-time decorrelation result showing that the functional correlation between the two limiting components vanishes at an explicit polynomial rate governed by the rougher component. Finally, we show that the scale-matching assumption is not structural: without it, the limiting cross-kernel is replaced by an explicitly time-rescaled convolution kernel. The proof combines kernel convergence, tightness, martingale identification via Rebolledo's theorem, and uniqueness for affine stochastic Volterra equations.

ai.tldr: 证明了一对通过三角交叉激励耦合的近不稳定霍克斯过程的泛函极限定理，其中两个核具有不同的重尾指数，导致两种不同的粗糙度。
ai.motivation: 多变量近不稳定霍克斯过程在异质重尾指数下的极限行为尚未被研究，这对理解粗糙波动率等应用至关重要。
ai.method: 结合核收敛、紧性、通过Rebolledo定理的鞅识别以及仿射随机Volterra方程的唯一性进行证明。
ai.result: 重整化强度过程弱收敛到耦合随机Volterra系统的唯一解，第一分量自主演化为粗糙分数扩散，第二分量受自身噪声和第一分量通过卷积核驱动；短时去相关以显式多项式速率消失。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了异质重尾指数下近不稳定霍克斯过程极限行为的严格数学框架，可用于粗糙波动率建模。

idea_spark.idea: 利用卷积核编码不同粗糙度指数，设计新的多尺度波动率模型。
idea_spark.risk: 模型参数估计可能复杂，且极限定理的收敛速度在实际应用中需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从异质重尾指数产生不同粗糙度的机制出发，启发构建更灵活的多因子随机波动率模型。

zh.tldr: 证明了一对通过三角交叉激励耦合的近不稳定霍克斯过程的泛函极限定理，其中两个核具有不同的重尾指数，导致两种不同的粗糙度。
zh.motivation: 多变量近不稳定霍克斯过程在异质重尾指数下的极限行为尚未被研究，这对理解粗糙波动率等应用至关重要。
zh.method: 结合核收敛、紧性、通过Rebolledo定理的鞅识别以及仿射随机Volterra方程的唯一性进行证明。
zh.result: 重整化强度过程弱收敛到耦合随机Volterra系统的唯一解，第一分量自主演化为粗糙分数扩散，第二分量受自身噪声和第一分量通过卷积核驱动；短时去相关以显式多项式速率消失。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了异质重尾指数下近不稳定霍克斯过程极限行为的严格数学框架，可用于粗糙波动率建模。

en.tldr: Proves a functional limit theorem for a pair of nearly unstable Hawkes processes coupled through triangular cross-excitation, with two kernels having distinct heavy-tail exponents, leading to two different degrees of roughness.
en.motivation: The multivariate nearly unstable setting with heterogeneous heavy-tail exponents had not been treated before, which is crucial for applications like rough volatility.
en.method: Combines kernel convergence, tightness, martingale identification via Rebolledo's theorem, and uniqueness for affine stochastic Volterra equations.
en.result: Renormalized intensity processes converge weakly to the unique solution of a coupled stochastic Volterra system; the first component evolves as a rough fractional diffusion, the second is driven by its own noise and the first via a convolution kernel; short-time decorrelation vanishes at an explicit polynomial rate.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for the limit behavior of nearly unstable Hawkes processes with heterogeneous heavy-tail exponents, useful for rough volatility modeling.

idea_spark.idea: Use convolution kernels encoding different roughness exponents to design new multiscale volatility models.
idea_spark.risk: Parameter estimation may be complex, and convergence rates in the limit theorem need validation in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: The mechanism of different roughness from heterogeneous heavy-tail exponents inspires building more flexible multi-factor stochastic volatility models.

papers.title: On the partition function of a class of Mallows model
papers.summary: Let $\Sym{n}$ denote the set of all permutations on $n$ labels. Let $c:[0, 1]^2\to [0, \infty)$ be a twice continuously differentiable function. A subfamily of the Mallows model is the Gibbs probability measures on $\Sym{n}$ such that $\mathbb{P}(X=σ)=L_n^{-1} \prod_{i=1}^{n}\exp(-c(i/n, σ(i)/n))$. Mukherjee [Ann. Stat., Vol. 44(2), pp 853--875 (2016)] computed the limit of the log partition function and showed that $\lim_{n\to \infty}\frac{1}{n}\log L_n=-Γ_0$ where $Γ_0$ is the optimal cost associated with an entropy regularized optimal transport problem. In the KRP Memorial Volume of the Indian Journal of Pure and Applied Math, Pal conjectured an exact value for the limit $\lim_{n\to \infty} e^{-nΓ_0}L_n$ in terms of the Fredholm determinant of an integral operator and provided a partial proof. We give a complete proof of Pal's conjecture.

ai.tldr: 本文完整证明了Pal关于一类Mallows模型配分函数极限的猜想，该极限由熵正则化最优传输问题的Fredholm行列式给出。
ai.motivation: Mallows模型是排列上的重要概率模型，其配分函数的渐近行为与最优传输理论紧密相关。Pal提出了一个关于配分函数极限的猜想，但仅给出部分证明，本文旨在提供完整证明。
ai.method: 利用熵正则化最优传输问题的对偶理论和Fredholm行列式的解析性质，通过精细的渐近分析完成证明。
ai.result: 完整证明了Pal猜想：lim_{n→∞} e^{-nΓ_0} L_n 等于某个积分算子的Fredholm行列式。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解Mallows模型配分函数的精确渐近行为，以及熵正则化最优传输与排列统计力学之间的联系。

idea_spark.idea: 探索更一般的Gibbs测度族，其中代价函数c依赖于多个参数，并研究其配分函数的Fredholm行列式表示。
idea_spark.risk: Fredholm行列式的计算可能非常复杂，且对于非光滑代价函数可能不适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将熵正则化最优传输中的Sinkhorn算法与排列模型的配分函数计算相结合，可能发展出新的数值方法。

zh.tldr: 本文完整证明了Pal关于一类Mallows模型配分函数极限的猜想，该极限由熵正则化最优传输问题的Fredholm行列式给出。

en.tldr: This paper provides a complete proof of Pal's conjecture on the limit of the partition function for a class of Mallows models, expressed in terms of the Fredholm determinant of an integral operator arising from entropy-regularized optimal transport.
en.motivation: The Mallows model is a key probability model on permutations, and the asymptotic behavior of its partition function is closely related to optimal transport theory. Pal conjectured an exact limit but only gave a partial proof; this work aims to complete it.
en.method: The proof uses duality theory of entropy-regularized optimal transport and analytic properties of Fredholm determinants, combined with refined asymptotic analysis.
en.result: Pal's conjecture is fully proved: lim_{n→∞} e^{-nΓ_0} L_n equals the Fredholm determinant of a certain integral operator.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the exact asymptotic behavior of the partition function for Mallows models and the connection between entropy-regularized optimal transport and permutation statistical mechanics.

idea_spark.idea: Explore more general Gibbs measures where the cost function c depends on multiple parameters, and study the Fredholm determinant representation of their partition functions.
idea_spark.risk: Fredholm determinants can be computationally challenging and may not apply to non-smooth cost functions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine the Sinkhorn algorithm from entropy-regularized optimal transport with partition function computation for permutation models to develop new numerical methods.

papers.title: Late-time tails for linear waves on radially symmetric stationary spacetimes of two space dimensions
papers.summary: We show that the leading-order term in the late-time asymptotics of solutions to the linear wave equation on radially symmetric stationary perturbations of $(2 + 1)$-dimensional Minkowski space is proportional to $u^{-1/2}v^{-1/2}$ (which solves the wave equation on Minkowski space), where $u$ and $v$ are double null coordinates. Our proof adapts the physical space techniques in the work of Gajic (arXiv:2203.15838) on the wave equation with an inverse-square potential on the Schwarzschild spacetime. In particular, we extend the $r^p$-weighted energy estimates of Dafermos--Rodnianski (arXiv:0910.4957) to two space dimensions.

ai.tldr: 证明了二维闵可夫斯基时空的径向对称稳态扰动上线性波动方程解的晚期渐近行为。
ai.motivation: 研究二维时空背景下线性波的晚期衰减行为，填补该领域理论空白。
ai.method: 采用物理空间技术，将Gajic关于Schwarzschild时空逆平方势波动方程的方法推广到二维，并扩展Dafermos-Rodnianski的r^p加权能量估计。
ai.result: 晚期渐近主项正比于u^{-1/2}v^{-1/2}，其中u、v为双零坐标。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解二维弯曲时空中的波传播提供精确的渐近公式。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将类似技术用于非线性波动方程或带耗散项的波动系统。
idea_spark.risk: 二维时空的奇异性处理可能比三维更复杂，需小心验证估计的紧性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从高维已知结果向低维推广时，注意维数导致的指数变化和能量衰减速率差异。

zh.tldr: 证明了二维闵可夫斯基时空的径向对称稳态扰动上线性波动方程解的晚期渐近行为。
zh.motivation: 研究二维时空背景下线性波的晚期衰减行为，填补该领域理论空白。

en.tldr: We show that the leading-order late-time asymptotics of solutions to the linear wave equation on radially symmetric stationary perturbations of (2+1)-dimensional Minkowski space is proportional to u^{-1/2}v^{-1/2}.
en.motivation: To understand the late-time decay of linear waves in two-dimensional curved spacetimes, extending known results from higher dimensions.
en.method: Adapt physical-space techniques from Gajic's work on the wave equation with an inverse-square potential on Schwarzschild, and extend the r^p-weighted energy estimates of Dafermos–Rodnianski to two space dimensions.
en.result: The leading-order late-time tail is proportional to u^{-1/2}v^{-1/2} in double null coordinates.
en.help_to_user: Provides an explicit asymptotic formula for wave propagation in two-dimensional stationary spacetimes.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the method to nonlinear wave equations or systems with damping in two dimensions.
idea_spark.risk: Handling singularities in two dimensions may be more delicate; careful verification of estimate compactness is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: When generalizing results from higher to lower dimensions, pay attention to changes in exponents and energy decay rates due to dimensionality.

papers.title: Global exponential stabilization of a force- and torque-actuated unicycle by flexible-step MPC
papers.summary: We study the problem of global exponential stabilization of a force- and torque-controlled unicycle model in discrete time. To this end, we extend a recently introduced approach to model predictive control (MPC) in which a flexible number of inputs is implemented in every iteration. We present the first flexible-step MPC protocol with state-dependent weights for average descent. Notably, the proposed method relies neither on a suitable design of running or terminal cost functions nor on a suitable choice of terminal constraints. Instead, stability is guaranteed through a generalized discrete-time control Lyapunov function. We establish a new theoretical framework for global exponential stabilization of general nonlinear discrete-time control systems by flexible-step MPC. The obtained results go beyond the unicycle example. However, given the importance of the unicycle dynamics, we make that a focal point of our work. For the particular case of the dynamic (second-order) unicycle model, we show that global exponential stability cannot be attained in the classical sense, but in a slightly weaker sense. The proposed flexible-step MPC method is shown to induce the best possible notion of global exponential stability for this model. We provide explicit rules for the choice of parameters, which guarantee feasibility and global exponential stability. Our numerical simulations show that the discrete MPC method also works very well in applications to a continuous-time torque-actuated unicycle.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种灵活步长模型预测控制方法，实现了力和力矩驱动独轮车模型的全局指数镇定。
ai.motivation: 现有MPC方法依赖终端代价或约束，且难以实现全局指数镇定。
ai.method: 采用状态依赖权重的灵活步长MPC协议，结合广义离散时间控制Lyapunov函数保证稳定性。
ai.result: 首次证明灵活步长MPC可实现非线性离散系统的全局指数镇定，对动态独轮车模型达到最佳可能意义下的指数稳定性。
ai.help_to_user: 为非线性系统提供一种无需终端设计的MPC镇定框架，简化控制器设计。

idea_spark.idea: 将控制Lyapunov函数直接嵌入MPC优化，替代传统终端约束。
idea_spark.risk: 状态依赖权重可能增加在线计算负担，且理论分析对非光滑系统可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从离散时间控制Lyapunov函数出发，重新思考MPC稳定性保证的充分条件。

en.tldr: A flexible-step MPC method is proposed to achieve global exponential stabilization of a force- and torque-actuated unicycle model.
en.motivation: Existing MPC methods rely on terminal costs or constraints and struggle to achieve global exponential stabilization.
en.method: A flexible-step MPC protocol with state-dependent weights is introduced, using a generalized discrete-time control Lyapunov function to guarantee stability.
en.result: It is shown for the first time that flexible-step MPC can globally exponentially stabilize general nonlinear discrete-time systems, achieving the best possible notion of exponential stability for the dynamic unicycle model.
en.help_to_user: Provides an MPC stabilization framework without terminal design, simplifying controller synthesis for nonlinear systems.

idea_spark.idea: Embedding a control Lyapunov function directly into the MPC optimization replaces traditional terminal constraints.
idea_spark.risk: State-dependent weights may increase online computational load, and theoretical analysis may fail for non-smooth systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Rethinking sufficient conditions for MPC stability from the perspective of discrete-time control Lyapunov functions.

papers.title: FluxFlow: Conservative Flow-Matching for Astronomical Image Super-Resolution
papers.summary: Ground-to-space astronomical super-resolution requires recovering space-quality images from ground-based observations that are simultaneously limited by pixel sampling resolution and atmospheric seeing, which imposes a stochastic, spatially varying PSF that cannot be resolved through upsampling alone. Existing methods rely on synthetic training pairs that fail to capture real atmospheric statistics and are prone to either over-smoothed reconstructions or hallucination sources with no physical counterpart in the observed sky. We propose FluxFlow, a conservative pixel-space flow-matching framework that incorporates observation uncertainty and source-region importance weights during training, and a training-free Wiener-regularized test-time correction to suppress hallucination sources while preserving recovered detail. We further construct the DESI--HST Dataset, the large-scale real-world benchmark comprising 19,500 real co-registered ground-to-space image pairs with real atmospheric PSF variation. Experiments demonstrate that FluxFlow consistently outperforms existing baseline methods in both photometric and scientific accuracy.

ai.tldr: 提出FluxFlow，一种保守的像素空间流匹配框架，用于地面到空间的天文图像超分辨率，结合观测不确定性和源区域重要性权重，以及无训练的维纳正则化测试时校正，在DESI-HST真实数据集上优于现有方法。
ai.motivation: 现有地面到空间的天文超分辨率方法依赖合成训练对，无法捕捉真实大气统计特性，且容易产生过度平滑或幻觉源。
ai.method: 采用保守的像素空间流匹配框架，训练时融入观测不确定性和源区域重要性权重，测试时使用无训练的维纳正则化校正抑制幻觉源。
ai.result: 在包含19500对真实共配准地面-空间图像的DESI-HST数据集上，FluxFlow在光度精度和科学准确性上均优于现有基线方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用流匹配和不确定性信息实现更可靠的天文图像超分辨率重建。

idea_spark.idea: 将观测不确定性作为训练信号，结合无训练正则化校正，可推广到其他物理约束的图像复原问题。
idea_spark.risk: 框架依赖真实共配准数据对，获取难度大；流匹配模型计算成本较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从大气点扩散函数的随机性出发，启发将物理不确定性显式建模到生成模型中。

en.tldr: Proposes FluxFlow, a conservative pixel-space flow-matching framework for ground-to-space astronomical image super-resolution, incorporating observation uncertainty and source-region importance weights during training, plus a training-free Wiener-regularized test-time correction, outperforming existing methods on the real DESI-HST dataset.
en.motivation: Existing ground-to-space astronomical super-resolution methods rely on synthetic training pairs that fail to capture real atmospheric statistics and are prone to over-smoothing or hallucination sources.
en.method: Employs a conservative pixel-space flow-matching framework with observation uncertainty and source-region importance weights during training, and a training-free Wiener-regularized test-time correction to suppress hallucination sources.
en.result: On the DESI-HST dataset of 19,500 real co-registered ground-to-space image pairs, FluxFlow consistently outperforms baseline methods in both photometric and scientific accuracy.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage flow matching and uncertainty information for more reliable astronomical image super-resolution.

idea_spark.idea: Using observation uncertainty as a training signal combined with training-free regularized correction can be generalized to other physically constrained image restoration problems.
idea_spark.risk: The framework relies on real co-registered data pairs, which are difficult to obtain; flow matching models have high computational cost.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the stochastic nature of atmospheric point spread functions, it suggests explicitly modeling physical uncertainty in generative models.

papers.title: Learning Dominant States in Elementary Resource Constrained Shortest Path Problems
papers.summary: In this work, we investigate whether machine learning can be leveraged to identify promising states in dynamic programming algorithms, focusing on Elementary Resource Constrained Shortest Path Problems (ERCSPP). More in detail, we solved 41 single resource instances from SPPRCLIB using iterative relaxation techniques through the PathWyse library, systematically collecting all generated states (i.e. labels). We designed ad-hoc features computable in constant time and constructed two datasets: one containing all generated labels (G) and another with only those inserted into data pools (I), totaling several hundred million labels. Machine learning tools are then employed to explore these datasets, revealing significant patterns between successive relaxations. Leveraging these insights, we propose a normalization approach and apply supervised learning techniques to distinguish dominating states, both within subsequent relaxations of the same problem and in previously unseen instances. Our results demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach on Dataset G, while for Dataset I, performance varies, showing strong results within the same instance but declining for unseen ones. Overall, these findings open new perspectives for the development of data-driven dynamic programming algorithms.

ai.tldr: 研究机器学习能否识别动态规划中的主导状态，针对基本资源受限最短路径问题，通过监督学习在数据集G上取得良好效果。
ai.motivation: 动态规划算法中状态数量庞大，传统方法难以高效识别有希望的状态，机器学习有望提供数据驱动的解决方案。
ai.method: 使用PathWyse库求解41个单资源实例，收集所有生成的状态并设计常数时间特征，构建两个数据集（全部标签G和插入数据池的标签I），应用监督学习区分主导状态。
ai.result: 在数据集G上方法有效，在数据集I上同实例内表现良好，但跨实例泛化能力下降。
ai.help_to_user: 为开发数据驱动的动态规划算法提供新视角，帮助用户理解如何利用机器学习优化组合优化问题中的状态选择。

idea_spark.idea: 结合强化学习或图神经网络进一步捕捉状态间的结构关系，提升跨实例泛化能力。
idea_spark.risk: 特征设计可能过于简化，无法捕捉复杂状态依赖；数据集I的泛化失败表明模型可能过拟合特定实例模式。

zh.tldr: 研究机器学习能否识别动态规划中的主导状态，针对基本资源受限最短路径问题，通过监督学习在数据集G上取得良好效果。
zh.motivation: 动态规划算法中状态数量庞大，传统方法难以高效识别有希望的状态，机器学习有望提供数据驱动的解决方案。
zh.method: 使用PathWyse库求解41个单资源实例，收集所有生成的状态并设计常数时间特征，构建两个数据集（全部标签G和插入数据池的标签I），应用监督学习区分主导状态。

zh.help_to_user: 为开发数据驱动的动态规划算法提供新视角，帮助用户理解如何利用机器学习优化组合优化问题中的状态选择。

en.tldr: Investigates whether machine learning can identify dominant states in dynamic programming for Elementary Resource Constrained Shortest Path Problems, showing effectiveness on full label dataset but limited generalization on inserted labels.
en.motivation: Dynamic programming algorithms generate a huge number of states; traditional methods struggle to efficiently identify promising ones, and machine learning offers a data-driven alternative.
en.method: Solved 41 single-resource instances from SPPRCLIB using iterative relaxation in PathWyse, collected all states with constant-time features, built two datasets (all labels G and inserted labels I), and applied supervised learning to classify dominant states.
en.result: Effective on dataset G; on dataset I, strong within-instance performance but degraded on unseen instances.
en.help_to_user: Provides new perspectives for developing data-driven dynamic programming algorithms, helping users leverage machine learning to improve state selection in combinatorial optimization.

idea_spark.idea: Combine reinforcement learning or graph neural networks to capture structural state relationships and improve cross-instance generalization.
idea_spark.risk: Features may be too simplistic to capture complex dependencies; failure on dataset I suggests overfitting to instance-specific patterns.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the analogy between label setting in dynamic programming and binary classification in machine learning, framing state selection as a classification task.

papers.title: Quantum Loewner evolution in quantum natural time: phases and Markov properties
papers.summary: Quantum Loewner evolution (QLE)$(γ^2, η)$ is a family of growth processes in random environments, introduced by Miller and Sheffield (arXiv:1312.5745) as candidate scaling limits of growth processes (such as diffusion-limited aggregation) on random planar maps. The random environments are Liouville quantum gravity (LQG) surfaces with parameter $γ$, and the parameter $η$ plays a role analogous to that in dielectric breakdown models. Their construction applies to pairs $(γ^2, η)$ lying on a curve in parameter space, and the associated time parametrization is independent of the underlying LQG surface. In later work (arXiv:1507.00719), they defined a quantum natural time variant of QLE$(8/3, 0)$ whose time parametrization encodes a notion of distance in the LQG geometry, leading to the identification of $\sqrt{8/3}$-LQG with the Brownian map.   In this paper we construct quantum natural time QLE$(γ^2, η)$ for a different but overlapping subset of the same parameter curve. Its time parametrization conjecturally corresponds to the scaling limit of time parametrizations of discrete growth processes on random planar maps. We prove that it exhibits three phases, mirroring those of Schramm-Loewner evolution (SLE); this answers a question of Miller and Sheffield for quantum natural time QLE. Moreover, we establish stationarity of the unexplored surface and, in the relevant phases, identify the random surfaces cut out or swallowed by the process as quantum disks. Our construction builds on recent radial LQG-SLE coupling results of Ang and Yu (arXiv:2309.05176, arXiv:2411.19810).

ai.tldr: 本文构造了量子自然时间下的量子Loewner演化，证明了其三个相和马尔可夫性质，并识别了量子盘。
ai.motivation: 将量子自然时间QLE推广到更广泛的参数范围，并研究其相结构和马尔可夫性质。
ai.method: 基于Ang和Yu的径向LQG-SLE耦合结果，构造量子自然时间QLE并分析其性质。
ai.result: 证明了量子自然时间QLE存在三个相，类似于SLE；建立了未探索表面的平稳性，并在相关相中识别出量子盘。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了量子自然时间QLE的严格构造和相分类，有助于理解随机平面地图上的生长过程。

idea_spark.idea: 利用径向LQG-SLE耦合构造量子自然时间QLE，并证明其相结构。
idea_spark.risk: 构造依赖于特定参数曲线，可能不适用于所有参数。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将SLE的相分类思想应用于量子自然时间QLE，揭示其与LQG几何的深层联系。

en.tldr: This paper constructs quantum natural time QLE, proves its three phases and Markov properties, and identifies quantum disks.
en.motivation: To extend quantum natural time QLE to a broader parameter range and study its phase structure and Markov properties.
en.method: Based on recent radial LQG-SLE coupling results of Ang and Yu, construct quantum natural time QLE and analyze its properties.
en.result: Proved that quantum natural time QLE exhibits three phases analogous to SLE; established stationarity of the unexplored surface and identified quantum disks in relevant phases.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous construction and phase classification of quantum natural time QLE, aiding understanding of growth processes on random planar maps.

idea_spark.idea: Use radial LQG-SLE coupling to construct quantum natural time QLE and prove its phase structure.
idea_spark.risk: The construction relies on a specific parameter curve and may not apply to all parameters.
idea_spark.inspiration: Applying SLE phase classification ideas to quantum natural time QLE reveals deep connections with LQG geometry.

papers.title: Ball-proximal point method on a Hadamard Manifolds
papers.summary: We consider the problem of minimizing a proper, lower semicontinuous, geodesically convex function on a Hadamard manifold. Building on ball-proximal (broximal) ideas in the Euclidean setting, viewed as an abstract proximal-type algorithm, we propose and analyze a Riemannian ball-proximal point method (RB-PPM) whose basic step consists of minimizing the objective function over a metric ball centred at the current iterate. We first introduce the Riemannian broximal map, prove existence and uniqueness of broximal points on Hadamard manifolds, and derive a KKT-type characterization involving a scalar parameter and the Riemannian subdifferential. We then show that RB-PPM enjoys a strict decrease of the squared distance to the solution set whenever the current ball does not contain a minimizer. This leads to quasi-Fejér monotonicity, finite termination for constant radii, and a product-form linear decay of the objective values up to the hitting time of the solution set. We also obtain nonasymptotic complexity bounds for the norms of suitable subgradients and for the function values, including a linear rate in the number of iterations under constant radii. Finally, we establish an asymptotic dichotomy, if the sum of the radii diverges, then the objective values converge to the optimal value, and, when the solution set is nonempty, the entire sequence of iterates converges to a minimizer. The resulting scheme provides a geometry-aware, ball-based analog of classical Riemannian proximal point methods.

ai.tldr: 在Hadamard流形上提出并分析了一种基于度量球的近端点方法（RB-PPM），用于最小化真下半连续测地凸函数。
ai.motivation: 将欧氏空间中的球近端（broximal）思想推广到黎曼流形，以处理非光滑测地凸优化问题。
ai.method: 每一步在当前迭代点的度量球内最小化目标函数，利用黎曼broximal映射和KKT型最优性条件。
ai.result: 证明了到解集平方距离的严格下降、拟Fejér单调性、有限终止性、线性收敛率以及渐近二分性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种几何感知的、基于球的黎曼近端点算法，适用于流形上的非光滑凸优化。

idea_spark.idea: 将欧氏broximal方法的核心——在球内最小化——直接移植到黎曼流形，并利用流形几何性质（如测地凸性）保证收敛。
idea_spark.risk: 球半径的选择对收敛速度和终止性影响较大，且需要高效求解球内子问题。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从欧氏broximal方法的抽象形式出发，将其视为一种广义近端算法，从而自然地适配到黎曼设定。

en.tldr: Proposes and analyzes a Riemannian ball-proximal point method (RB-PPM) on Hadamard manifolds for minimizing proper lower semicontinuous geodesically convex functions.
en.motivation: Extend Euclidean ball-proximal (broximal) ideas to Riemannian manifolds to handle non-smooth geodesically convex optimization.
en.method: At each step, minimize the objective over a metric ball centered at the current iterate, using the Riemannian broximal map and KKT-type characterization.
en.result: Establishes strict decrease of squared distance to the solution set, quasi-Fejér monotonicity, finite termination, linear convergence rates, and an asymptotic dichotomy.
en.help_to_user: Provides a geometry-aware, ball-based analog of classical Riemannian proximal point methods for non-smooth convex optimization on manifolds.

idea_spark.idea: Directly transplant the core of Euclidean broximal methods—minimization within a ball—onto Riemannian manifolds, leveraging geodesic convexity for convergence.
idea_spark.risk: Choice of ball radius significantly affects convergence speed and termination; solving the ball-constrained subproblem efficiently may be challenging.
idea_spark.inspiration: Viewing Euclidean broximal methods as an abstract proximal-type algorithm naturally suggests a Riemannian generalization.

papers.title: Bundles of Probability Schemes
papers.summary: We study finite probability theory through a category of finite probability schemes and probability-preserving maps, called \emph{bundles}. A bundle simultaneously records a quotient of a sample space, an algebra of random variables, and the family of conditional schemes over the quotient. The two natural linear functors associated with a bundle give a compact construction of conditional expectation and explain its projection properties. From this point of view we recover the laws of total expectation, total variance, total covariance, the weak law of large numbers, and the variance decomposition behind simple linear regression. We also introduce fiber products of bundles and show that they encode conditional independence, sequential random experiments, and discrete-time Markov chains.

ai.tldr: 通过范畴论中的“束”概念统一研究有限概率方案，揭示条件期望的投影性质，并推导出多个经典概率定律。
ai.motivation: 为有限概率理论提供一种范畴论框架，统一处理样本空间商、随机变量代数和条件方案族。
ai.method: 定义概率方案和概率保持映射的范畴（束），利用两个线性函子构造条件期望并解释其投影性质。
ai.result: 恢复了总期望律、总方差律、总协方差律、弱大数律以及简单线性回归中的方差分解；引入束的纤维积，编码条件独立性、序贯随机实验和离散时间马尔可夫链。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解概率论中经典定律的范畴论基础，以及条件独立性和马尔可夫链的结构化表示。

idea_spark.idea: 利用束的纤维积统一描述条件独立性和序贯实验，可能推广到连续时间或无限状态空间。
idea_spark.risk: 范畴论抽象可能增加应用门槛，需要验证在具体统计问题中的实用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从范畴论视角重新审视概率论基本概念，启发新的数学结构发现。

en.tldr: A categorical framework of 'bundles' unifies finite probability schemes, revealing projection properties of conditional expectation and recovering classical probability laws.
en.motivation: To provide a categorical framework for finite probability theory that unifies quotient sample spaces, algebras of random variables, and families of conditional schemes.
en.method: Define a category of finite probability schemes and probability-preserving maps (bundles), using two linear functors to construct conditional expectation and explain its projection properties.
en.result: Recovers the laws of total expectation, total variance, total covariance, the weak law of large numbers, and variance decomposition in simple linear regression; introduces fiber products of bundles to encode conditional independence, sequential random experiments, and discrete-time Markov chains.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the categorical foundations of classical probability laws and the structured representation of conditional independence and Markov chains.

idea_spark.idea: Use fiber products of bundles to unify conditional independence and sequential experiments, potentially extending to continuous time or infinite state spaces.
idea_spark.risk: Categorical abstraction may increase the barrier to application; practical utility in specific statistical problems needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Revisiting fundamental probability concepts from a categorical perspective inspires discovery of new mathematical structures.

papers.title: Optimal Union Probability Interval Is NP-Hard
papers.summary: A problem dating back to Boole [Laws of Thought, Walton & Maberly,1854] is what can be computed about the probability of a finite union of events when given as input the probabilities of intersections of some of the events. The modern geometric study of the problem can be traced back to Hailperin [Amer. Math. Monthly 2 (1965) 343--359] who phrased the problem in the language of linear programming and generalized it to logical formulas of the events other than disjunction, heralding a substantial body of work in probabilistic logic [Nilsson, Artif.\ Intell.\ 28 (1986) 71--87], including the probabilistic satisfiability problem of Georgakopoulos, Kavvadis, and Papadimitriou [J.Complexity 4 (1988) 1--11], as well as fundamental connections to the geometry of metrics via cut and correlation polytopes [Deza and Laurent, Geometry of Cuts and Metrics, Springer, 1997] and to the study of marginal polytopes in graphical models of machine learning [Wainwright and Jordan, Found.\ Trends Mach.\ Learn. 1 (2008) 1--305]. This paper (i) describes the pertinent geometry of Boole's problem via coordinate projections of an elementary polytope arising essentially from Hailperin's linear program on the atoms of a Venn diagram, and (ii) shows that computing the optimal interval for the union probability is NP-hard, resolving an apparent gap in the literature highlighted by Pitowsky [Math.\ Programming 50 (1991) 395--414] and Boros et al. [Math.\ Oper.\ Res. 39 (2014) 1311--1329 and 51 (2026) 134--148].

ai.tldr: 本文证明计算事件并集概率的最优区间是NP难的，解决了概率逻辑中一个长期存在的理论空白。
ai.motivation: 自Boole以来，如何从部分事件交集概率推断并集概率的可行区间一直是一个基本问题，但最优区间的计算复杂性尚未明确。
ai.method: 通过Hailperin线性规划在Venn图原子上的坐标投影，将问题转化为多面体几何，并利用NP-hard归约证明。
ai.result: 证明了计算并集概率最优区间是NP难的，填补了文献中的空白。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解概率逻辑中区间计算的固有难度，避免在类似问题上追求多项式时间精确解。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将问题近似化，例如设计多项式时间近似算法或固定参数可解算法。
idea_spark.risk: 近似算法可能无法保证区间紧致性，且NP-hard性暗示精确解难以高效获得。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将概率逻辑问题与图论、度量几何中的已知NP-hard问题建立联系。

en.tldr: This paper proves that computing the optimal interval for the probability of a union of events is NP-hard, resolving a long-standing theoretical gap in probabilistic logic.
en.motivation: Since Boole, inferring feasible intervals for union probabilities from partial intersection probabilities has been fundamental, but the computational complexity of optimal intervals remained open.
en.method: By projecting Hailperin's linear program onto Venn diagram atoms, the problem is cast as polytope geometry, and NP-hardness is established via reduction.
en.result: It is shown that computing the optimal union probability interval is NP-hard, filling a gap in the literature.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the inherent difficulty of interval computation in probabilistic logic, discouraging pursuit of polynomial-time exact solutions.

idea_spark.idea: Consider approximation algorithms or fixed-parameter tractable approaches for the problem.
idea_spark.risk: Approximation may lose interval tightness, and NP-hardness suggests exact solutions are unlikely to be efficient.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires linking probabilistic logic problems to known NP-hard problems in graph theory and metric geometry.

papers.title: Closing the gap: Maz'ya-Shaposhnikova and asymptotics of fractional perimeters
papers.summary: We prove a generalization of the Maz'ya-Shaposhnikova formula in the case $p=2$ for functions that may not belong to ${L^2}(\mathbb{R}^d)$ and, thus, might not vanish at infinity. By introducing a notion of mass at infinity, we explicitly characterize the limit as $s\to0^+$ of Gagliardo seminorms localized on a bounded Lipschitz domain $Ω$. By `localized', we mean here that we account only for interactions involving at least one point in $Ω$. The identified limiting functional provides a unifying framework to link the classical Maz'ya-Shaposhnikova formula and the asymptotics of nonlocal perimeters. On the one hand, it reduces to the classical $L^2$ norm for functions that are globally integrable on $\mathbb{R}^d$. On the other hand, it recovers the pointwise limit of $s$-fractional perimeters when evaluated on characteristic functions of sets. We further show that the same functional encodes the asymptotic behavior of Gagliardo seminorms in the sense of Gamma-convergence with respect to the weak-$L^2$ topology. Finally, we provide an extension to the setting of metric measure spaces.

ai.tldr: 本文推广了Maz'ya-Shaposhnikova公式，针对可能不属于L²(ℝᵈ)的函数，通过引入“无穷远质量”概念，刻画了有界Lipschitz区域上Gagliardo半范数在s→0⁺时的极限，统一了经典公式与非局部周长渐近行为。
ai.motivation: 经典Maz'ya-Shaposhnikova公式要求函数在无穷远处消失，限制了其应用。本文旨在消除这一限制，并建立与非局部周长渐近的联系。
ai.method: 定义局部化Gagliardo半范数（仅考虑涉及Ω内至少一点的相互作用），引入无穷远质量概念，证明极限泛函的存在性，并进一步在Gamma收敛意义下分析渐近行为。
ai.result: 得到了一个统一的极限泛函：对全局可积函数退化为经典L²范数，对特征函数恢复s-周长点态极限；同时该泛函编码了弱L²拓扑下Gamma收敛的渐近行为。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解分数阶Sobolev空间在s→0⁺时的极限行为，以及非局部周长与经典公式之间的桥梁。

idea_spark.idea: 将局部化Gagliardo半范数的极限泛函用于设计新的非局部正则化项，处理边界或无穷远行为。
idea_spark.risk: 极限泛函的显式形式可能依赖于区域几何，通用性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从非局部周长渐近出发，启发对分数阶Laplacian在紧支集函数上的极限研究。

zh.tldr: 本文推广了Maz'ya-Shaposhnikova公式，针对可能不属于L²(ℝᵈ)的函数，通过引入“无穷远质量”概念，刻画了有界Lipschitz区域上Gagliardo半范数在s→0⁺时的极限，统一了经典公式与非局部周长渐近行为。
zh.motivation: 经典Maz'ya-Shaposhnikova公式要求函数在无穷远处消失，限制了其应用。本文旨在消除这一限制，并建立与非局部周长渐近的联系。
zh.method: 定义局部化Gagliardo半范数（仅考虑涉及Ω内至少一点的相互作用），引入无穷远质量概念，证明极限泛函的存在性，并进一步在Gamma收敛意义下分析渐近行为。
zh.result: 得到了一个统一的极限泛函：对全局可积函数退化为经典L²范数，对特征函数恢复s-周长点态极限；同时该泛函编码了弱L²拓扑下Gamma收敛的渐近行为。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解分数阶Sobolev空间在s→0⁺时的极限行为，以及非局部周长与经典公式之间的桥梁。

en.tldr: This paper generalizes the Maz'ya-Shaposhnikova formula for functions not necessarily in L²(ℝᵈ) by introducing a notion of mass at infinity, characterizing the limit as s→0⁺ of localized Gagliardo seminorms on a bounded Lipschitz domain, and unifying the classical formula with asymptotics of nonlocal perimeters.
en.motivation: The classical Maz'ya-Shaposhnikova formula requires functions to vanish at infinity, limiting its applicability. This work removes that restriction and bridges the gap with nonlocal perimeter asymptotics.
en.method: Define localized Gagliardo seminorms (counting only interactions involving at least one point in Ω), introduce mass at infinity, prove existence of the limiting functional, and analyze asymptotic behavior in the sense of Gamma-convergence.
en.result: A unified limiting functional is obtained: it reduces to the classical L² norm for globally integrable functions, recovers the pointwise limit of s-perimeters for characteristic functions, and encodes the Gamma-convergence asymptotics under weak-L² topology.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the limit behavior of fractional Sobolev seminorms as s→0⁺ and the connection between nonlocal perimeters and classical formulas.

idea_spark.idea: Use the limiting functional of localized Gagliardo seminorms to design new nonlocal regularization terms that handle boundary or infinity behavior.
idea_spark.risk: The explicit form of the limiting functional may depend on domain geometry, requiring further validation of generality.
idea_spark.inspiration: The asymptotics of nonlocal perimeters inspire the study of limits of fractional Laplacians on compactly supported functions.

papers.title: Logical Consistency as a Bridge: Improving LLM Hallucination Detection via Label Constraint Modeling between Responses and Self-Judgments
papers.summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are prone to factual hallucinations, risking their reliability in real-world applications. Existing hallucination detectors mainly extract micro-level intrinsic patterns for uncertainty quantification or elicit macro-level self-judgments through verbalized prompts. However, these methods address only a single facet of the hallucination, focusing either on implicit neural uncertainty or explicit symbolic reasoning, thereby treating these inherently coupled behaviors in isolation and failing to exploit their interdependence for a holistic view. In this paper, we propose LaaB (Logical Consistency-as-a-Bridge), a framework that bridges neural features and symbolic judgments for hallucination detection. LaaB introduces a "meta-judgment" process to map symbolic labels back into the feature space. By leveraging the inherent logical bridge where response and meta-judgment labels are either the same or opposite based on the self-judgment's semantics, LaaB aligns and integrates dual-view signals via mutual learning and enhances the hallucination detection. Extensive experiments on 4 public datasets, across 4 LLMs, against 8 baselines demonstrate the superiority of LaaB.

ai.tldr: 提出LaaB框架，通过逻辑一致性桥接神经特征与符号判断，利用响应与元判断标签的约束关系进行互学习，提升大模型幻觉检测。
ai.motivation: 现有幻觉检测方法仅关注单一层面（隐式神经不确定性或显式符号推理），未能利用两者耦合关系实现整体视角。
ai.method: 引入元判断过程将符号标签映射回特征空间，利用响应与元判断标签的逻辑一致性（相同或相反）进行对齐与互学习。
ai.result: 在4个数据集、4种大模型、8个基线上的实验表明LaaB优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户更可靠地检测大模型生成内容中的事实性幻觉，提升应用安全性。

idea_spark.idea: 可探索将元判断过程扩展到多轮对话或长文本生成场景，动态调整约束权重。
idea_spark.risk: 元判断过程可能引入额外计算开销，且逻辑一致性假设在复杂语义下可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类自我反思中逻辑一致性检查的启发，将内在不确定性外显化并与外在判断对齐。

en.tldr: Proposes LaaB, a framework that bridges neural features and symbolic judgments via logical consistency, leveraging label constraints between responses and meta-judgments for mutual learning to improve LLM hallucination detection.
en.motivation: Existing hallucination detectors focus on a single facet (implicit neural uncertainty or explicit symbolic reasoning), failing to exploit their interdependence for a holistic view.
en.method: Introduces a meta-judgment process to map symbolic labels back into the feature space, aligning and integrating dual-view signals via mutual learning based on the logical consistency (same or opposite) between response and meta-judgment labels.
en.result: Extensive experiments on 4 datasets, across 4 LLMs, against 8 baselines demonstrate the superiority of LaaB.
en.help_to_user: Helps users more reliably detect factual hallucinations in LLM-generated content, enhancing application safety.

idea_spark.idea: Explore extending the meta-judgment process to multi-turn dialogues or long-text generation, dynamically adjusting constraint weights.
idea_spark.risk: The meta-judgment process may introduce additional computational overhead, and the logical consistency assumption may fail in complex semantics.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human self-reflection's logical consistency checking, externalizing internal uncertainty and aligning it with external judgments.

papers.title: Uniform-in-time quantitative fluctuations of large scale interacting particle systems
papers.summary: We study fluctuations of mean-field interacting particle systems around their McKean--Vlasov limit. Our main result provides a uniform-in-time quantitative central limit theorem for the fluctuation process, with convergence rate of order $N^{-1/2}$ to the corresponding Gaussian limit in the Wasserstein metric. The proof relies on two main ingredients. First, we establish a uniform-in-time weak expansion for specific functionals of the empirical measure around their limiting behavior. This yields, in particular, uniform-in-time control of the convergence of the prelimit variance to its limiting counterpart. We also derive a backward PDE representation of the limiting variance, which is of independent interest. Second, we use Malliavin calculus tools and, in particular, a second-order Poincaré inequality that bounds the Wasserstein distance between the fluctuation process and its Gaussian limit in terms of the first- and second-order Malliavin derivatives of the particle flow. The quantitative convergence rates then follow from a delicate analysis of these derivatives, yielding the sharp estimates required for uniform-in-time control.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了平均场相互作用粒子系统围绕其McKean-Vlasov极限的波动过程具有一致时间上的定量中心极限定理，收敛速度为N^{-1/2}（Wasserstein度量）。
ai.motivation: 为大规模相互作用粒子系统的波动提供严格的时间一致定量估计，填补现有理论在长时间尺度上的空白。
ai.method: 结合一致时间弱展开与Malliavin微积分中的二阶Poincaré不等式，通过分析粒子流的一阶和二阶Malliavin导数获得收敛速率。
ai.result: 波动过程以N^{-1/2}速率在Wasserstein距离下收敛到高斯极限，且该估计对时间一致成立；同时导出了极限方差的向后PDE表示。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解大规模粒子系统在长时间内的统计行为，为模拟和推断提供理论保证。

idea_spark.idea: 将二阶Poincaré不等式与向后PDE结合，或许能用于量化随机梯度下降中参数波动的收敛性。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于粒子系统的可微性和Malliavin可微性，对非光滑或离散系统可能不适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受统计物理中涨落-耗散定理启发，将宏观方差与微观导数联系起来。

zh.motivation: 为大规模相互作用粒子系统的波动提供严格的时间一致定量估计，填补现有理论在长时间尺度上的空白。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受统计物理中涨落-耗散定理启发，将宏观方差与微观导数联系起来。

en.tldr: This paper proves a uniform-in-time quantitative central limit theorem for fluctuations of mean-field interacting particle systems around their McKean-Vlasov limit, with convergence rate N^{-1/2} in the Wasserstein metric.
en.motivation: To provide rigorous uniform-in-time quantitative estimates for fluctuations of large-scale interacting particle systems, filling a gap in existing theory over long time scales.
en.method: Combines a uniform-in-time weak expansion with a second-order Poincaré inequality from Malliavin calculus, analyzing first- and second-order Malliavin derivatives of the particle flow to obtain convergence rates.
en.result: The fluctuation process converges to a Gaussian limit at rate N^{-1/2} in Wasserstein distance uniformly in time; a backward PDE representation for the limiting variance is also derived.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the statistical behavior of large particle systems over long times, providing theoretical guarantees for simulations and inference.

idea_spark.idea: Combining the second-order Poincaré inequality with backward PDEs might quantify convergence of parameter fluctuations in stochastic gradient descent.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on differentiability and Malliavin differentiability of the particle system, which may not hold for non-smooth or discrete systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the fluctuation-dissipation theorem in statistical physics, linking macroscopic variance to microscopic derivatives.

papers.title: A Predefined-Time Neurodynamic Approach with Time-Varying Coefficients for Mixed Variational Inequalities and Applications
papers.summary: This paper proposes a predefined-time (PDT) neurodynamic approach with time-varying coefficients for solving mixed variational inequality problems (MVIs). A class of first-order proximal neurodynamic models is developed to guarantee convergence within a user-prescribed time from arbitrary initial conditions.   PDT stability is rigorously established via Lyapunov analysis under strong pseudomonotonicity and Lipschitz continuity assumptions, and explicit relationships between convergence time and system parameters are derived. The robustness of the proposed method against bounded disturbances is also analyzed. Applications to composite and minimax optimization problems, together with numerical simulations, demonstrate the effectiveness and fast convergence performance of the proposed framework.

ai.tldr: 提出一种具有时变系数的预定义时间神经动力学方法，用于求解混合变分不等式问题，并证明其在强伪单调和Lipschitz连续条件下的预定义时间稳定性。
ai.motivation: 现有神经动力学方法通常只能保证渐近收敛或有限时间收敛，收敛时间依赖于初始条件，无法满足需要严格时间约束的应用场景。
ai.method: 设计一类一阶近端神经动力学模型，通过时变系数实现用户预设的收敛时间，并利用Lyapunov分析严格证明预定义时间稳定性。
ai.result: 在强伪单调和Lipschitz连续假设下，方法能在任意初始条件下于预设时间内收敛，且对有限扰动具有鲁棒性；在复合优化和极小极大优化问题上的数值实验验证了其快速收敛性能。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可精确控制收敛时间的优化求解器，适用于对实时性要求高的工程问题，如机器人控制、信号处理等。

idea_spark.idea: 将时变系数设计为自适应形式，根据当前残差动态调整，可能进一步加速收敛或降低保守性。
idea_spark.risk: 时变系数的设计可能增加模型复杂度，且强伪单调假设在实际问题中未必满足，需验证更弱条件下的性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合事件触发机制，仅在必要时更新神经动力学状态，可降低计算通信开销，适用于资源受限系统。

en.tldr: A predefined-time neurodynamic approach with time-varying coefficients is proposed for solving mixed variational inequalities, with rigorous Lyapunov-based stability analysis and applications to composite and minimax optimization.
en.motivation: Existing neurodynamic methods typically guarantee asymptotic or finite-time convergence dependent on initial conditions, which is insufficient for applications requiring strict time constraints.
en.method: A class of first-order proximal neurodynamic models is developed, incorporating time-varying coefficients to achieve user-prescribed convergence time, with stability proven via Lyapunov analysis.
en.result: Under strong pseudomonotonicity and Lipschitz continuity, the method converges within a predefined time from any initial condition and is robust to bounded disturbances; numerical simulations on composite and minimax optimization confirm fast convergence.
en.help_to_user: Provides an optimization solver with precisely controllable convergence time, suitable for real-time engineering problems such as robot control and signal processing.

idea_spark.idea: Design adaptive time-varying coefficients based on current residuals to potentially accelerate convergence or reduce conservatism.
idea_spark.risk: Time-varying coefficient design may increase model complexity, and the strong pseudomonotonicity assumption may not hold in practice; performance under weaker conditions needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Integrate event-triggered mechanisms to update neurodynamic states only when necessary, reducing computation and communication overhead for resource-constrained systems.

papers.title: Matrix parabolic problems in Sobolev spaces of generalized smoothness
papers.summary: We study a general linear parabolic problem for Petrovskii parabolic differential system in Sobolev anisotropic distribution spaces of generalized smoothness. Slowly varying functions are used to characterize supplementary generalized smoothness that cannot be determined by number indexes. We prove that this problem induces topological isomorphisms on appropriate pairs of such spaces. As an application, we give sufficient and necessary conditions for the problem solutions to have prescribed generalized regularity expressed in terms of these spaces. Their use allows obtaining exact conditions for indicated generalized partial derivatives of the solutions to be continuous.

ai.tldr: 研究Petrovskii抛物型微分系统在广义光滑Sobolev各向异性分布空间中的线性抛物问题，证明拓扑同构并给出解具有指定广义正则性的充要条件。
ai.motivation: 经典Sobolev空间无法刻画由慢变函数表征的补充广义光滑性，需要更精细的函数空间框架。
ai.method: 利用慢变函数构造广义光滑Sobolev空间，建立问题在这些空间对上的拓扑同构。
ai.result: 问题诱导拓扑同构，并得到解具有指定广义正则性的充要条件，包括广义偏导数连续性的精确条件。
ai.help_to_user: 提供处理非标准光滑性抛物问题的严格数学工具，适用于高阶或各向异性正则性分析。

idea_spark.idea: 将慢变函数与各向异性分布空间结合，可能用于描述材料界面或奇异摄动问题中的局部光滑性。
idea_spark.risk: 理论框架高度抽象，实际数值实现或工程应用需额外适配。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受函数空间精细分类启发，可探索慢变函数在图像处理或信号分析中的正则化作用。

zh.tldr: 研究Petrovskii抛物型微分系统在广义光滑Sobolev各向异性分布空间中的线性抛物问题，证明拓扑同构并给出解具有指定广义正则性的充要条件。
zh.motivation: 经典Sobolev空间无法刻画由慢变函数表征的补充广义光滑性，需要更精细的函数空间框架。
zh.method: 利用慢变函数构造广义光滑Sobolev空间，建立问题在这些空间对上的拓扑同构。
zh.result: 问题诱导拓扑同构，并得到解具有指定广义正则性的充要条件，包括广义偏导数连续性的精确条件。
zh.help_to_user: 提供处理非标准光滑性抛物问题的严格数学工具，适用于高阶或各向异性正则性分析。

idea_spark.idea: 将慢变函数与各向异性分布空间结合，可能用于描述材料界面或奇异摄动问题中的局部光滑性。
idea_spark.risk: 理论框架高度抽象，实际数值实现或工程应用需额外适配。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受函数空间精细分类启发，可探索慢变函数在图像处理或信号分析中的正则化作用。

en.tldr: Studies a linear parabolic problem for Petrovskii systems in anisotropic Sobolev spaces of generalized smoothness, proves topological isomorphisms, and gives necessary and sufficient conditions for prescribed generalized regularity of solutions.
en.motivation: Classical Sobolev spaces cannot capture supplementary generalized smoothness characterized by slowly varying functions, requiring a more refined function space framework.
en.method: Constructs generalized smoothness Sobolev spaces using slowly varying functions and establishes topological isomorphisms on appropriate pairs of such spaces.
en.result: The problem induces topological isomorphisms, and necessary and sufficient conditions are obtained for solutions to have prescribed generalized regularity, including exact conditions for continuity of generalized partial derivatives.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous mathematical tools for parabolic problems with non-standard smoothness, suitable for high-order or anisotropic regularity analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Combining slowly varying functions with anisotropic distribution spaces may describe local smoothness in material interfaces or singular perturbation problems.
idea_spark.risk: The theoretical framework is highly abstract; practical numerical implementation or engineering application requires additional adaptation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by fine classification of function spaces, one could explore the role of slowly varying functions in regularization for image processing or signal analysis.

papers.title: Model Predictive Static Programming for Discrete-Time Optimal Control on Lie Groups
papers.summary: This paper extends the Model Predictive Static Programming (MPSP) framework for nonlinear systems evolving on Euclidean spaces to simple mechanical systems evolving on Lie groups. Classical optimal control approaches based on Pontryagin's Maximum Principle (PMP) lead to nonlinear two-point boundary value problems (TPBVPs), whose numerical solution becomes particularly challenging on nonlinear configuration spaces. To overcome this difficulty, the proposed Lie-group MPSP framework reformulates the finite-horizon optimal control problem as a sequence of static quadratic programs that admit closed-form control updates, thereby avoiding the need to solve TPBVPs directly. The development relies on left-trivialized variations, intrinsic linearization on Lie groups, and a recursive computation of terminal sensitivity matrices, which together enable computationally efficient real-time implementation. The proposed method is demonstrated through optimal flipping maneuvers of a variable-pitch quadrotor (VPQ) and a single-main-rotor helicopter (SMRH), both of which are capable of generating negative thrust. For validation, continuous-time necessary and sufficient optimality conditions are derived, and the corresponding TPBVP solutions are compared against the trajectories generated by the proposed MPSP method in numerical simulations. In addition, the proposed algorithm is systematically compared with the iterative Linear Quadratic Regulator (iLQR) method, and a detailed numerical study is presented to highlight the relative performance and computational features of the two approaches.

ai.result: 在变距四旋翼和单主旋翼直升机的翻转机动中验证了有效性，并与iLQR方法进行了系统比较。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需直接求解两点边值问题的李群最优控制算法，适合实时实现。

en.motivation: Classical optimal control methods (e.g., Pontryagin's Maximum Principle) lead to nonlinear two-point boundary value problems that are particularly challenging on nonlinear configuration spaces like Lie groups.

papers.title: One Sequence to Segment Them All: Efficient Data Augmentation for CT and MRI Cross-Domain 3D Spine Segmentation
papers.summary: Deep learning-based medical image segmentation is increasingly used to support clinical diagnosis and develop new treatment strategies. However, model performance remains limited by the scarcity of high-quality annotated data and insufficient generalization across imaging protocols. This limitation is particularly evident in MRI and CT, where models are typically trained on a single acquisition sequence and exhibit reduced robustness when applied to unseen sequences or contrasts. Although data augmentation is widely used to improve general robustness on medical images, its impact on cross-modality generalization has not been quantitatively explored. In this work, we study a targeted set of data augmentation techniques designed to improve cross-modality transfer. We train three spine segmentation models, each on a single-modality/sequence dataset, and evaluate them across seven out-of-distribution datasets (spanning CT and MRI), reflecting a realistic single-sequence training and multi-sequence/contrast/modality deployment scenario. Our results demonstrate substantial performance gains on unseen domains (average Dice gain of 155 %) while preserving in-domain accuracy (average Dice decrease of 0.008 %), including effective transfer between CT and MRI. To mitigate the computational cost typically associated with strong data augmentation, we implement GPU-optimized augmentations that maintain, and even improve, training efficiency by approximately 10 %. We release our approach as an open-source toolbox, enabling seamless integration into commonly used frameworks such as nnUNet and MONAI. These augmentations significantly enhance robustness to heterogeneous clinical imaging scenarios without compromising training speed.

ai.tldr: 提出一种针对CT和MRI跨模态脊柱分割的数据增强方法，在保持域内精度的同时显著提升跨域泛化能力。

ai.result: 在未见域上平均Dice提升155%，域内精度仅下降0.008%；训练效率提升约10%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供开源工具箱，可无缝集成到nnUNet和MONAI框架，帮助用户提升模型在异构临床场景中的鲁棒性。
