en.tldr: Investigates the giant component formed via high-dimensional paths in the multi-parameter random simplicial complex model, determines the phase transition threshold, and analyzes subcritical and supercritical behavior.
en.motivation: To understand phase transitions of connectivity in high-dimensional random structures, especially giant components via high-dimensional paths.
en.method: Uses local-weak convergence combined with a refined analysis of the breadth-first exploration process to prove concentration results.
en.result: In the subcritical regime, the largest component contains Θ(log n) (d-1)-simplices; in the supercritical regime, the asymptotic proportion of 1-simplices in the giant component is determined for dimension 2; for Linial-Meshulam complexes, the vertex count undergoes a discontinuous phase transition.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous mathematical analysis of high-dimensional connectivity in random simplicial complexes, aiding understanding of high-dimensional structures in complex networks.

idea_spark.idea: Using breadth-first exploration that tracks newly discovered and previously explored vertices could lead to efficient algorithms for detecting high-dimensional giant components.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical results depend on specific parameter ranges; parameter estimation may be challenging in practical applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: The discontinuous phase transition in high-dimensional connectivity inspires studies of emergent phenomena in social or biological networks with higher-order interactions.

papers.title: Nonlinear semigroups with unbounded generators under Carleman linearization
papers.summary: We treat the convergence of Carleman linearization of nonlinear evolutionary equations through the approximation theory of strongly continuous semigroups, by Carleman embedding the underlying nonlinear semigroups as linear semigroups. Linear semigroup theory then lets one replace the norm constraint on the convergence of Carleman linearization in the form used by quantum algorithms for a class of semi-discretized evolution equations by a dissipativity constraint, simplifying arguments for convergence. Applying Trotter-Kato approximation theorem to the linearized semigroup realizes the semigroup as a limit finite dimensional operator exponentials, reducing the question of convergence rate of Carleman linearization to that of the Trotter-Kato approximation. We then examine convergence of the Carleman linearization as the operators become unbounded, treating the hyperviscuous Burger's equation as an example. Next we consider the perturbation theory of the Carleman semigroup and obtain conditions when polynomial nonlinearities correspond to the Carleman linearized semigroup being a $1$-integrated semigroup, so convergence is implied by variants of Trotter-Kato approximation for integrated semigroups.

ai.tldr: 通过Carleman嵌入将非线性半群线性化，利用线性半群理论将收敛性范数约束替换为耗散性约束，并借助Trotter-Kato逼近分析无界生成元情形下的收敛性。
ai.motivation: 量子算法中Carleman线性化的收敛性通常需要范数约束，但该约束对无界生成元难以验证，因此需要更宽松的耗散性条件。
ai.method: 将非线性半群Carleman嵌入为线性半群，应用Trotter-Kato逼近定理将线性化半群表示为有限维算子指数的极限，并引入积分半群处理多项式非线性。
ai.result: 建立了无界生成元下Carleman线性化的收敛性理论，以超粘性Burgers方程为例验证，并给出了多项式非线性对应1-积分半群的条件。
ai.help_to_user: 为量子算法求解非线性演化方程提供了更严格的收敛性理论基础，简化了收敛性分析。

idea_spark.idea: 利用积分半群理论处理更广泛的非线性项，可能扩展至非多项式非线性。
idea_spark.risk: 积分半群条件可能对某些强非线性系统不成立，需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将半群逼近理论与量子计算结合，启发设计更高效的量子算法求解非线性问题。

zh.tldr: 通过Carleman嵌入将非线性半群线性化，利用线性半群理论将收敛性范数约束替换为耗散性约束，并借助Trotter-Kato逼近分析无界生成元情形下的收敛性。
zh.motivation: 量子算法中Carleman线性化的收敛性通常需要范数约束，但该约束对无界生成元难以验证，因此需要更宽松的耗散性条件。
zh.method: 将非线性半群Carleman嵌入为线性半群，应用Trotter-Kato逼近定理将线性化半群表示为有限维算子指数的极限，并引入积分半群处理多项式非线性。
zh.result: 建立了无界生成元下Carleman线性化的收敛性理论，以超粘性Burgers方程为例验证，并给出了多项式非线性对应1-积分半群的条件。
zh.help_to_user: 为量子算法求解非线性演化方程提供了更严格的收敛性理论基础，简化了收敛性分析。

idea_spark.idea: 利用积分半群理论处理更广泛的非线性项，可能扩展至非多项式非线性。
idea_spark.risk: 积分半群条件可能对某些强非线性系统不成立，需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将半群逼近理论与量子计算结合，启发设计更高效的量子算法求解非线性问题。

en.tldr: We treat convergence of Carleman linearization for nonlinear evolutionary equations by embedding nonlinear semigroups as linear semigroups, replacing norm constraints with dissipativity constraints, and applying Trotter-Kato approximation to handle unbounded generators.
en.motivation: Quantum algorithms for nonlinear PDEs require convergence of Carleman linearization under norm constraints, which are restrictive for unbounded generators; dissipativity constraints offer a more tractable alternative.
en.method: Carleman embedding of nonlinear semigroups into linear semigroups, application of Trotter-Kato approximation to represent the linearized semigroup as limits of finite-dimensional operator exponentials, and use of integrated semigroups for polynomial nonlinearities.
en.result: Convergence theory for Carleman linearization with unbounded generators is established, demonstrated on the hyperviscous Burgers equation, and conditions for polynomial nonlinearities to yield 1-integrated semigroups are derived.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous convergence framework for Carleman linearization in quantum algorithms, simplifying analysis via dissipativity and Trotter-Kato approximation.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the approach to non-polynomial nonlinearities using integrated semigroup theory.
idea_spark.risk: Integrated semigroup conditions may fail for strongly nonlinear systems, requiring further investigation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Bridging semigroup approximation theory with quantum computing inspires design of more efficient quantum algorithms for nonlinear problems.

papers.title: The Distributionally Robust Cyclic Inventory Routing Problem
papers.summary: We study the cyclic inventory routing problem that involves joint decisions on vehicle routing and inventory replenishment on an infinite, cyclic horizon. It considers a single warehouse and a set of geographically dispersed retailers. We model retailer demand as random variables with uncertain distributions belonging to a moment-based ambiguity set. We develop a distributionally robust optimization formulation that minimizes the worst-case expected cost over the ambiguity set, while ensuring service reliability through a distributionally robust chance constraint. Our main results are that we prove that the worst-case expected inventory cost is attained under a multi-point distribution, which can be identified a posteriori via linear programming, and that the distributionally robust chance constraint can be reformulated into near-equivalent deterministic forms. This yields a deterministic reformulation of the original problem. To solve it, we design a nested branch-and-price framework, in which the first level partitions retailers into clusters, and the second level concerns routing and replenishment decisions within each cluster. Computational experiments on both synthetic instances and real-world data from SAIC Volkswagen Automobile Co., Ltd. demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of the proposed approach.

ai.tldr: 研究无限周期下的循环库存路径问题，提出分布鲁棒优化模型，通过嵌套分支定价算法求解，并用上汽大众真实数据验证。
ai.motivation: 循环库存路径问题中零售商需求分布不确定，传统方法难以保证服务可靠性。
ai.method: 构建基于矩模糊集的分布鲁棒优化模型，将最坏情况期望成本与机会约束转化为确定性形式，设计嵌套分支定价框架。
ai.result: 最坏情况期望库存成本可在多点分布下达到，机会约束可近似等价重构；算法在合成和真实数据上有效。
ai.help_to_user: 提供处理需求分布不确定的库存路径问题的鲁棒优化方法及高效求解算法。

idea_spark.idea: 将零售商聚类与路径规划分层求解，降低问题复杂度。
idea_spark.risk: 多点分布假设可能不适用于所有实际需求分布，需验证鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合模糊集与分支定价，为大规模随机优化提供新思路。

en.tldr: Studies the cyclic inventory routing problem under demand uncertainty, proposes a distributionally robust optimization model solved by a nested branch-and-price framework, validated on real data from SAIC Volkswagen.
en.motivation: Retailer demand distributions are uncertain in cyclic inventory routing, challenging service reliability guarantees.
en.method: Formulates a distributionally robust model with moment-based ambiguity set, reformulates worst-case cost and chance constraint into deterministic forms, and designs a nested branch-and-price algorithm.
en.result: Worst-case expected cost is attained under a multi-point distribution; chance constraint is near-equivalently reformulated; algorithm is effective on synthetic and real instances.
en.help_to_user: Provides a robust optimization approach and efficient algorithm for inventory routing problems with uncertain demand distributions.

idea_spark.idea: Decomposes the problem into retailer clustering and intra-cluster routing/replenishment to reduce complexity.
idea_spark.risk: The multi-point distribution assumption may not fit all real demand patterns, requiring robustness checks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining ambiguity sets with branch-and-price offers a new perspective for large-scale stochastic optimization.

papers.title: SOAR: Real-Time Joint Optimization of Order Allocation and Robot Scheduling in Robotic Mobile Fulfillment Systems
papers.summary: Robotic Mobile Fulfillment Systems (RMFS) rely on mobile robots for automated inventory transportation, coordinating order allocation and robot scheduling to enhance warehousing efficiency. However, optimizing RMFS is challenging due to strict real-time constraints and the strong coupling of multi-phase decisions. Existing methods either decompose the problem into isolated sub-tasks to guarantee responsiveness at the cost of global optimality, or rely on computationally expensive global optimization models that are unsuitable for dynamic industrial environments. To bridge this gap, we propose SOAR, a unified Deep Reinforcement Learning framework for real-time joint optimization. SOAR transforms order allocation and robot scheduling into a unified process by utilizing soft order allocations as observations. We formulate this as an Event-Driven Markov Decision Process, enabling the agent to perform simultaneous scheduling in response to asynchronous system events. Technically, we employ a Heterogeneous Graph Transformer to encode the warehouse state and integrate phased domain knowledge. Additionally, we incorporate a reward shaping strategy to address sparse feedback in long-horizon tasks. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world industrial datasets, in collaboration with Geekplus, demonstrate that SOAR reduces global makespan by 7.5\% and average order completion time by 15.4\% with sub-100ms latency. Furthermore, sim-to-real deployment confirms its practical viability and significant performance gains in production environments. The code is available at https://github.com/200815147/SOAR.

ai.tldr: 提出SOAR框架，利用深度强化学习实时联合优化订单分配与机器人调度，在RMFS中降低全局完工时间7.5%和平均订单完成时间15.4%。
ai.motivation: 现有方法要么牺牲全局最优性保证响应速度，要么计算成本过高无法用于动态工业环境，需要一种兼顾实时性与全局优化的方法。
ai.method: 将订单分配与机器人调度统一为事件驱动马尔可夫决策过程，采用异构图Transformer编码仓库状态，并引入奖励塑形策略处理稀疏反馈。
ai.result: 在合成和真实工业数据集上，SOAR将全局完工时间降低7.5%，平均订单完成时间降低15.4%，延迟低于100ms，且模拟到实际部署验证有效。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过深度强化学习实现仓库中订单分配与机器人调度的联合实时优化。

idea_spark.idea: 将软订单分配作为观测，使调度与分配统一决策，避免传统分解方法的信息损失。
idea_spark.risk: 奖励塑形可能引入偏差，需谨慎设计以保持与原始目标一致；异构图Transformer在极大规模仓库中的可扩展性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴了强化学习在组合优化中的成功，但通过事件驱动机制适应异步工业场景，启发其他实时决策问题的建模方式。

en.tldr: Proposes SOAR, a deep reinforcement learning framework for real-time joint optimization of order allocation and robot scheduling in RMFS, reducing global makespan by 7.5% and average order completion time by 15.4%.
en.motivation: Existing methods either sacrifice global optimality for responsiveness or are computationally too expensive for dynamic industrial environments, necessitating a method that balances real-time constraints with global optimization.
en.method: Unifies order allocation and robot scheduling into an event-driven Markov decision process, uses a Heterogeneous Graph Transformer to encode warehouse state, and incorporates reward shaping to handle sparse feedback.
en.result: On synthetic and real-world industrial datasets, SOAR reduces global makespan by 7.5% and average order completion time by 15.4% with sub-100ms latency, and sim-to-real deployment confirms practical viability.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how deep reinforcement learning can achieve real-time joint optimization of order allocation and robot scheduling in warehouses.

idea_spark.idea: Using soft order allocations as observations enables unified decision-making for allocation and scheduling, avoiding information loss from decomposition.
idea_spark.risk: Reward shaping may introduce bias and must be carefully designed to align with the original objective; scalability of the Heterogeneous Graph Transformer for extremely large warehouses needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws on reinforcement learning successes in combinatorial optimization but adapts to asynchronous industrial scenarios via event-driven mechanisms, inspiring modeling approaches for other real-time decision problems.

papers.title: Linear instability of a Burgers--Hilbert traveling wave
papers.summary: We study the stability of traveling wave solutions to the Burgers--Hilbert equation on $\mathbb{T}$ in the regime of small frequency $ω$ and large wave speed $c$. For $ω= 3$ and $c \approx 1.1$, we show that the linearized operator around these solutions has an eigenvalue with negative real part, indicating spectral instability. Our approach is computer-assisted: we reduce the problem to a finite-dimensional system and solve it rigorously using interval arithmetic. The Burgers--Hilbert equation arises as a quadratic approximation of the vortex patch problem for the two-dimensional Euler equations. In this setting, our results point to the instability of threefold symmetric V-states.

ai.tldr: 通过计算机辅助证明，发现Burgers-Hilbert方程在特定参数下的行波解存在谱不稳定性。
ai.motivation: 研究Burgers-Hilbert方程行波解的稳定性，该方程是二维Euler方程涡片问题的二次近似。
ai.method: 将线性化算子约化为有限维系统，并使用区间算术进行严格计算。
ai.result: 对于频率ω=3、波速c≈1.1，线性化算子存在负实部特征值，表明谱不稳定。
ai.help_to_user: 展示了计算机辅助证明在非线性波动方程稳定性分析中的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 利用区间算术严格验证高维动力系统的谱性质。
idea_spark.risk: 区间算术可能因维度过高而计算量过大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合数值计算与严格分析，处理解析方法难以触及的稳定性问题。

idea_spark.inspiration: 结合数值计算与严格分析，处理解析方法难以触及的稳定性问题。

en.tldr: Using a computer-assisted proof, we show that traveling wave solutions of the Burgers-Hilbert equation are spectrally unstable for certain parameters.
en.motivation: To study the stability of traveling waves in the Burgers-Hilbert equation, which arises as a quadratic approximation of the vortex patch problem for 2D Euler equations.
en.method: Reduce the linearized operator to a finite-dimensional system and solve it rigorously with interval arithmetic.
en.result: For frequency ω=3 and wave speed c≈1.1, the linearized operator has an eigenvalue with negative real part, indicating spectral instability.
en.help_to_user: Demonstrates the use of computer-assisted proofs for stability analysis of nonlinear wave equations.

idea_spark.idea: Use interval arithmetic to rigorously verify spectral properties of high-dimensional dynamical systems.
idea_spark.risk: Interval arithmetic may become computationally expensive for very high dimensions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine numerical computation with rigorous analysis to tackle stability problems beyond pure analytical reach.

papers.title: RPBA-Net: An Interpretable Residual Pyramid Bilateral Affine Network for RAW-Domain ISP Enhancement
papers.summary: To address module fragmentation, uninterpretable mappings, and deployment constraints in RAW-domain demosaicing, color correction, and detail enhancement, this paper proposes RPBA-Net, an interpretable residual pyramid bilateral affine network for RAW-domain ISP enhancement. Given packed RAW as input, the method performs residual affine base reconstruction by estimating a base RGB representation and learning identity-guided residual affine corrections, thereby unifying demosaicing and enhancement. It further builds pyramid bilateral affine grids and combines guide-driven autoregressive adaptive slicing with adaptive cross-layer fusion to hierarchically model global tone restoration and local texture enhancement. In addition, smoothness, cross-scale consistency, and magnitude regularization terms are introduced to improve model stability, controllability, and structural interpretability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RPBA-Net surpasses representative RAW-to-sRGB methods and achieves state-of-the-art performance in reconstruction fidelity and perceptual quality, while maintaining low model complexity and strong deployment potential for mobile and embedded platforms.

ai.tldr: 提出RPBA-Net，一种可解释的残差金字塔双边仿射网络，用于RAW域ISP增强，统一去马赛克与增强，实现高保真重建与低模型复杂度。
ai.motivation: 现有RAW域ISP方法存在模块碎片化、映射不可解释及部署受限问题。
ai.method: 构建残差仿射基重建、金字塔双边仿射网格、引导驱动自适应切片与跨层融合，并引入平滑性、跨尺度一致性和幅度正则化。
ai.result: 在重建保真度和感知质量上超越现有RAW-to-sRGB方法，达到最优性能，且模型复杂度低，适合移动和嵌入式平台。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何设计可解释且高效的RAW域ISP增强网络。

idea_spark.idea: 将去马赛克与增强统一为残差仿射校正，并利用金字塔多尺度建模全局色调与局部纹理。
idea_spark.risk: 正则化项可能增加调参难度，且对极端光照场景的泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从双边网格与残差学习结合中获取灵感，实现可解释的端到端ISP流水线。

en.tldr: Proposes RPBA-Net, an interpretable residual pyramid bilateral affine network for RAW-domain ISP enhancement, unifying demosaicing and enhancement with high fidelity and low complexity.
en.motivation: Existing RAW-domain ISP methods suffer from module fragmentation, uninterpretable mappings, and deployment constraints.
en.method: Constructs residual affine base reconstruction, pyramid bilateral affine grids, guide-driven adaptive slicing and cross-layer fusion, with smoothness, cross-scale consistency, and magnitude regularization.
en.result: Surpasses representative RAW-to-sRGB methods in reconstruction fidelity and perceptual quality, achieving state-of-the-art performance with low model complexity suitable for mobile and embedded platforms.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to design interpretable and efficient RAW-domain ISP enhancement networks.

idea_spark.idea: Unify demosaicing and enhancement as residual affine corrections, using pyramid multi-scale modeling for global tone and local texture.
idea_spark.risk: Regularization terms may increase tuning difficulty; generalization to extreme lighting needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by combining bilateral grids with residual learning for an interpretable end-to-end ISP pipeline.

papers.title: Geometric Perspective on Concentration Phenomena in Frame Theory
papers.summary: Parseval and equal-norm frames play a fundamental role in frame theory and signal processing. In this work, we prove non-asymptotic concentration bounds showing that random equal-norm frames are nearly Parseval with high probability, and that random Parseval frames are nearly equal-norm with high probability. Our proofs are geometric in nature, and rely on general measure concentration principles in Riemannian manifolds. As an application, we obtain a novel probabilistic upper bound for the Paulsen problem.

ai.tldr: 本文从几何角度证明了随机等范数框架几乎为Parseval框架，随机Parseval框架几乎为等范数框架，并给出了Paulsen问题的新概率上界。
ai.motivation: 框架理论中Parseval框架和等范数框架是核心概念，但随机框架的近似性质缺乏严格的非渐近浓度界。
ai.method: 利用黎曼流形上的测度集中原理，对随机框架进行几何分析，推导出高概率下的浓度不等式。
ai.result: 证明了随机等范数框架以高概率接近Parseval框架，随机Parseval框架以高概率接近等范数框架，并得到Paulsen问题的概率上界。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解随机框架的几何性质及其在信号处理中的鲁棒性，提供Paulsen问题的概率估计。

idea_spark.idea: 将几何浓度原理应用于量子信息中的随机测量或压缩感知中的随机采样矩阵分析。
idea_spark.risk: 几何方法可能对高维流形上的计算复杂度敏感，需要验证实际应用中的可操作性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从框架的几何视角出发，启发将流形学习与随机矩阵理论结合，设计更鲁棒的信号表示方法。

zh.result: 证明了随机等范数框架以高概率接近Parseval框架，随机Parseval框架以高概率接近等范数框架，并得到Paulsen问题的概率上界。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解随机框架的几何性质及其在信号处理中的鲁棒性，提供Paulsen问题的概率估计。

idea_spark.idea: 将几何浓度原理应用于量子信息中的随机测量或压缩感知中的随机采样矩阵分析。
idea_spark.risk: 几何方法可能对高维流形上的计算复杂度敏感，需要验证实际应用中的可操作性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从框架的几何视角出发，启发将流形学习与随机矩阵理论结合，设计更鲁棒的信号表示方法。

en.tldr: This paper proves non-asymptotic concentration bounds showing that random equal-norm frames are nearly Parseval and random Parseval frames are nearly equal-norm with high probability, using geometric measure concentration on Riemannian manifolds, and obtains a new probabilistic upper bound for the Paulsen problem.
en.motivation: Parseval and equal-norm frames are fundamental in frame theory and signal processing, but rigorous non-asymptotic concentration bounds for random frames were lacking.
en.method: Leveraging general measure concentration principles on Riemannian manifolds to derive geometric proofs of concentration inequalities for random frames.
en.result: Proved that random equal-norm frames are approximately Parseval and random Parseval frames are approximately equal-norm with high probability, yielding a probabilistic bound for the Paulsen problem.
en.help_to_user: Provides geometric insight into the approximate properties of random frames and a probabilistic estimate for the Paulsen problem, useful in signal processing and frame theory.

idea_spark.idea: Apply geometric concentration principles to analyze random measurements in quantum information or random sampling matrices in compressed sensing.
idea_spark.risk: Geometric methods may be computationally intensive in high dimensions; practical feasibility needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: The geometric perspective on frames inspires combining manifold learning with random matrix theory to design more robust signal representations.

papers.title: MEMSAD: Gradient-Coupled Anomaly Detection for Memory Poisoning in Retrieval-Augmented Agents
papers.summary: Persistent external memory enables LLM agents to maintain context across sessions, yet its security properties remain formally uncharacterized. We formalize memory poisoning attacks on retrieval-augmented agents as a Stackelberg game with a unified evaluation framework spanning three attack classes with escalating access assumptions. Correcting an evaluation protocol inconsistency in the triggered-query specification of Chen et al. (2024), we show faithful evaluation increases measured attack success by $4\times$ (ASR-R: $0.25 \to 1.00$). Our primary contribution is MEMSAD (Semantic Anomaly Detection), a calibration-based defense grounded in a gradient coupling theorem: under encoder regularity, the anomaly score gradient and the retrieval objective gradient are provably identical, so any continuous perturbation that reduces detection risk necessarily degrades retrieval rank. This coupling yields a certified detection radius guaranteeing correct classification regardless of adversary strategy. We prove minimax optimality via Le Cam's method, showing any threshold detector requires $Ω(1/ρ^2)$ calibration samples and MEMSAD achieves this up to $\log(1/δ)$ factors. We further derive online regret bounds for rolling calibration at rate $O(σ^{2/3}Δ^{1/3})$, and formally characterize a discrete synonym-invariance loophole that marks the boundary of what continuous-space defenses can guarantee. Experiments on a $3 \times 5$ attack-defense matrix with bootstrap confidence intervals, Bonferroni-corrected hypothesis tests, and Clopper-Pearson validation ($n=1{,}000$) confirm: composite defenses achieve TPR $= 1.00$, FPR $= 0.00$ across all attacks, while synonym substitution evades detection at $Δ$ ASR-R $\approx 0$, exposing a gap existing embedding-based defenses cannot close.

ai.tldr: 提出MEMSAD，一种基于梯度耦合定理的校准式异常检测方法，用于防御检索增强型LLM代理的记忆投毒攻击，并证明其最优性和认证检测半径。
ai.motivation: 持久外部记忆使LLM代理能跨会话保持上下文，但其安全性未得到形式化刻画；现有评估协议存在不一致，导致攻击成功率被低估。
ai.method: 将记忆投毒攻击形式化为Stackelberg博弈，提出梯度耦合定理：异常分数梯度与检索目标梯度相同，从而任何降低检测风险的连续扰动必然降低检索排名；基于此设计校准式检测器MEMSAD，并推导在线校准的遗憾界。
ai.result: 在3×5攻击-防御矩阵上，复合防御实现TPR=1.00、FPR=0.00；同义词替换攻击暴露了连续空间防御的边界，现有嵌入防御无法弥补。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解检索增强型LLM代理的记忆安全风险，并提供一种理论保证的异常检测防御方案。

idea_spark.idea: 利用离散同义词不变性漏洞，设计混合连续-离散防御，或探索对抗训练以增强对同义词替换的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 同义词替换攻击可能被更复杂的语义扰动绕过，且校准样本需求随维度增长。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将博弈论与梯度分析结合，为安全防御提供形式化保证，启发其他AI安全问题的理论建模。

idea_spark.inspiration: Combining game theory with gradient analysis provides formal guarantees for security defenses, inspiring theoretical modeling of other AI safety problems.

papers.title: The maximum-entropy median-martingale
papers.summary: This short note explores the maximum-entropy walk on the unit interval that is a median-martingale. That is, the median of its next state is equal to its current state. The stationary distribution of this walk is shown to be the arcsine distribution, and we provide a proof that elucidates the connection to two classical arcsine laws for Brownian motion. The notion of a martingale is further generalized, and a larger class of walks is considered and similarly characterized.

ai.tldr: 本文研究单位区间上最大熵的中位数鞅游走，证明其平稳分布为反正弦分布，并阐明与布朗运动两个经典反正弦定律的联系。
ai.motivation: 探索中位数鞅约束下最大熵游走的性质，并揭示其与布朗运动经典结果的深层联系。
ai.method: 定义中位数鞅游走，推导平稳分布，通过证明连接布朗运动的反正弦定律。
ai.result: 该游走的平稳分布是反正弦分布，并推广了鞅的概念，刻画了一类更广泛的游走。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解最大熵原理在随机过程中的应用，以及中位数鞅与布朗运动反正弦定律之间的数学联系。

idea_spark.idea: 将中位数鞅概念应用于金融建模或生态学中的随机游走，以捕捉非对称动态。
idea_spark.risk: 推广后的鞅类可能缺乏实际可解释性，或平稳分布难以解析求解。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从布朗运动的经典定律出发，启发在离散随机过程中寻找类似普适性结果。

en.tldr: This note studies the maximum-entropy median-martingale walk on the unit interval, shows its stationary distribution is the arcsine distribution, and connects it to two classical arcsine laws for Brownian motion.
en.motivation: To explore the properties of a maximum-entropy walk under a median-martingale constraint and reveal its deep connection to classical Brownian motion results.
en.method: Define the median-martingale walk, derive its stationary distribution, and prove the connection via arcsine laws of Brownian motion.
en.result: The stationary distribution is the arcsine distribution; the martingale notion is generalized, and a broader class of walks is characterized.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the application of maximum entropy in stochastic processes and the mathematical link between median-martingales and Brownian motion arcsine laws.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the median-martingale concept to financial modeling or ecological random walks to capture asymmetric dynamics.
idea_spark.risk: Generalized martingale classes may lack practical interpretability or have intractable stationary distributions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Classical Brownian motion laws inspire searching for similar universal results in discrete stochastic processes.

papers.title: Surviving the Edge: Federated Learning under Networking and Resource Constraints
papers.summary: Motivated by the growing proliferation of federated learning (FL) in edge environments, we present the first systematic characterization of transport-layer breaking points in FL systems operating under conditions of highly constrained network and compute resources. Using a reproducible testbed with chaos engineering tools, we evaluate Flower under progressively degraded network conditions representative of resource-constrained deployments in Africa and similar environments. Our empirical investigation reveals a fundamental mismatch between FL's burst-idle communication pattern and standard TCP connection management. We identify precise operational boundaries: FL training catastrophically fails at 5-second one-way latency due to TCP handshake timeouts, above 50% packet loss due to buffer exhaustion, and with 90% client dropout rates. Through systematic analysis of connection patterns during training rounds, we demonstrate that FL's periodic model update bursts, separated by extended local training periods, violate the assumptions underlying default TCP configurations. To validate the significance of these findings, we show that adjusting just three TCP connection management parameters can significantly reduce training time under extreme latency, proving that transport-layer awareness is not merely beneficial but essential for FL deployment at the network edge. Our characterization methodology and findings provide practitioners with concrete thresholds for determining when standard FL deployments will fail and when advanced reliability techniques become necessary.

ai.tldr: 首次系统刻画了联邦学习在边缘环境中网络和计算资源极度受限时的传输层失效点，发现TCP握手超时、缓冲区耗尽和高客户端丢弃率是主要瓶颈。
ai.motivation: 联邦学习在边缘环境部署日益增多，但网络和计算资源受限场景下的传输层失效边界尚不明确。
ai.method: 利用混沌工程工具构建可复现测试平台，在模拟非洲等资源受限环境的渐进退化网络条件下评估Flower框架。
ai.result: 联邦学习在单向延迟5秒、丢包率超过50%、客户端丢弃率90%时灾难性失败；调整三个TCP参数可显著缩短极端延迟下的训练时间。
ai.help_to_user: 为边缘联邦学习部署提供具体失效阈值和传输层感知的必要性证据。

idea_spark.idea: 设计自适应TCP参数调整机制，根据网络状态动态优化联邦学习通信。
idea_spark.risk: 参数调整可能引入新的网络不稳定因素。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从TCP连接管理与联邦学习突发-空闲模式的根本性不匹配出发，探索轻量级传输协议。

en.tldr: First systematic characterization of transport-layer breaking points in federated learning under extreme network and compute constraints, identifying TCP handshake timeouts, buffer exhaustion, and high client dropout as key failure modes.
en.motivation: Federated learning deployment at the edge faces unknown transport-layer failure boundaries under constrained network and compute resources.
en.method: Reproducible testbed with chaos engineering tools evaluating Flower under progressively degraded network conditions representative of resource-constrained environments.
en.result: FL catastrophically fails at 5-second one-way latency, above 50% packet loss, and 90% client dropout; adjusting three TCP parameters significantly reduces training time under extreme latency.

idea_spark.risk: Parameter adjustments may introduce new network instability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore lightweight transport protocols from the fundamental mismatch between TCP connection management and FL's burst-idle pattern.

papers.title: Uncertainty Estimation in Instance Segmentation of Affordances via Bayesian Visual Transformers
papers.summary: Visual affordances identify regions in an image with potential interactions, offering a novel paradigm for scene understanding. Recognizing affordances allows autonomous robots to act more naturally, could enhance human-robot interactions, enrich augmented reality systems, and benefit prosthetic vision devices. Accurate and localized prediction of affordance regions, rather than general saliency maps is crucial for these applications. We present a model for instance segmentation of affordances by adopting sample-based and ensembles approaches for uncertainty estimation. We extend an attention-based architecture for our novel task, showing with detailed ablation experiments the effects of each component. By comparing the distribution of these different detections, we extract pixel-wise epistemic and aleatoric variances at both the semantic and spatial levels. In addition, we propose a novel measure called Probability-based Mask Quality, which enables a comprehensive analysis of semantic and spatial variations in a probabilistic instance segmentation model. Our results show that the global consensus of multiple sub-networks of Bayesian models improve deterministic networks due to a better mask refinement and generalization. This fact, joined with the more powerful features extracted by attention-based mechanisms, represent an improvement of +7.4 p.p on the $F_β^w$ score in the challenging IIT-Aff dataset. Bayesian models are also better calibrated, producing less overconfident probabilities and with a better uncertainty estimation. Qualitative results show that aleatoric variance appears in the contour of the objects, while the epistemic variance is observed in visual challenging pixels, adding interpretability to the neural network.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于贝叶斯视觉Transformer的实例分割方法，用于估计功能区域的像素级不确定性，并在IIT-Aff数据集上提升Fβw分数7.4个百分点。
ai.motivation: 自主机器人需要准确识别图像中的功能区域（而非一般显著性图），但现有方法缺乏不确定性估计，导致预测过于自信且可解释性差。
ai.method: 采用贝叶斯视觉Transformer架构，结合样本采样和集成方法，提取语义和空间层面的认知不确定性与偶然不确定性，并设计概率掩膜质量度量。
ai.result: 贝叶斯模型比确定性网络在掩膜细化和泛化上更优，Fβw分数提升7.4个百分点，且校准更好，偶然不确定性集中在物体轮廓，认知不确定性出现在视觉挑战像素。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解功能区域分割中的不确定性来源，提升机器人交互、增强现实等应用的安全性和可解释性。

idea_spark.idea: 将概率掩膜质量度量与主动学习结合，自动筛选高不确定性样本进行标注。
idea_spark.risk: 贝叶斯模型计算开销较大，实时应用可能受限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用认知不确定性指导模型在困难像素上学习，类似课程学习策略。

idea_spark.risk: 贝叶斯模型计算开销较大，实时应用可能受限。

en.tldr: Proposes a Bayesian visual transformer for instance segmentation of affordances with pixel-wise uncertainty estimation, achieving +7.4 p.p. Fβw on IIT-Aff dataset.
en.motivation: Autonomous robots need accurate affordance region detection beyond saliency maps, but existing methods lack uncertainty estimation, leading to overconfident predictions and poor interpretability.
en.method: Adopts Bayesian visual transformers with sample-based and ensemble approaches to extract epistemic and aleatoric variances at semantic and spatial levels, plus a Probability-based Mask Quality metric.
en.result: Bayesian models outperform deterministic networks in mask refinement and generalization, improving Fβw by 7.4 p.p., with better calibration; aleatoric variance appears at object contours, epistemic variance at challenging pixels.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand uncertainty sources in affordance segmentation, enhancing safety and interpretability in robotics, AR, and prosthetic vision.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the probabilistic mask quality metric with active learning to automatically select high-uncertainty samples for annotation.
idea_spark.risk: Bayesian models incur high computational cost, potentially limiting real-time deployment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use epistemic uncertainty to guide learning on difficult pixels, similar to curriculum learning strategies.

papers.title: New bounds on the covering radius of orthogonal arrays of even strength
papers.summary: We obtain new linear programming (LP) and constructive bounds for the covering radius of binary orthogonal arrays of strength $2k$. Our LP bounds develop in two alternative scenarios. First, if a point $y \in F_2^n$, where the covering radius of some orthogonal array $C \subset F_2^n$ of strength $2k$ is realized, is such that the farthest point of $C$ to $y$ is not antipodal to $y$ we obtain a bound which is better than the Tiet{ä}v{ä}inen (or Fazekas-Levenshtein) bound for non-tight arrays (i.e., the cardinality strictly exceeds the Rao lower bound). Second, if all points where the covering radius is realized are such that their antipodes are in $C$, we obtain a bound which depends on the cardinality of $C$ and is again better whenever the orthogonal array is not tight. We further describe three infinite families of binary orthogonal arrays related to the duals of BCH, Melas, and Zetterberg codes. For these families, we derive lower bounds on the covering radius by applying techniques from algebraic curves over finite fields, while the improved linear programming methods developed in this paper provide upper bounds, leading in some cases to fairly close estimates.

ai.tldr: 本文针对偶数强度的二元正交阵列的覆盖半径，提出了新的线性规划界和构造性下界，并应用于BCH、Melas和Zetterberg码的对偶族。
ai.motivation: 现有覆盖半径界（如Tietäväinen界）在非紧阵列情形下不够紧，需要更精确的上下界。
ai.method: 利用线性规划方法，分两种情形（最远点非对径点与对径点在阵列中）推导上界；同时运用有限域上代数曲线技术推导下界。
ai.result: 获得了比经典界更优的上界，并对三族无限阵列给出了接近的上下界估计。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解偶数强度正交阵列覆盖半径的精确界限，可用于编码理论中的距离分析。

idea_spark.idea: 将覆盖半径最远点是否对径作为分界，分别设计更紧的线性规划约束。
idea_spark.risk: 分情形假设可能不适用于所有阵列，需验证条件是否满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从代数曲线下界与线性规划上界的结合中，可启发更一般的组合优化问题求解策略。

en.tldr: This paper presents new linear programming bounds and constructive lower bounds for the covering radius of binary orthogonal arrays of even strength, applied to duals of BCH, Melas, and Zetterberg codes.
en.motivation: Existing bounds (e.g., Tietäväinen bound) are not tight for non-tight arrays; more precise upper and lower bounds are needed.
en.method: Linear programming is used in two scenarios (farthest point not antipodal vs. antipodal point in the array) to derive upper bounds; algebraic curves over finite fields provide lower bounds.
en.result: Improved upper bounds over classical ones are obtained, and fairly close estimates are given for three infinite families of arrays.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand precise covering radius bounds for even-strength orthogonal arrays, useful for distance analysis in coding theory.

idea_spark.idea: Use whether the farthest point is antipodal as a dividing condition to design tighter linear programming constraints.
idea_spark.risk: The case assumptions may not hold for all arrays; condition verification is required.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining algebraic curve lower bounds with linear programming upper bounds may inspire general strategies for combinatorial optimization problems.

papers.title: Promoting Fair Online Resource Allocation with Indivisible Units
papers.summary: Allocating scarce, indivisible resources to diverse groups under uncertainty is a central challenge in operations research, where efficiency-focused methods often underserve marginalized populations. We study the Fair Online Resource Allocation with Indivisible Units (FORA-IU) problem, in which an unpredictable sequence of demands must be served from a strictly fixed inventory, and ask what fairness guarantees are achievable under different distributional and structural assumptions.   We adopt a fairness criterion based on the expected filling ratio (FE-FR-beta), which balances each group's expected allocation against its expected demand and priority weight. We design online policies that calibrate acceptance probabilities to the remaining budget, analyze both arbitrary time-varying and stationary arrivals, introduce the Random Cyclic Blocks (RCB) algorithm tailored to the stationary case, and study the effect of restricting policies to all-or-nothing allocations.   For arbitrary time-varying arrivals, our policy achieves the optimal universal fairness guarantee of 1/(1+R_beta), where R_beta denotes the priority-weighted system load. For time-invariant arrivals, RCB achieves the exact finite-horizon guarantee [1-(1-R_beta/T)^T]/R_beta, which is at least (1-e^{-R_beta})/R_beta and is also tight. We further show that all-or-nothing allocation policies cannot match these guarantees.   These findings demonstrate that distributional stationarity strictly improves the fairness frontier, and that partial fulfillment is a necessary condition for attaining optimal fairness in online indivisible resource allocation.

ai.tldr: 研究不可分割资源在线分配中的公平性问题，提出基于期望填充率的公平准则，并设计在线策略，证明在平稳到达下可实现更优的公平性保证。
ai.motivation: 传统效率导向的资源分配方法常忽视边缘群体，需要在不完全信息下保障公平性。
ai.method: 提出FORA-IU问题，采用期望填充率公平准则，设计基于剩余预算调整接受概率的在线策略，并针对平稳到达提出随机循环块算法。
ai.result: 对任意时变到达，策略达到最优公平保证1/(1+R_beta)；对平稳到达，RCB算法达到精确有限时域保证，且全有或全无分配无法匹配这些保证。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解在线不可分割资源分配中公平性可达的理论边界及关键条件。

idea_spark.idea: 将部分满足作为必要条件，结合预算感知的接受概率，可能启发新的公平调度算法。
idea_spark.risk: 理论保证依赖分布假设，实际中到达过程可能偏离平稳性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 随机循环块算法利用时间分块和循环调度，可借鉴于其他在线公平分配问题。

en.tldr: Studies fair online allocation of indivisible resources, proposes a fairness criterion based on expected filling ratio, and designs online policies achieving optimal guarantees under different arrival assumptions.
en.motivation: Efficiency-focused methods often underserve marginalized groups; fairness must be ensured under uncertainty.
en.method: Formulates FORA-IU problem, adopts FE-FR-beta fairness criterion, designs online policies that calibrate acceptance probabilities to remaining budget, and introduces Random Cyclic Blocks algorithm for stationary arrivals.
en.result: For arbitrary time-varying arrivals, the policy achieves optimal universal guarantee 1/(1+R_beta); for stationary arrivals, RCB achieves exact finite-horizon guarantee, and all-or-nothing policies cannot match these guarantees.
en.help_to_user: Understands theoretical fairness frontiers and necessary conditions in online indivisible resource allocation.

idea_spark.idea: Partial fulfillment as a necessary condition combined with budget-aware acceptance probabilities may inspire new fair scheduling algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical guarantees rely on distributional assumptions; real arrivals may deviate from stationarity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Random Cyclic Blocks algorithm using time blocks and cyclic scheduling can be adapted to other online fair allocation problems.

papers.title: Kolmogorov-Smirnov distance and discrepancies versus Wasserstein distances
papers.summary: We establish inequalities that compare the p-Wasserstein distance to distances which are built as suprema of box measures. More precisely, when the measures are supported on $[0,1]^d$, we obtain sharp upper-bounds of the $p$-Wasserstein distance by (powers of) the (uniform) discrepancy. As an application, we retrieve the Pro\''inov Theorem. When the two distributions are supported {by the whole} $R^d$, {their} $p$-Wasserstein distance is upper bounded by the product of a (power of) their Kolmogorov-Smirnov (KS) distance with the sum of their $p$-moments. Reverse inequalities are established when one of the two distributions has a density, depending on its ${\cal L}^s$-integrability with respect to the Lebesgue measure for some $s>1$.

ai.tldr: 建立了p-Wasserstein距离与基于箱测度上确界的距离之间的不等式，并应用于Proinov定理。
ai.motivation: 比较不同概率度量之间的距离，特别是Wasserstein距离与KS距离和差异度量之间的关系。
ai.method: 通过分析支撑在[0,1]^d或R^d上的测度，利用箱测度上确界和矩条件推导上下界。
ai.result: 得到了Wasserstein距离被KS距离和p-矩乘积上界控制的结论，并在密度存在时建立了反向不等式。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了Wasserstein距离与更易计算的KS距离之间的定量关系，便于实际应用中的误差估计。

idea_spark.idea: 利用密度可积性条件改进Wasserstein距离的上界估计。
idea_spark.risk: 反向不等式依赖于密度条件，可能不适用于奇异分布。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合矩条件和分布函数差异来简化高维Wasserstein距离计算。

idea_spark.inspiration: 结合矩条件和分布函数差异来简化高维Wasserstein距离计算。

en.tldr: Establishes inequalities comparing p-Wasserstein distance to distances built as suprema of box measures, with applications to the Proinov theorem.
en.motivation: To compare different probability metrics, especially the relationship between Wasserstein distance and KS distance/discrepancy.
en.method: Analyzes measures supported on [0,1]^d or R^d, using suprema of box measures and moment conditions to derive upper and lower bounds.
en.result: Obtains upper bounds of Wasserstein distance by KS distance times p-moments, and reverse inequalities under density integrability conditions.
en.help_to_user: Provides quantitative relations between Wasserstein distance and more computable KS distance, aiding error estimation in applications.

idea_spark.idea: Improve Wasserstein upper bounds using density integrability conditions.
idea_spark.risk: Reverse inequalities rely on density conditions, may fail for singular distributions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine moment conditions and distribution function differences to simplify high-dimensional Wasserstein computation.

papers.title: Boundary-Aware Uncertainty Quantification for Wildfire Spread Prediction
papers.summary: Reliable wildfire spread prediction is vital for risk-aware emergency planning, yet most deep learning models lack principled uncertainty quantification (UQ). Further, for boundary-sensitive cases like wildfire spread, evaluating models with global metrics alone is often insufficient. To shift the focus of UQ evaluation toward a more operationally relevant approach, the Fire-Centered Evaluation Region (FCER) framework is introduced as a spatially conditioned protocol to characterize UQ within critical fire zones. Using FCER, an Ensemble is compared against an distilled single-pass student model on the WildfireSpreadTS dataset. The student model demonstrates comparable calibration and complementary uncertainty ranking in boundary-relevant regimes. Code is available at https://github. com/jonasvilhofunk/WildfireUQ-FCER

ai.tldr: 提出边界感知的不确定性量化框架FCER，用于评估野火蔓延预测模型在关键火区的表现。
ai.motivation: 现有深度学习模型缺乏可靠的不确定性量化，且全局指标不足以评估边界敏感场景。
ai.method: 引入FCER空间条件协议，在WildfireSpreadTS数据集上比较集成模型与蒸馏单通道学生模型。
ai.result: 学生模型在边界相关区域展现出可比的校准性和互补的不确定性排序。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解野火蔓延预测中不确定性量化的边界感知评估方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将不确定性量化与空间边界感知结合，提升模型在关键区域的可靠性。
idea_spark.risk: FCER依赖预定义火区边界，可能不适用于动态变化场景。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受边界感知计算机视觉任务启发，将空间条件评估引入环境预测领域。

en.tldr: Proposes a boundary-aware uncertainty quantification framework FCER for evaluating wildfire spread models in critical fire zones.
en.motivation: Existing deep learning models lack principled UQ, and global metrics are insufficient for boundary-sensitive cases.
en.method: Introduces FCER as a spatially conditioned protocol, comparing ensemble vs distilled single-pass student model on WildfireSpreadTS.
en.result: The student model shows comparable calibration and complementary uncertainty ranking in boundary-relevant regimes.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand boundary-aware evaluation of uncertainty quantification in wildfire spread prediction.

idea_spark.idea: Combine uncertainty quantification with spatial boundary awareness to improve model reliability in critical regions.
idea_spark.risk: FCER relies on predefined fire zone boundaries, which may not suit dynamic scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by boundary-aware computer vision tasks, introducing spatial conditioned evaluation into environmental prediction.

papers.title: A Partition-Based Generating Function for Row-Convex Polyominoes
papers.summary: An alternative generating function is proposed to enumerate row-convex polyominoes without internal holes on a discrete grid. The approach is based on integer partitions of the total area, where each partition corresponds to a sequence of row lengths, and the product of all permutations of the parts accounts for all possible horizontal alignments of consecutive rows. Summing over the products yields a formula for the total number of convex polyominoes of a given size. Numerical examples are provided for small areas, and the exact generating function is derived via a transfer series argument, establishing the asymptotic growth S(N) as A2^(N) cos(N*theta) + phi) with theta = arctan(sqrt(7)/3). The method establishes a direct connection between integer partitions and polyomino enumeration, offering a simple yet effective framework for both exact and asymptotic combinatorial analysis. Potential applications include shape priors in discrete image analysis, grid-based modeling, and combinatorial generation of convex structures.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于整数划分的生成函数来枚举无内孔的行凸多联骨牌，并推导出渐近增长公式。
ai.motivation: 为行凸多联骨牌提供一种简单有效的精确与渐近计数方法。
ai.method: 将总面积划分为整数划分，每个划分对应行长度序列，通过所有排列的乘积考虑所有可能的水平对齐，求和得到计数公式，并利用传递级数推导生成函数。
ai.result: 得到精确生成函数和渐近增长形式 S(N) ~ A·2^N·cos(Nθ+φ)，其中 θ = arctan(√7/3)。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何用整数划分方法计数凸多联骨牌，并应用于离散图像分析和网格建模。

idea_spark.idea: 将多联骨牌的行对齐问题转化为整数划分的排列组合，简化了计数过程。
idea_spark.risk: 该方法可能仅适用于行凸且无内孔的特殊情况，推广需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从整数划分的角度重新思考组合枚举，可能启发新的计数策略。

en.tldr: Proposes a partition-based generating function to enumerate row-convex polyominoes without holes, deriving an asymptotic growth formula.
en.motivation: To provide a simple and effective exact and asymptotic counting method for row-convex polyominoes.
en.method: Partitions the total area into integer partitions, each corresponding to a sequence of row lengths; sums over products of all permutations to account for horizontal alignments, and derives the generating function via a transfer series.
en.result: Obtains the exact generating function and asymptotic growth S(N) ~ A·2^N·cos(Nθ+φ) with θ = arctan(√7/3).
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to count convex polyominoes using integer partitions, applicable to discrete image analysis and grid-based modeling.

idea_spark.idea: Transforms the row alignment problem of polyominoes into permutations of integer partitions, simplifying counting.
idea_spark.risk: The method may be limited to row-convex hole-free cases; generalization requires validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Reconsidering combinatorial enumeration from the perspective of integer partitions may inspire new counting strategies.

papers.title: Smart Passive Acoustic Monitoring: Embedding a Classifier on AudioMoth Microcontroller
papers.summary: Passive Acoustic Monitoring (PAM) is an efficient and non-invasive method for surveying ecosystems at a reduced cost. Typically, autonomous recorders allow the acquisition of vast bioacoustic datasets which are then analyzed. However, power consumption and data storage are both scarce and limit the duration of acquisition campaigns. To address this issue, we propose a smart PAM system which allows the in-situ analysis of the soundscape by embedding a classifier directly onto an AudioMoth microcontroller. Specifically, we propose an optimized yet simple 1D Convolutional Neural Network (1D-CNN) to classify the raw audio. The model focuses on the specific call of Scopoli Shearwater seabirds (endangered species) and is trained on a real-world dataset with a classification accuracy of 91\% (balanced accuracy of 89\%). We also propose a process to optimize the model to fit the severe resource constraints of the AudioMoth, achieving a \~10kB RAM memory footprint and 20ms inference time. Finally, we present an open-source tutorial of our model optimization and export strategy which can be used for embedding models beyond the scope of our study. Our modified version of the AudioMoth firmware adds two functions: (F1) which selectively records data when the target species has been detected and (F2) which logs the continuous classification results in real time. This work intends to facilitate the conception of intelligent sensors, enhancing the efficiency and scalability of bioacoustic monitoring campaigns.

ai.tldr: 提出一种智能被动声学监测系统，在AudioMoth微控制器上嵌入1D-CNN分类器，实现原位声景分析，用于检测濒危海鸟Scopoli Shearwater的叫声。
ai.motivation: 传统PAM依赖大量数据存储和后期分析，功耗与存储限制采集时长；通过在设备端直接分类可减少数据量、延长监测周期。
ai.method: 设计轻量1D-CNN模型，对原始音频直接分类；通过模型优化（量化、剪枝等）适配AudioMoth的严格资源限制（~10kB RAM、20ms推理时间）；修改固件增加选择性记录和实时日志功能。
ai.result: 在真实数据集上达到91%分类准确率（平衡准确率89%），模型内存占用约10kB，推理时间20ms。
ai.help_to_user: 提供开源教程和优化策略，帮助研究人员将类似模型部署到低成本微控制器上，实现智能传感器。

idea_spark.idea: 结合多物种分类或异常声音检测，扩展至生态系统健康评估；或利用实时日志功能实现自适应采样策略。
idea_spark.risk: 模型在复杂声景中可能误检；微控制器计算能力有限，难以处理多类或长时音频。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将深度学习模型嵌入超低功耗设备，为长期野外监测提供新范式，启发其他物联网传感器智能化。

zh.tldr: 提出一种智能被动声学监测系统，在AudioMoth微控制器上嵌入1D-CNN分类器，实现原位声景分析，用于检测濒危海鸟Scopoli Shearwater的叫声。
zh.motivation: 传统PAM依赖大量数据存储和后期分析，功耗与存储限制采集时长；通过在设备端直接分类可减少数据量、延长监测周期。
zh.method: 设计轻量1D-CNN模型，对原始音频直接分类；通过模型优化（量化、剪枝等）适配AudioMoth的严格资源限制（~10kB RAM、20ms推理时间）；修改固件增加选择性记录和实时日志功能。
zh.result: 在真实数据集上达到91%分类准确率（平衡准确率89%），模型内存占用约10kB，推理时间20ms。
zh.help_to_user: 提供开源教程和优化策略，帮助研究人员将类似模型部署到低成本微控制器上，实现智能传感器。

idea_spark.idea: 结合多物种分类或异常声音检测，扩展至生态系统健康评估；或利用实时日志功能实现自适应采样策略。
idea_spark.risk: 模型在复杂声景中可能误检；微控制器计算能力有限，难以处理多类或长时音频。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将深度学习模型嵌入超低功耗设备，为长期野外监测提供新范式，启发其他物联网传感器智能化。

en.tldr: Proposes a smart passive acoustic monitoring system that embeds a 1D-CNN classifier on an AudioMoth microcontroller for in-situ soundscape analysis to detect the call of the endangered Scopoli Shearwater seabird.
en.motivation: Traditional PAM relies on large data storage and offline analysis, limited by power and storage; on-device classification reduces data volume and extends monitoring duration.
en.method: Designs a lightweight 1D-CNN for raw audio classification; optimizes the model (quantization, pruning) to fit AudioMoth's severe resource constraints (~10kB RAM, 20ms inference); modifies firmware to add selective recording and real-time logging.
en.result: Achieves 91% classification accuracy (balanced accuracy 89%) on a real-world dataset, with ~10kB RAM footprint and 20ms inference time.
en.help_to_user: Provides an open-source tutorial and optimization strategy to help researchers deploy similar models on low-cost microcontrollers for intelligent sensors.

idea_spark.idea: Extend to multi-species classification or anomaly detection for ecosystem health assessment; use real-time logging for adaptive sampling strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Model may misdetect in complex soundscapes; limited compute on microcontroller restricts multi-class or long-duration audio processing.
idea_spark.inspiration: Embedding deep learning on ultra-low-power devices offers a new paradigm for long-term field monitoring, inspiring other IoT sensor intelligence.

papers.title: Two Regularized Determinants of Laplacian through Resurgence theory
papers.summary: We study two types of regularizations of the determinant of Laplacian on Riemann manifold from the viewpoint of resurgence theory. One is the formal logarithmic derivative of the determinant, and the other is its exponential deformation. Under appropriate conditions, the close formulas for both regularized determinant are established through Borel-Laplace resummation which takes into account the contribution of the singularities along the analytic continuation of Theta series $\hatΘ_{D_X}$. The series resembles the trace of the heat kernel, but is defined via the spectrum of the square-root of the Laplacian. As applications, we revisit the well known formal logarithmic derivative of determinant on $S^1$ and compact Riemann surface with higher genus ($\geq2$) corresponding to the Poisson summation formula and Selberg trace formula respectively. Furthermore, the 1-Gevrey asymptotic behavior of the exponential deformation regularization at infinity is considered whose coefficients are determined by the trace of the heat kernel. In the end, we establish the relationship between the two regularized determinants. In fact, they have the same derivatives when the deformation parameter tends to $0$ in exponentially deformed regularization.

ai.tldr: 通过复兴理论研究黎曼流形上拉普拉斯算子的两种正则化行列式，建立其闭式公式并揭示关系。
ai.motivation: 为拉普拉斯行列式提供复兴理论视角下的严格正则化方法。
ai.method: 利用Borel-Laplace求和，考虑Theta级数解析延拓的奇点贡献。
ai.result: 得到两种正则化行列式的闭式公式，并证明变形参数趋于0时导数相同。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解复兴理论在谱几何中的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将指数变形正则化与热核迹的1-Gevrey渐近行为结合。
idea_spark.risk: Theta级数解析延拓的奇点结构可能复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从Selberg迹公式与Poisson求和公式的类比中获取灵感。

zh.tldr: 通过复兴理论研究黎曼流形上拉普拉斯算子的两种正则化行列式，建立其闭式公式并揭示关系。
zh.motivation: 为拉普拉斯行列式提供复兴理论视角下的严格正则化方法。
zh.method: 利用Borel-Laplace求和，考虑Theta级数解析延拓的奇点贡献。
zh.result: 得到两种正则化行列式的闭式公式，并证明变形参数趋于0时导数相同。

en.tldr: Two regularized determinants of Laplacian on Riemannian manifolds are studied via resurgence theory, yielding closed formulas and revealing their relationship.
en.motivation: To provide a rigorous regularization of Laplacian determinants from the perspective of resurgence theory.
en.method: Borel-Laplace resummation incorporating singularities of the analytic continuation of the Theta series.
en.result: Closed formulas for both regularized determinants are obtained, and their derivatives coincide as the deformation parameter tends to 0.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand applications of resurgence theory in spectral geometry.

idea_spark.risk: The singularity structure of the Theta series analytic continuation may be intricate.
idea_spark.inspiration: Analogies with Selberg trace formula and Poisson summation formula provide inspiration.

papers.title: A Proximal Augmented Lagrangian Method Based on Quadratic Approximations for Weakly Convex Optimization
papers.summary: This paper proposes QPALM, a proximal augmented Lagrangian method based on quadratic approximations, for solving nonlinear programming problems with weakly convex objective and constraint functions. The algorithm is constructed by incorporating quadratic approximations of both the objective and constraint functions into a proximal Lagrangian framework. We establish its non-asymptotic convergence rate in terms of the total number of subproblems solved. The convergence of QPALM is characterized by three metrics associated with the $\varepsilon$-KKT conditions: the squared norm of the gradient of the Moreau envelope of the Lagrangian, the average constraint violation, and the average complementarity violation. All three metrics are shown to converge at a rate of $O(T^{-1/3})$ after $T$ iterations. Preliminary numerical results demonstrate the practical efficiency of the proposed method. These results are established under two mild conditions: (i) weak convexity of all problem functions, and (ii) the existence of a strictly feasible point. The proposed QPALM is a sequentially strongly convex programming method that is readily implementable.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于二次近似的近端增广拉格朗日方法（QPALM），用于求解目标函数和约束函数均为弱凸的非线性规划问题，并证明其在ε-KKT条件下的收敛率为O(T^{-1/3})。
ai.motivation: 现有方法在处理弱凸优化问题时收敛性分析不足，需要一种可实现的、具有非渐近收敛保证的算法。
ai.method: 将目标函数和约束函数的二次近似融入近端拉格朗日框架，构造QPALM算法；每次迭代求解一个强凸子问题。
ai.result: 在弱凸性和严格可行点存在条件下，梯度Moreau包络范数平方、平均约束违反和平均互补违反三个指标均以O(T^{-1/3})速率收敛。
ai.help_to_user: 为弱凸非线性规划提供一种理论保证且易于实现的求解器，适用于机器学习、控制等领域中的非凸优化问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将QPALM中的二次近似替换为更一般的Bregman距离，可能获得更灵活的收敛性质。
idea_spark.risk: 弱凸性假设可能不适用于强非凸问题；二次近似可能引入额外计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴增广拉格朗日方法在约束优化中的成功，将其与二次近似结合以处理弱凸性，启发设计更通用的非凸优化算法。

idea_spark.idea: 将QPALM中的二次近似替换为更一般的Bregman距离，可能获得更灵活的收敛性质。
idea_spark.risk: 弱凸性假设可能不适用于强非凸问题；二次近似可能引入额外计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴增广拉格朗日方法在约束优化中的成功，将其与二次近似结合以处理弱凸性，启发设计更通用的非凸优化算法。

en.tldr: Proposes QPALM, a proximal augmented Lagrangian method using quadratic approximations, for weakly convex nonlinear programming, achieving an O(T^{-1/3}) convergence rate under ε-KKT conditions.
en.motivation: Existing methods lack non-asymptotic convergence guarantees for weakly convex optimization; a readily implementable algorithm with proven rates is needed.
en.method: Incorporates quadratic approximations of objective and constraints into a proximal Lagrangian framework, solving a strongly convex subproblem per iteration.
en.result: Under weak convexity and strict feasibility, three ε-KKT metrics (gradient norm of Moreau envelope, constraint violation, complementarity violation) converge at O(T^{-1/3}).
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretically grounded and practical solver for weakly convex nonlinear programs, useful in machine learning and control.

idea_spark.idea: Replace quadratic approximations with Bregman distances to achieve more flexible convergence properties.
idea_spark.risk: Weak convexity assumption may fail for highly nonconvex problems; quadratic approximations may increase computational cost.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging augmented Lagrangian success in constrained optimization with quadratic approximations to handle weak convexity inspires general nonconvex algorithm design.

papers.title: Synthetic Data Generation for Long-Tail Medical Image Classification: A Case Study in Skin Lesions
papers.summary: Long-tailed class distributions are pervasive in multi-class medical datasets and pose significant challenges for deep learning models which typically underperform on tail classes with limited samples. This limitation is particularly problematic in medical applications, where rare classes often correspond to severe or high-risk diseases and therefore require high diagnostic accuracy. Existing solutions-including specialized architectures, rebalanced loss functions, and handcrafted data augmentation-offer only marginal improvements and struggle to scale due to their limited and largely deterministic variability. To address these challenges, we introduce a diffusion-model-driven synthetic data augmentation pipeline tailored for medical long-tailed classification. Our approach features a novel inpainting diffusion model combined with an Out-of-Distribution (OOD) post-selection mechanism to ensure diverse, realistic, and clinically meaningful synthetic samples. Evaluated on the ISIC2019 skin lesion classification dataset, one of the largest and most imbalanced medical imaging benchmarks, our method yields substantial improvements in overall performance, with particularly pronounced gains on tail classes with more than $28\%$ improvement on the class with the fewest samples. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of diffusion-based augmentation in mitigating long-tail imbalance and enhancing medical classification robustness.

ai.tldr: 提出扩散模型驱动的合成数据增强管道，通过修复扩散模型和OOD后选择机制生成多样、真实、临床有意义的样本，在ISIC2019皮肤病变分类上显著提升尾部类别性能。
ai.motivation: 医学多类数据中长尾分布导致深度学习模型对罕见类（常对应高风险疾病）诊断精度低，现有方法（特殊架构、重平衡损失、手工增强）改进有限且确定性变异性不足。
ai.method: 设计基于修复扩散模型的合成数据增强管道，结合OOD后选择机制，确保生成样本的多样性、真实性和临床相关性。
ai.result: 在ISIC2019数据集上，整体性能大幅提升，尾部类别尤其显著，样本最少的类别提升超过28%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种利用扩散模型生成高质量合成数据以缓解医学图像分类中长尾不平衡的实用方法。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将OOD后选择机制与主动学习结合，迭代选择最有益于模型训练的合成样本。
idea_spark.risk: 合成样本可能引入伪影或偏离真实分布，需临床验证其诊断可靠性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴扩散模型在图像修复中的成功，将其应用于数据稀缺的医学尾部类别增强。

zh.help_to_user: 提供一种利用扩散模型生成高质量合成数据以缓解医学图像分类中长尾不平衡的实用方法。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将OOD后选择机制与主动学习结合，迭代选择最有益于模型训练的合成样本。
idea_spark.risk: 合成样本可能引入伪影或偏离真实分布，需临床验证其诊断可靠性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴扩散模型在图像修复中的成功，将其应用于数据稀缺的医学尾部类别增强。

en.tldr: Proposes a diffusion-model-driven synthetic data augmentation pipeline with inpainting diffusion and OOD post-selection to generate diverse, realistic, clinically meaningful samples, achieving significant gains on tail classes in ISIC2019 skin lesion classification.
en.motivation: Long-tailed class distributions in multi-class medical datasets cause deep learning models to underperform on rare classes (often high-risk diseases), while existing solutions offer limited improvements and deterministic variability.
en.method: Designs a synthetic data augmentation pipeline based on an inpainting diffusion model combined with an Out-of-Distribution (OOD) post-selection mechanism to ensure diverse, realistic, and clinically meaningful samples.
en.result: On the ISIC2019 dataset, overall performance substantially improves, with particularly pronounced gains on tail classes; the class with the fewest samples improves by over 28%.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical method using diffusion models to generate high-quality synthetic data for mitigating long-tail imbalance in medical image classification.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining the OOD post-selection mechanism with active learning to iteratively select the most beneficial synthetic samples for model training.
idea_spark.risk: Synthetic samples may introduce artifacts or deviate from the true distribution, requiring clinical validation of diagnostic reliability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws inspiration from the success of diffusion models in image inpainting, applying them to augment scarce medical tail classes.

papers.title: Reservoir property image slices from the Groningen gas field for image translation and segmentation
papers.summary: Reservoir characterization workflows increasingly rely on image-based and machine-learning/deep learning or even generative AI approaches, but openly available geological image datasets suitable for reproducible benchmarking remain limited. Here we describe a high-resolution dataset of reservoir-property image slices derived from the Groningen static geological model. The dataset contains aligned two-dimensional PNG images representing facies, porosity, permeability, and water saturation, generated from three-dimensional reservoir grids and prepared for downstream visualization, segmentation, and image-to-image translation tasks. In addition to the deposited original image corpus, we provide an archived software workflow for reproducing augmentation, mask generation, paired-image construction, and example baseline experiments. The resource is designed to support benchmarking of geological image analysis methods and the study of cross-domain relationships among reservoir properties. By separating the fixed image dataset from the reproducible processing workflow, this work provides a transparent foundation for reuse in geoscience, reservoir modeling, and machine-learning applications.

ai.tldr: 公开了格罗宁根气田储层属性图像切片数据集，包含相、孔隙度、渗透率和含水饱和度对齐的二维PNG图像，并提供了可复现的处理工作流。
ai.motivation: 现有公开地质图像数据集稀缺，难以支持可重复的基准测试。
ai.method: 从三维静态地质模型生成二维切片，并构建对齐的多属性图像对，同时提供数据增强、掩码生成和基线实验的软件工作流。
ai.result: 发布了包含相、孔隙度、渗透率和含水饱和度的高分辨率图像数据集及配套处理流程。
ai.help_to_user: 可用于地质图像分析、图像分割和图像翻译方法的基准测试与跨域关系研究。

idea_spark.idea: 利用该数据集训练多任务模型，同时预测多个储层属性图。
idea_spark.risk: 数据集仅基于单一气田模型，可能限制模型泛化能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将地质建模与计算机视觉方法结合，推动地球科学中的可重复AI研究。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将地质建模与计算机视觉方法结合，推动地球科学中的可重复AI研究。

en.tldr: A high-resolution dataset of reservoir property image slices from the Groningen gas field, including aligned facies, porosity, permeability, and water saturation images, along with a reproducible processing workflow.
en.motivation: Openly available geological image datasets for reproducible benchmarking are limited.
en.method: 2D slices are extracted from a 3D static geological model, aligned multi-property image pairs are constructed, and a software workflow for augmentation, mask generation, and baseline experiments is provided.
en.result: A dataset of facies, porosity, permeability, and water saturation images and a reproducible processing workflow are released.
en.help_to_user: Supports benchmarking of geological image analysis, segmentation, and image-to-image translation methods, and study of cross-domain relationships among reservoir properties.

idea_spark.idea: Train a multi-task model to simultaneously predict multiple reservoir property maps from this dataset.
idea_spark.risk: The dataset is based on a single gas field model, which may limit model generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining geological modeling with computer vision methods to promote reproducible AI research in geoscience.

papers.title: TACO: Trajectory Aligning Cross-view Optimisation
papers.summary: Cross-View Geo-localisation (CVGL) matches ground imagery against satellite tiles to give absolute position fixes, an alternative to GNSS where signals are occluded, jammed, or spoofed. Recent fine-grained CVGL methods regress sub-tile metric pose, but have only been evaluated as one-shot localisers, never as the primary fix in a live pipeline. Inertial sensing provides high-rate relative motion, but accumulates unbounded drift without an absolute anchor. We propose TACO, a tightly-coupled IMU + fine-grained CVGL pipeline that consumes a single GNSS reading at start-up and thereafter operates on onboard sensing alone. A closed-form cross-track error model triggers CVGL before IMU drift exceeds the matcher's capture radius, and a forward-biased five-point multi-crop search keeps inference cost fixed at five forward passes per fix. A yaw-residual gate rejects fixes that disagree with the onboard compass, and an anisotropic body-frame noise model scales each Unscented Kalman Filter update by per-fix confidence. A factor graph with vetted loop closures provides an offline smoothed trajectory. On the KITTI raw dataset, TACO reduces median Absolute Trajectory Error (ATE) from 97.0m (IMU-only) to 16.3m, a 5.9 times reduction, at <0.1 ms per-frame fusion cost and a 5-10% camera duty cycle. Code is available: github.com/tavisshore/TACO.

ai.tldr: 提出TACO，一种紧耦合IMU与细粒度跨视角地理定位的管道，仅需启动时一次GNSS读数，后续完全依赖机载传感器，在KITTI数据集上将中位绝对轨迹误差从97.0米降至16.3米。
ai.motivation: 现有细粒度跨视角定位方法仅作为一次性定位器评估，未集成到实时管道中；惯性传感提供高率相对运动但累积无界漂移，缺乏绝对锚点。
ai.method: 闭环跨轨误差模型触发CVGL；前向偏置五点多裁剪搜索固定推理成本；偏航残差门拒绝与罗盘不一致的定位；各向异性机体噪声模型缩放UKF更新；因子图提供离线平滑轨迹。
ai.result: 在KITTI原始数据集上，中位ATE从97.0米（仅IMU）降至16.3米，降低5.9倍，每帧融合成本<0.1毫秒，相机占空比5-10%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需持续GNSS即可实现高精度定位的替代方案，适用于信号遮挡、干扰或欺骗场景。

idea_spark.idea: 利用跨轨误差模型自适应触发重定位，可推广至其他需要周期性绝对修正的长期导航系统。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖初始GNSS读数，在完全无GNSS启动场景下可能失效；多裁剪搜索的固定前向次数可能无法覆盖极端漂移。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将定位置信度建模为各向异性噪声并融入UKF更新，启发更精细的不确定性传播方法。

zh.tldr: 提出TACO，一种紧耦合IMU与细粒度跨视角地理定位的管道，仅需启动时一次GNSS读数，后续完全依赖机载传感器，在KITTI数据集上将中位绝对轨迹误差从97.0米降至16.3米。
zh.motivation: 现有细粒度跨视角定位方法仅作为一次性定位器评估，未集成到实时管道中；惯性传感提供高率相对运动但累积无界漂移，缺乏绝对锚点。
zh.method: 闭环跨轨误差模型触发CVGL；前向偏置五点多裁剪搜索固定推理成本；偏航残差门拒绝与罗盘不一致的定位；各向异性机体噪声模型缩放UKF更新；因子图提供离线平滑轨迹。
zh.result: 在KITTI原始数据集上，中位ATE从97.0米（仅IMU）降至16.3米，降低5.9倍，每帧融合成本<0.1毫秒，相机占空比5-10%。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种无需持续GNSS即可实现高精度定位的替代方案，适用于信号遮挡、干扰或欺骗场景。

idea_spark.idea: 利用跨轨误差模型自适应触发重定位，可推广至其他需要周期性绝对修正的长期导航系统。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖初始GNSS读数，在完全无GNSS启动场景下可能失效；多裁剪搜索的固定前向次数可能无法覆盖极端漂移。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将定位置信度建模为各向异性噪声并融入UKF更新，启发更精细的不确定性传播方法。

en.tldr: Proposes TACO, a tightly-coupled IMU + fine-grained CVGL pipeline that requires only a single GNSS reading at startup and operates on onboard sensing thereafter, reducing median ATE from 97.0m to 16.3m on KITTI raw dataset.
en.motivation: Existing fine-grained CVGL methods are evaluated only as one-shot localizers, never integrated into a live pipeline; inertial sensing provides high-rate relative motion but accumulates unbounded drift without an absolute anchor.
en.method: Closed-form cross-track error model triggers CVGL; forward-biased five-point multi-crop search fixes inference cost; yaw-residual gate rejects fixes disagreeing with compass; anisotropic body-frame noise model scales UKF updates; factor graph provides offline smoothed trajectory.
en.result: On KITTI raw dataset, median ATE reduced from 97.0m (IMU-only) to 16.3m, a 5.9x reduction, at <0.1 ms per-frame fusion cost and 5-10% camera duty cycle.
en.help_to_user: Provides a high-precision localization alternative without continuous GNSS, suitable for occluded, jammed, or spoofed signal environments.

idea_spark.idea: Adaptive triggering of relocalization via cross-track error model can be generalized to other long-term navigation systems needing periodic absolute corrections.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on initial GNSS reading; may fail in fully GNSS-denied startup scenarios; fixed forward passes of multi-crop search may not cover extreme drift.
idea_spark.inspiration: Modeling localization confidence as anisotropic noise and incorporating it into UKF updates inspires more refined uncertainty propagation methods.

papers.title: First Shape, Then Meaning: Efficient Geometry and Semantics Learning for Indoor Reconstruction
papers.summary: Neural Surface Reconstruction has become a standard methodology for indoor 3D reconstruction, with Signed Distance Functions (SDFs) proving particularly effective for representing scene geometry. A variety of applications require a detailed understanding of the scene context, driving the need for object-level semantic signals. While recent methods successfully integrate semantic labels, they often inherit the slow training time and limited scalability of multi-SDF learning. In this paper, we introduce FSTM, a unified approach for learning geometry and semantics through a two-step process: a geometry warm-up using RGB inputs and geometric cues, followed by semantic field estimation. By first optimising geometry without semantic supervision, we observe substantial improvements compared to the standard joint optimisation. Rather than relying on specialised modules or complex multi-SDF designs, FSTM shows that a streamlined formulation is sufficient to achieve strong geometric and semantic reconstructions. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world indoor datasets show that our method outperforms multi-SDF approaches. It trains 2.3x faster on Replica, improves robustness to real-world imperfections on ScanNet++, and achieves higher recall by recovering the surfaces of more objects in the scene. The code will be made available at https://remichierchia.github.io/FSTM.

ai.tldr: 提出FSTM方法，通过先几何后语义的两阶段学习，实现室内场景的高效几何与语义重建。
ai.motivation: 现有方法联合优化几何与语义，训练慢且可扩展性差，需要更高效的统一框架。
ai.method: 先利用RGB和几何线索进行几何预热，再估计语义场，避免复杂多SDF设计。
ai.result: 在Replica上训练快2.3倍，在ScanNet++上鲁棒性更强，物体表面召回率更高。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种简化且高效的室内重建方案，适合需要快速获取几何与语义信息的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将几何预热与语义估计分离，减少任务干扰。
idea_spark.risk: 语义场估计可能依赖几何质量，几何误差会传播。
idea_spark.inspiration: 先学习基础结构再添加语义，类似人类认知顺序。

en.tldr: FSTM proposes a two-step geometry-then-semantics learning for efficient indoor reconstruction.
en.motivation: Existing joint optimization methods are slow and poorly scalable; a unified efficient framework is needed.
en.method: First warm up geometry with RGB and geometric cues, then estimate semantic fields, avoiding complex multi-SDF designs.
en.result: 2.3x faster training on Replica, improved robustness on ScanNet++, higher object surface recall.
en.help_to_user: Offers a simplified, efficient indoor reconstruction pipeline suitable for applications requiring fast geometry and semantics.

idea_spark.idea: Explore decoupling geometry warm-up from semantic estimation to reduce task interference.
idea_spark.risk: Semantic field estimation may depend on geometry quality; geometry errors can propagate.
idea_spark.inspiration: Learn basic structure first then add semantics, akin to human cognitive order.

papers.title: Agent-Based Modeling of Low-Emission Fertilizer Adoption for Dairy Farm Decarbonisation using Empirical Farm Data
papers.summary: To understand complex system dynamics in dairy farming, it is essential to use modeling tools that capture farm heterogeneity, social interactions, and cumulative environmental impacts. This study proposes an agent-based modeling (ABM) framework to simulate nitrogen management and the adoption of low-emission fertilizer across 295 Irish dairy farms over a 15-year period. Using empirical data, the model represents farm communication through a social network, capturing peer influence and discussion group dynamics, where adoption probabilities are driven by social contagion, farm-scale characteristics, and policy interventions such as subsidies and carbon taxes. The framework estimates sectoral greenhouse gas emissions, cumulative abatement, and private-social cost trade-offs, using Monte Carlo simulation and sensitivity analysis to quantify uncertainty. The model shows strong agreement with observed adoption trajectories ($R^2 = 0.979$, RMSE = 0.0274) and is validated against empirical data using a Kolmogorov-Smirnov test (D = 0.2407, p < 0.001), indicating its ability to reproduce structural patterns in adoption behavior. Adoption dynamics are further characterized using a logistic diffusion model consistent with Rogers' innovation diffusion theory, capturing progression from early adoption to a saturation level of approximately 91%. By framing decarbonization as a socio-technical diffusion process rather than a purely economic optimization problem, this study provides an in silico policy laboratory for evaluating the robustness and diffusion speed of climate mitigation strategies prior to implementation.

ai.tldr: 基于295个爱尔兰奶牛场的实证数据，构建了一个智能体模型，模拟低排放肥料的采纳过程，并评估了社会传染、农场特征和政策干预对减排效果的影响。
ai.motivation: 奶牛养殖的脱碳需要理解农场异质性、社会互动和累积环境影响的复杂系统动态。
ai.method: 提出了一个智能体建模框架，利用经验数据构建社会网络，通过蒙特卡洛模拟和敏感性分析量化不确定性，并用Kolmogorov-Smirnov检验验证模型。
ai.result: 模型与观测采纳轨迹高度一致（R²=0.979，RMSE=0.0274），预测饱和采纳率约91%，验证了社会技术扩散过程而非纯经济优化的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助政策制定者在实施前评估气候减缓策略的稳健性和扩散速度。

idea_spark.idea: 结合社会网络分析和政策模拟，为奶牛场脱碳提供数字实验室。
idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖实证数据质量，社会网络结构假设可能简化真实互动。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将脱碳视为社会技术扩散过程，启发跨学科政策设计。

en.motivation: Decarbonising dairy farming requires modeling tools that capture farm heterogeneity, social interactions, and cumulative environmental impacts.
en.method: An agent-based modeling framework with empirical social networks, Monte Carlo simulation, sensitivity analysis, and Kolmogorov-Smirnov validation.
en.result: The model closely matches observed adoption (R²=0.979, RMSE=0.0274), predicts ~91% saturation, and validates a socio-technical diffusion process over purely economic optimization.
en.help_to_user: Provides an in silico policy laboratory to evaluate robustness and diffusion speed of climate mitigation strategies before implementation.

papers.title: Quantitative stability for the Trudinger-Moser inequality
papers.summary: We establich quantitative stability estimates for the Trudinger-Moser inequality on smooth, bounded domains in the Euclidean plane. More specifically, we prove that the deficit in the Trudinger-Moser inequality quadratically controls the distance to the set of optimizers if either (i) the exponential rate of growth is sufficiently small or (ii) the domain is a round disk. The latter estimate remains valid even in the critical case. Both proofs rely on a new spectral gap that we prove, which may be of independent interest. Additionally we show that the same stability estimate holds in the nondegenerate case, and that this occurs generically.

ai.tldr: 建立了欧几里得平面上光滑有界域中Trudinger-Moser不等式的定量稳定性估计。
ai.motivation: 量化Trudinger-Moser不等式的余量与其最优函数集之间的距离关系。
ai.method: 通过证明新的谱间隙，并分别处理指数增长率较小和圆盘域两种情形。
ai.result: 在指数增长率较小或域为圆盘时，余量二次控制距离；非退化情形下稳定性估计同样成立。
ai.help_to_user: 为变分不等式和临界指数问题提供定量稳定性分析工具。

idea_spark.idea: 利用谱间隙将余量估计转化为距离控制，可能适用于更多几何不等式。
idea_spark.risk: 谱间隙的证明可能依赖于特定域或增长条件，推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将类似稳定性分析应用于非欧几何或高维临界不等式。

en.tldr: Quantitative stability estimates for the Trudinger-Moser inequality on smooth bounded domains in the Euclidean plane are established.
en.motivation: To quantify the relationship between the deficit of the Trudinger-Moser inequality and the distance to the set of optimizers.
en.method: By proving a new spectral gap, and treating separately the cases of small exponential growth rate and round disk domain.
en.result: The deficit quadratically controls the distance when the exponential growth rate is small or the domain is a round disk; the estimate also holds in the nondegenerate case.
en.help_to_user: Provides quantitative stability analysis tools for variational inequalities and critical exponent problems.

idea_spark.idea: Using spectral gaps to convert deficit estimates into distance control may apply to more geometric inequalities.
idea_spark.risk: The proof of the spectral gap may depend on specific domains or growth conditions, requiring caution in generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying similar stability analysis to non-Euclidean geometries or higher-dimensional critical inequalities.

papers.title: Going Public: Communication in Collective Decisions
papers.summary: A principal and $n\ge 2$ agents can launch a project if the principal proposes it and at least $k$ agents accept. Their individual payoffs from the project depend on an ex ante unknown state. The principal can conduct a test to learn about the state and then communicate her findings to the agents via cheap talk. This paper focuses on comparing two communication regimes: public and private messaging. We show that public messaging is weakly dominant: any outcome implementable under private messaging can also be implemented under public messaging. Moreover, in a canonical environment with linear payoffs, we characterize the principal's optimal test in each regime and show that public messaging can be strictly dominant if and only if there exist two agents who are the principal's conflicting allies.

ai.tldr: 研究委托人与多个代理人通过廉价沟通进行集体决策时，公开沟通优于私下沟通，并刻画了严格占优的条件。
ai.motivation: 比较公开与私下两种沟通机制在集体决策中的效率，寻找最优信息设计。
ai.method: 建立委托-代理模型，通过廉价沟通分析两种沟通机制下的可实施结果，并在线性支付环境下刻画最优测试。
ai.result: 公开沟通弱占优；当且仅当存在两个与委托人冲突的盟友时，公开沟通严格占优。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解集体决策中沟通方式对信息传递和决策效率的影响。

idea_spark.idea: 设计基于公开沟通的激励机制，利用冲突盟友关系提升决策质量。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设线性支付和廉价沟通，实际中可能存在信息扭曲或策略性隐瞒。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将公开沟通与冲突盟友的概念应用于组织内部决策流程优化。
