en.tldr: Using the Rational Speech Act framework, we show that English compounds and derivations reflect a trade-off between speaker production cost and listener recoverability.
en.motivation: Prior work rarely models morphological composition as a historically situated speaker choice among competing morpheme sequences, leaving unexplained why a language settles on one combination over alternatives.
en.method: We constructed a time-indexed lexicon from COHA and COCA, and compared 4323 attested English compounds and derivations (1820–2019) against unattested alternatives generated from contemporaneously available morphemes within the RSA framework.
en.result: Attested compositions systematically outperform alternatives in MRR and top-k accuracy; the pragmatic speaker model's advantage grows with candidate set size.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into rational communication principles underlying morphological composition, offering a new perspective for lexicalization studies in computational linguistics.

idea_spark.idea: Apply similar methods to study historical evolution of Chinese compounds, or design more efficient machine translation vocabularies.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on completeness and representativeness of historical corpora, potentially missing morphological changes in spoken language or dialects.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires applying communication efficiency principles to lemmatization or neologism generation in NLP.

papers.title: Mix3R: Mixing Feed-forward Reconstruction and Generative 3D Priors for Joint Multi-view Aligned 3D Reconstruction and Pose Estimation
papers.summary: Recent trends in sparse-view 3D reconstruction have taken two different paths: feed-forward reconstruction that predicts pixel-aligned point maps without a complete geometry, and generative 3D reconstruction that generates complete geometry but often with poor input-alignment. We present Mix3R, a novel generative 3D reconstruction method which mixes feed-forward reconstruction and 3D generation into a single framework in an aligned manner. Mix3R generates a 3D shape in two stages: a sparse voxel generation stage and a textured geometry generation stage. Unlike pure generative methods, our first-stage generation jointly produces a coarse 3D structure (sparse voxels), per-view point maps and camera parameters aligned to that 3D structure. This is made possible by introducing a Mixture-of-Transformers architecture that inserts global self-attentions to a feed-forward reconstruction model and a 3D generative model, both pretrained on large-scale data. This design effectively retains the pretrained priors but enables better 2D-3D alignment. Based on the initial aligned generations of sparse 3D voxels and point maps, we compute an overlap-based attention bias that is directly added to another pretrained textured geometry generation model, enabling it to correctly place input textures onto generated shapes in a training-free manner. Our design brings mutual benefits to both feed-forward reconstruction and 3D generation: The feed-forward branch learns to ground its predictions to a generative 3D prior, and conversely, the 3D generation branch is conditioned on geometrically informative features from the feed-forward branch. As a result, our method produces 3D shapes with better input alignment compared with pure 3D generative methods, together with camera pose estimations more accurate than previous feed-forward reconstruction methods. Our project page is at https://jsnln.github.io/mix3r/

ai.tldr: 提出Mix3R，将前馈重建与生成式3D先验混合，实现联合多视图对齐的3D重建和姿态估计。
ai.motivation: 前馈重建缺乏完整几何，生成式重建对齐性差，Mix3R旨在结合两者优势。
ai.method: 两阶段生成：稀疏体素生成阶段（联合输出粗3D结构、点图和相机参数）和纹理几何生成阶段；使用Mixture-of-Transformers架构融合预训练模型。
ai.result: 生成的3D形状对齐性优于纯生成方法，相机姿态估计比前馈重建更准确。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需训练即可对齐输入纹理的3D重建方法，同时输出准确的相机姿态。

idea_spark.idea: 利用重叠注意力偏置引导预训练纹理生成模型，实现训练自由的纹理放置。
idea_spark.risk: 两阶段生成可能累积误差，稀疏体素阶段的质量直接影响最终结果。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将前馈重建的几何信息作为条件注入生成模型，可提升生成结果的对齐性。

en.tldr: Mix3R mixes feed-forward reconstruction and generative 3D priors for joint multi-view aligned 3D reconstruction and pose estimation.
en.motivation: Feed-forward reconstruction lacks complete geometry, while generative reconstruction suffers from poor input alignment; Mix3R aims to combine their strengths.
en.method: Two-stage generation: sparse voxel generation (jointly outputs coarse 3D structure, per-view point maps, and camera parameters) and textured geometry generation; uses Mixture-of-Transformers to fuse pretrained models.
en.result: Generated 3D shapes have better input alignment than pure generative methods, and camera pose estimation is more accurate than previous feed-forward methods.
en.help_to_user: Provides a training-free method to align input textures onto generated shapes while outputting accurate camera poses.

idea_spark.idea: Use overlap-based attention bias to guide a pretrained texture generation model for training-free texture placement.
idea_spark.risk: Two-stage generation may accumulate errors; the quality of the sparse voxel stage directly affects the final result.
idea_spark.inspiration: Injecting geometric information from feed-forward reconstruction as conditioning into generative models can improve alignment of generated outputs.

papers.title: Multipath Exploitation in Highly Reflective Environments for Enhanced Microwave Imaging via Inverse Source Reconstruction
papers.summary: Multipath effects significantly influence the quality of microwave imaging in highly reflective environments, while the physical measurement aperture size constrains resolution. It is shown that by exploiting multipath reflections, improved resolution can be achieved while maintaining acceptable artifact levels. Based on image theory, strong scattered fields from an ideal reflection plane can be represented by virtual image sources. Using a single-frequency inverse source solver, the spatially distributed original and image sources are reconstructed and separated, which allows separate application of the imaging algorithm for both of them. The coherent combination of both sets of sources together with appropriate phase correction results in an effective aperture expansion that yields superior resolution. Furthermore, this separation strategy significantly mitigates interference artifacts. Simulation results, supported by theoretical analysis and comparison with a ray-tracing enhanced backprojection algorithm are presented to verify the effectiveness of the proposed approach.

ai.tldr: 通过利用多径反射和逆源重建，在强反射环境中实现微波成像的孔径扩展和分辨率提升。
ai.motivation: 强反射环境中的多径效应通常降低成像质量，而物理测量孔径限制了分辨率。
ai.method: 基于镜像理论，将反射平面产生的强散射场表示为虚拟镜像源，通过单频逆源求解器重建并分离原始源和镜像源，对两者分别成像后相干组合并相位校正，实现有效孔径扩展。
ai.result: 仿真验证表明，该方法相比射线追踪增强反投影算法，显著提高了分辨率并减少了伪影。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用多径效应而非抑制它来提升微波成像性能。

idea_spark.idea: 将逆源重建与镜像源分离结合，实现孔径合成，是一种新颖的成像增强思路。
idea_spark.risk: 实际环境中反射面非理想，可能引入模型误差；多径分离的鲁棒性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在复杂电磁环境中主动利用多径信息，而非仅将其视为干扰。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用多径效应而非抑制它来提升微波成像性能。

en.tldr: By exploiting multipath reflections and inverse source reconstruction, aperture expansion and resolution improvement are achieved in highly reflective environments for microwave imaging.
en.motivation: Multipath effects degrade imaging quality in reflective environments, and physical aperture size limits resolution.
en.method: Using image theory, strong scattered fields from a reflection plane are represented as virtual image sources. A single-frequency inverse source solver reconstructs and separates original and image sources. Both sets are imaged separately, then coherently combined with phase correction to expand the effective aperture.
en.result: Simulations demonstrate superior resolution and reduced artifacts compared to a ray-tracing enhanced backprojection algorithm.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage multipath effects rather than suppress them to improve microwave imaging performance.

idea_spark.idea: Combining inverse source reconstruction with image source separation for aperture synthesis is a novel imaging enhancement approach.
idea_spark.risk: Non-ideal reflection planes in real environments may introduce model errors; robustness of multipath separation needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires active utilization of multipath information in complex electromagnetic environments rather than treating it solely as interference.

papers.title: Self-Improvement for Fast, High-Quality Plan Generation
papers.summary: Generative models trained on synthetic plan data are a promising approach to generalized planning. Recent work has focused on finding any valid plan, rather than a high-quality solution. We address the challenge of producing high-quality plans, a computationally hard problem, in sub-exponential time. First, we demonstrate that, given optimal data, a decoder-only transformer can generate high-quality plans for unseen problem instances. Second, we show how to self-improve an initial model trained on sub-optimal data. Each round of self-improvement combines multiple model calls with graph search to generate improved plans, used for model fine-tuning. An experimental study on four domains: Blocksworld, Logistics, Labyrinth, and Sokoban, shows on average a 30% reduction in plan length over the source symbolic planner, with over 80% of plans being optimal, where the optimum is known. Plan quality is further improved by inference-time search. The model's latency scales sub-exponentially in contrast to the satisficing and optimal symbolic planners to which we compare. Together, these results suggest that self-improvement with generative models offers a scalable approach for high-quality plan generation.

ai.tldr: 提出一种自改进方法，利用生成模型和搜索快速生成高质量规划方案，在四个领域平均缩短30%规划长度。
ai.motivation: 现有生成式规划方法侧重找到任意有效方案，而非高质量方案；高质量规划是计算难题，需在亚指数时间内解决。
ai.method: 先用次优数据训练解码器Transformer，再通过多轮自改进：每轮结合多次模型调用与图搜索生成更优规划，用于模型微调。
ai.result: 在Blocksworld等四个领域，规划长度平均减少30%，超过80%规划达到最优；推理时搜索进一步提升质量，延迟呈亚指数增长。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户快速生成高质量规划方案，适用于物流、迷宫等需要高效路径或步骤的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将模型生成与外部搜索结合，迭代优化输出，无需人工标注最优数据。
idea_spark.risk: 自改进可能收敛到局部最优；依赖搜索质量，复杂领域搜索成本高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受强化学习中自我对弈启发，将搜索作为策略改进工具，类似AlphaGo的思路。

idea_spark.risk: 自改进可能收敛到局部最优；依赖搜索质量，复杂领域搜索成本高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受强化学习中自我对弈启发，将搜索作为策略改进工具，类似AlphaGo的思路。

en.tldr: Proposes a self-improvement method combining generative models with graph search to generate high-quality plans quickly, achieving 30% average plan length reduction across four domains.
en.motivation: Existing generative planning focuses on any valid plan rather than high-quality solutions; high-quality planning is computationally hard and needs sub-exponential time.
en.method: Train a decoder-only transformer on sub-optimal data, then iteratively self-improve by combining multiple model calls with graph search to generate better plans for fine-tuning.
en.result: Average 30% reduction in plan length across Blocksworld, Logistics, Labyrinth, and Sokoban; over 80% of plans optimal; inference-time search further improves quality; latency scales sub-exponentially.
en.help_to_user: Helps users generate high-quality plans quickly for logistics, maze navigation, and other sequential decision-making tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Combine model generation with external search to iteratively refine outputs without requiring optimal training data.
idea_spark.risk: Self-improvement may converge to local optima; search cost can be high in complex domains.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by self-play in reinforcement learning, using search as a policy improvement tool, similar to AlphaGo.

papers.title: MEMTIER: Tiered Memory Architecture and Retrieval Bottleneck Analysis for Long-Running Autonomous AI Agents
papers.summary: Long-running autonomous AI agents suffer from a well-documented memory coherence problem: tool-execution success rates degrade 14 percentage points over 72-hour operation windows due to four compounding failure modes in existing flat-file memory systems. We present MEMTIER, a tripartite memory architecture for the OpenClaw agent runtime that introduces a structured episodic JSONL store, a five-signal weighted retrieval engine, an attention-attributed cognitive weight update loop, an asynchronous consolidation daemon promoting episodic facts to a semantic tier, and a PPO-based policy framework for adapting retrieval weights (infrastructure validated; performance gains pending camera-ready). On the full 500-question LongMemEval-S benchmark (Wu et al., 2025), MEMTIER achieves Acc=0.382, F1=0.412 with Qwen2.5-7B on a consumer 6GB GPU - a +33 percentage point improvement over the full-context baseline (0.050 -> 0.382, i.e., 5% -> 38%). With DeepSeek-V4-Flash fact pre-population, single-session recall reaches 0.686-0.714, exceeding the paper's RAG BM25 GPT-4o baseline (0.560) on those categories. Temporal reasoning rises to 0.323 and multi-session synthesis to 0.173, demonstrating that structured semantic pre-population qualitatively changes what lightweight retrieval can achieve. All phases run locally on a consumer laptop with a 6GB GPU.

ai.tldr: 提出MEMTIER三层记忆架构，通过结构化存储、加权检索和PPO策略，将长期自主AI代理的工具执行成功率提升33个百分点。
ai.motivation: 现有平面记忆系统在长期运行中导致工具执行成功率每72小时下降14个百分点，存在四种复合故障模式。
ai.method: 设计包含情节JSONL存储、五信号加权检索引擎、注意力归因认知权重更新循环、异步合并守护进程和PPO策略框架的三层记忆架构。
ai.result: 在LongMemEval-S基准上，Qwen2.5-7B模型在6GB GPU上达到Acc=0.382，F1=0.412，比全上下文基线提升33个百分点；DeepSeek-V4-Flash预填充后单会话召回达0.686-0.714。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过结构化记忆架构解决长期自主AI代理的记忆一致性问题，并指导轻量级检索系统的设计。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将PPO策略用于动态调整检索权重，或利用异步合并守护进程实现知识从情节到语义的自动升级。
idea_spark.risk: PPO策略可能引入训练不稳定风险，且异步合并守护进程可能增加系统延迟。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类记忆分层（情节记忆→语义记忆）启发，将认知科学原理应用于AI记忆系统设计。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将PPO策略用于动态调整检索权重，或利用异步合并守护进程实现知识从情节到语义的自动升级。

en.tldr: MEMTIER introduces a tripartite memory architecture with structured episodic storage, weighted retrieval, and PPO-based policy, improving tool-execution success rates by 33 percentage points for long-running autonomous AI agents.
en.motivation: Existing flat-file memory systems cause a 14 percentage point degradation in tool-execution success rates over 72-hour operation due to four compounding failure modes.
en.method: Designs a tripartite memory architecture including an episodic JSONL store, a five-signal weighted retrieval engine, an attention-attributed cognitive weight update loop, an asynchronous consolidation daemon, and a PPO-based policy framework.
en.result: On LongMemEval-S, Qwen2.5-7B achieves Acc=0.382, F1=0.412 on a 6GB GPU, a +33 percentage point improvement over the full-context baseline; DeepSeek-V4-Flash pre-population yields single-session recall of 0.686-0.714.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how structured memory architectures can address memory coherence in long-running autonomous agents and guide lightweight retrieval system design.

idea_spark.idea: Explore using PPO policy for dynamic retrieval weight adjustment, or leverage the asynchronous consolidation daemon for automatic knowledge promotion from episodic to semantic tiers.
idea_spark.risk: PPO policy may introduce training instability, and the asynchronous consolidation daemon could increase system latency.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human memory stratification (episodic to semantic memory), applying cognitive science principles to AI memory system design.

papers.title: VLMaxxing through FrameMogging Training-Free Anti-Recomputation for Video Vision-Language Models
papers.summary: Video vision-language models (VLMs) keep paying for visual state the stream already told us was stable. The factory wall did not move, but most VLM pipelines still hand the model dense RGB frames or a fresh prefix again. We study that waste as training-free anti-recomputation: reuse state when validation says it survives, and buy fresh evidence when the scene, query, or cache topology requires it.   The largest measured win is after ingest. On frozen Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct-4bit, adaptive same-video follow-up reuse preserves paired choices and correctness on a 93-query VideoMME breadth setting while reducing follow-up latency by 14.90-35.92x. The first query is still cold; the win starts when later questions reuse the same video state. Stress tests bound the result: repeated-question schedules hold through 50 turns, while dense-answer-anchored prompt variation separates conservative fixed K=1 repair from faster aggressive policies that drift.   Fresh-video pruning is smaller but real. C-VISION skips timed vision-tower work before the first answer is generated. On Gemma 4-E4B-4bit, the clean 32f short cell reaches 1.316x first-query speedup with no paired drift or parse failures on 20 items; Qwen shows the fidelity/speed boundary.   Stage-share ceiling (C-CEILING) is the accounting guardrail: a component speedup becomes an end-to-end speedup only in proportion to the wall-clock share it accelerates, so C-VISION and after-ingest follow-up reuse do not multiply. Candidate C-STREAM remains a native-rate target, not a headline result here. The broader direction is VLM-native media that expose change, motion, uncertainty, object state, sensor time, and active tiles directly, so models do not have to rediscover the world from dense RGB every frame.

ai.tldr: 提出训练无关的反重计算方法，通过复用稳定视频状态减少VLM计算浪费，实现后续查询延迟降低14.90-35.92倍。
ai.motivation: 视频VLM在静态场景中反复处理冗余RGB帧，造成大量计算浪费。
ai.method: 基于验证的稳定状态复用与按需获取新证据，结合C-VISION剪枝和C-CEILING核算。
ai.result: 后续查询延迟降低14.90-35.92倍，首查询加速1.316倍，50轮对话保持正确性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不重新训练模型的情况下大幅降低视频VLM推理成本。

idea_spark.risk: 过度复用可能导致漂移，需平衡保守与激进策略。

en.tldr: Proposes training-free anti-recomputation that reuses stable video state to reduce VLM computation waste, achieving 14.90-35.92x follow-up latency reduction.
en.motivation: Video VLMs waste computation by repeatedly processing redundant RGB frames in static scenes.

papers.title: cotomi Act: Learning to Automate Work by Watching You
papers.summary: What if a browser agent could learn your work simply by watching you do it? We present cotomi Act, a browser-based computer-using agent that combines reliable multi-step task execution with persistent organizational knowledge learned from user behavior. For execution, an agent scaffold with adaptive lazy observation, verbal-diff-based history compression, coarse-grained actions, and test-time scaling via best-of-N action selection achieves 80.4% on the 179-task WebArena human-evaluation subset, exceeding the reported 78.2% human baseline. For organizational knowledge, a behavior-to-knowledge pipeline passively observes the user's browsing and progressively abstracts it into artifacts (task boards, wiki) exposed through a shared workspace editable by both user and agent. A controlled proxy evaluation confirms that task success improves as behavior-derived knowledge accumulates. In our live demonstration, attendees interact with the system in a real browser, issuing tasks and observing end-to-end autonomous execution and shared knowledge management.

ai.tldr: 提出一个名为cotomi Act的浏览器代理，通过观察用户行为自动学习并执行多步任务，在WebArena测试中超越人类基线。
ai.motivation: 让浏览器代理能够从用户日常操作中被动学习组织知识，从而自动化重复性工作，减少用户手动配置。
ai.method: 结合自适应懒观察、基于文本差异的历史压缩、粗粒度动作和最佳N选一的测试时扩展作为执行框架；通过行为到知识流水线将用户浏览行为逐步抽象为任务板和维基等工件。
ai.result: 在179个任务的WebArena人工评估子集上达到80.4%的成功率，超过人类基线78.2%；代理评估表明知识积累能提升任务成功率。
ai.help_to_user: 用户只需正常浏览，系统即可自动学习其工作模式并生成可共享的知识工件，从而简化后续任务自动化。

idea_spark.idea: 结合用户行为观察与主动询问，在不确定时请求用户澄清，以加速知识抽象并减少错误积累。
idea_spark.risk: 用户隐私风险：持续观察浏览行为可能泄露敏感信息；知识工件可能包含错误或过时信息。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类学徒制启发——通过观察专家工作来学习，而非依赖显式编程或大量标注数据。

en.tldr: Proposes cotomi Act, a browser agent that learns organizational knowledge by passively watching user behavior, achieving 80.4% on WebArena, surpassing the human baseline of 78.2%.
en.motivation: To enable browser agents to automatically learn organizational knowledge from routine user browsing, reducing manual configuration for task automation.
en.method: Combines an execution scaffold with adaptive lazy observation, verbal-diff-based history compression, coarse-grained actions, and best-of-N test-time scaling; a behavior-to-knowledge pipeline abstracts user browsing into artifacts like task boards and wiki.
en.result: Achieves 80.4% success rate on the 179-task WebArena human-evaluation subset, exceeding the reported 78.2% human baseline; proxy evaluation shows task success improves with accumulated behavior-derived knowledge.
en.help_to_user: Users can simply browse normally while the system learns their work patterns and generates shareable knowledge artifacts, simplifying subsequent task automation.

idea_spark.idea: Combine user behavior observation with active querying to request clarification when uncertain, accelerating knowledge abstraction and reducing error accumulation.
idea_spark.risk: Privacy risk: continuous observation of browsing may leak sensitive information; knowledge artifacts may contain errors or outdated information.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human apprenticeship—learning by watching experts work, rather than relying on explicit programming or large labeled datasets.

papers.title: Feature-Augmented Transformers for Robust AI-Text Detection Across Domains and Generators
papers.summary: AI-generated text is nowadays produced at scale across domains and heterogeneous generation pipelines, making robustness to distribution shift a central requirement for supervised binary detectors. We train transformer-based detectors on HC3 PLUS and calibrate a single decision threshold by maximising balanced accuracy on held-out validation; this threshold is then kept fixed for all downstream test distributions, revealing domain- and generator-dependent error asymmetries under shift. We evaluate in-domain on HC3 PLUS, under cross-dataset transfer to the multi-domain, multi-generator M4 benchmark, and on the external AI-Text-Detection-Pile. Although base models achieve near-ceiling in-domain performance (up to 99.5% balanced accuracy), performance under shift is brittle and strongly model-dependent. Feature augmentation via attention-based linguistic feature fusion improves transfer, with our best model (DeBERTa-v3-base+FeatAttn) achieving 85.9% balanced accuracy on M4. Multi-seed experiments confirm high stability. Under the same fixed-threshold protocol, our model outperforms strong zero-shot baselines by up to +7.22 points. Category-level ablations further show that readability and vocabulary features contribute most to robustness under shift. Overall, these results demonstrate that feature augmentation and a modern DeBERTa backbone significantly outperform earlier BERT/RoBERTa models, while the fixed-threshold protocol provides a more realistic and informative assessment of practical detector robustness.

ai.tldr: 提出特征增强的Transformer用于跨领域和生成器的鲁棒AI文本检测，在固定阈值协议下评估，最佳模型在M4上达到85.9%平衡准确率。
ai.motivation: AI生成文本广泛分布，检测器需对分布偏移鲁棒，现有方法在跨领域和生成器时性能脆弱。
ai.method: 在HC3 PLUS上训练基于Transformer的检测器，通过注意力机制融合语言特征（可读性、词汇等），固定单一决策阈值评估。
ai.result: 最佳模型DeBERTa-v3-base+FeatAttn在M4上达85.9%平衡准确率，优于零样本基线最多7.22个百分点，可读性和词汇特征贡献最大。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过特征增强和固定阈值协议提升AI文本检测的跨领域鲁棒性。

idea_spark.idea: 探索动态阈值调整或自适应特征选择以进一步提升跨生成器鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 固定阈值可能不适用于极端分布偏移，需验证在更多未知生成器上的泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可读性和词汇特征的重要性提示可结合语言学理论设计更鲁棒的检测特征。

idea_spark.inspiration: 可读性和词汇特征的重要性提示可结合语言学理论设计更鲁棒的检测特征。

en.tldr: Proposes feature-augmented transformers for robust AI-text detection across domains and generators, evaluated under a fixed-threshold protocol, achieving 85.9% balanced accuracy on M4.
en.motivation: AI-generated text is produced at scale across domains and generators, requiring detectors robust to distribution shift; current methods are brittle under shift.
en.method: Trains transformer-based detectors on HC3 PLUS, fuses linguistic features (readability, vocabulary) via attention, and uses a single fixed decision threshold for all test distributions.
en.result: Best model DeBERTa-v3-base+FeatAttn achieves 85.9% balanced accuracy on M4, outperforming zero-shot baselines by up to 7.22 points; readability and vocabulary features contribute most.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how feature augmentation and a fixed-threshold protocol improve cross-domain robustness in AI-text detection.

idea_spark.idea: Explore dynamic threshold adjustment or adaptive feature selection to further improve robustness across generators.
idea_spark.risk: Fixed threshold may fail under extreme distribution shifts; generalization to unseen generators needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The importance of readability and vocabulary features suggests incorporating linguistic theory for more robust detection features.

papers.title: Unified Multimodal Visual Tracking with Dual Mixture-of-Experts
papers.summary: Multimodal visual object tracking can be divided into to several kinds of tasks (e.g. RGB and RGB+X tracking), based on the input modality. Existing methods often train separate models for each modality or rely on pretrained models to adapt to new modalities, which limits efficiency, scalability, and usability. Thus, we introduce OneTrackerV2, a unified multi-modal tracking framework that enables end-to-end training for any modality. We propose Meta Merger to embed multi-modal information into a unified space, allowing flexible modality fusion and robustness. We further introduce Dual Mixture-of-Experts (DMoE): T-MoE models spatio-temporal relations for tracking, while M-MoE embeds multi-modal knowledge, disentangling cross-modal dependencies and reducing feature conflicts. With a shared architecture, unified parameters, and a single end-to-end training, OneTrackerV2 achieves state-of-the-art performance across five RGB and RGB+X tracking tasks and 12 benchmarks, while maintaining high inference efficiency. Notably, even after model compression, OneTrackerV2 retains strong performance. Moreover, OneTrackerV2 demonstrates remarkable robustness under modality-missing scenarios.

ai.tldr: 提出统一多模态跟踪框架OneTrackerV2，通过双专家混合机制实现任意模态的端到端训练，在5个任务12个基准上达到最优。
ai.motivation: 现有方法为不同模态分别训练模型或依赖预训练适配，效率低、可扩展性差。
ai.method: 设计Meta Merger将多模态信息嵌入统一空间，引入双专家混合（DMoE）：T-MoE建模时空关系，M-MoE嵌入多模态知识，解耦跨模态依赖并减少特征冲突。
ai.result: 在RGB和RGB+X共5个跟踪任务、12个基准上取得最优性能，推理高效，模型压缩后仍保持强性能，且在模态缺失场景下鲁棒。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种统一、高效、鲁棒的多模态视觉跟踪方案，可直接用于任意模态组合的跟踪任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将时空建模与多模态知识嵌入分离为两个专家模块，减少特征冲突。
idea_spark.risk: 专家模块的平衡与协同可能增加训练复杂度，模态缺失时专家分配需额外处理。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴混合专家思想解耦不同维度的信息，为统一多模态框架提供新思路。

idea_spark.idea: 将时空建模与多模态知识嵌入分离为两个专家模块，减少特征冲突。
idea_spark.risk: 专家模块的平衡与协同可能增加训练复杂度，模态缺失时专家分配需额外处理。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴混合专家思想解耦不同维度的信息，为统一多模态框架提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes OneTrackerV2, a unified multimodal tracking framework with Dual Mixture-of-Experts, achieving state-of-the-art on 5 tasks and 12 benchmarks via end-to-end training for any modality.
en.motivation: Existing methods train separate models per modality or rely on pretrained adaptation, limiting efficiency, scalability, and usability.
en.method: Introduces Meta Merger to embed multimodal information into a unified space, and Dual Mixture-of-Experts (DMoE): T-MoE models spatio-temporal relations, M-MoE embeds multimodal knowledge, disentangling cross-modal dependencies and reducing feature conflicts.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art on 5 RGB and RGB+X tracking tasks across 12 benchmarks, maintains high inference efficiency, retains strong performance after model compression, and shows robustness under modality-missing scenarios.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified, efficient, and robust multimodal visual tracking solution applicable to any modality combination.

idea_spark.idea: Separate spatio-temporal modeling and multimodal knowledge embedding into two expert modules to reduce feature conflicts.
idea_spark.risk: Balancing and coordinating expert modules may increase training complexity; modality-missing scenarios require additional expert assignment handling.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging mixture-of-experts to decouple different dimensions of information offers a new perspective for unified multimodal frameworks.

papers.title: SoDa2: Single-Stage Open-Set Domain Adaptation via Decoupled Alignment for Cross-Scene Hyperspectral Image Classification
papers.summary: Cross-scene hyperspectral image (HSI) classification stands as a fundamental research topic in remote sensing, with extensive applications spanning various fields. Owing to the inclusion of unknown categories in the target domain and the existence of domain shift across different scenes, open-set domain adaptation techniques are commonly employed to address cross-scene HSI classification. However, existing open-set cross-scene HSI classification methods still face two critical challenges: (1) domain shift issues arising from the direct alignment of mixed spectral-spatial features; (2) high computational costs caused by two-stage training strategies. To address these issues, this paper proposes a single-stage open-set domain adaptation method with decoupled alignment (SoDa$^2$) for cross-scene HSI classification. A contribution-aware dual-modality feature extraction is customized to disentangle the characteristics from spectral sequence signals and spatial details, selectively and adaptively enhancing discriminative features. The decoupled alignment module minimizes the Maximum Mean Discrepancy to independently reduce the spectral discrepancy and the spatial discrepancy between the source and target domains, extracting more fine-grained domain-invariant features. A cost-effective single-stage dual-branch framework is designed to learn MMD-constrainted aligned features and constraint-free intrinsic features for adaptive distinction between known and unknown classes. This framework employs a Gaussian Mixture Model to model the squared cosine similarity distribution between the two feature types, enabling open-set recognition without prior knowledge of unknown classes. Extensive experiments on three groups of HSI datasets demonstrate that SoDa$^2$ outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving superior classification accuracy and model transferability for open-set cross-scene tasks.

ai.tldr: 提出一种单阶段开集域自适应方法SoDa²，通过解耦对齐实现跨场景高光谱图像分类，在三个数据集上取得最优性能。
ai.motivation: 现有开集跨场景高光谱分类方法存在两个关键问题：直接对齐混合光谱-空间特征导致域偏移，以及两阶段训练策略带来高计算成本。
ai.method: 设计贡献感知的双模态特征提取，解耦光谱序列信号和空间细节；解耦对齐模块独立最小化光谱和空间的最大均值差异；单阶段双分支框架同时学习对齐特征和固有特征，并用高斯混合模型建模余弦相似度分布实现开集识别。
ai.result: 在三个高光谱数据集上的实验表明，SoDa²在分类精度和模型迁移性上均优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效、准确的跨场景高光谱图像分类方案，适用于遥感应用中存在未知类别的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将解耦对齐思想用于多模态医学图像分析，分别对齐不同模态的特征分布。
idea_spark.risk: 解耦可能丢失模态间的互补信息，需设计合理的融合机制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 用高斯混合模型建模特征分布差异，启发在开放世界识别中处理未知类别。

zh.tldr: 提出一种单阶段开集域自适应方法SoDa²，通过解耦对齐实现跨场景高光谱图像分类，在三个数据集上取得最优性能。
zh.motivation: 现有开集跨场景高光谱分类方法存在两个关键问题：直接对齐混合光谱-空间特征导致域偏移，以及两阶段训练策略带来高计算成本。
zh.method: 设计贡献感知的双模态特征提取，解耦光谱序列信号和空间细节；解耦对齐模块独立最小化光谱和空间的最大均值差异；单阶段双分支框架同时学习对齐特征和固有特征，并用高斯混合模型建模余弦相似度分布实现开集识别。
zh.result: 在三个高光谱数据集上的实验表明，SoDa²在分类精度和模型迁移性上均优于现有方法。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效、准确的跨场景高光谱图像分类方案，适用于遥感应用中存在未知类别的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将解耦对齐思想用于多模态医学图像分析，分别对齐不同模态的特征分布。
idea_spark.risk: 解耦可能丢失模态间的互补信息，需设计合理的融合机制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 用高斯混合模型建模特征分布差异，启发在开放世界识别中处理未知类别。

en.tldr: Proposes SoDa², a single-stage open-set domain adaptation method with decoupled alignment for cross-scene hyperspectral image classification, achieving state-of-the-art performance on three datasets.
en.motivation: Existing open-set cross-scene HSI classification methods suffer from domain shift due to direct alignment of mixed spectral-spatial features and high computational cost from two-stage training.
en.method: A contribution-aware dual-modality feature extraction disentangles spectral and spatial characteristics; a decoupled alignment module independently minimizes MMD for spectral and spatial discrepancies; a single-stage dual-branch framework learns aligned and intrinsic features, using a GMM to model squared cosine similarity for open-set recognition.
en.result: Extensive experiments on three HSI datasets show SoDa² outperforms state-of-the-art methods in classification accuracy and model transferability.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and accurate solution for cross-scene HSI classification in remote sensing, especially when unknown categories are present.

idea_spark.idea: Apply decoupled alignment to multi-modal medical image analysis, aligning feature distributions of different modalities separately.
idea_spark.risk: Decoupling may lose complementary information between modalities; a proper fusion mechanism is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using GMM to model feature distribution differences inspires handling unknown categories in open-world recognition.

papers.title: Single-Period Portfolio Selection via Information Projection
papers.summary: We study the single-period portfolio selection problem under Constant Relative Risk-Aversion (CRRA) utility through the information-theoretic lens. Assuming only that the market payoff vector has finite support, we show that the Certainty-Equivalent (CE) growth rate under CRRA utility can be exactly decomposed into a portfolio-induced Rényi divergence term, a Rényi entropy term of the risk-tilted market law, and a log-partition term. In this setting, the Rényi order has a clear operational meaning: it exactly coincides with the investor's coefficient of relative risk aversion. We further show that CRRA portfolio selection is equivalent to a Rényi information-projection problem. Using a variational representation of Rényi divergence, we obtain a Blahut-Arimoto-style alternating optimization with a closed-form auxiliary update and a KL-type portfolio step. In the low risk-aversion regime, this method empirically requires fewer iterations than both direct CRRA utility optimization and Cover's method.

ai.tldr: 本文从信息论角度研究单期投资组合选择问题，证明CRRA效用下的确定性等价增长率可分解为Rényi散度、Rényi熵和log-partition项，并将CRRA组合选择等价为Rényi信息投影问题。
ai.motivation: 将投资组合选择与信息论联系起来，利用Rényi散度等工具提供新的理论视角和高效算法。
ai.method: 通过Rényi散度的变分表示，推导出Blahut-Arimoto风格的交替优化算法，其中辅助变量更新有闭式解，组合步骤为KL型。
ai.result: 在低风险厌恶区域，该方法比直接CRRA优化和Cover方法需要更少的迭代次数。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解CRRA效用下投资组合选择的信息论本质，并提供一种计算高效的优化方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将投资组合优化视为信息投影问题，利用Rényi散度的变分表示设计交替优化算法。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖市场收益有限支撑假设，实际应用中可能需近似处理。
idea_spark.inspiration: 信息论与金融优化的交叉可能启发更多基于熵或散度的投资策略设计。

en.tldr: This paper studies single-period portfolio selection under CRRA utility from an information-theoretic perspective, decomposing the certainty-equivalent growth rate into Rényi divergence, Rényi entropy, and log-partition terms, and equating CRRA portfolio selection to a Rényi information projection problem.
en.motivation: To connect portfolio selection with information theory, leveraging Rényi divergence for new theoretical insights and efficient algorithms.
en.method: Using a variational representation of Rényi divergence, a Blahut-Arimoto-style alternating optimization is derived with closed-form auxiliary updates and a KL-type portfolio step.
en.result: In the low risk-aversion regime, the method requires fewer iterations than direct CRRA optimization and Cover's method.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the information-theoretic nature of CRRA portfolio selection and provides a computationally efficient optimization method.

idea_spark.risk: The method relies on the assumption of finite support for market returns, which may require approximation in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: The intersection of information theory and financial optimization may inspire more entropy- or divergence-based investment strategies.

papers.title: Quantifying the human visual exposome with vision language models
papers.summary: The visual environment is a fundamental yet unquantified determinant of mental health. While the concept of the environmental exposome is well established, current methods rely on coarse geospatial proxies or biased self reports, failing to capture the first person visual context of daily life. We addressed this gap by coupling ecological momentary assessment with vision language models (VLMs) to quantify the semantic richness of human visual experience. Across 2674 participant generated photographs, VLM derived estimates of greenness robustly predicted momentary affect and chronic stress, consistent with established benchmarks. We then developed a semi autonomous large language model (LLM) based pipeline that mined over seven million scientific publications to extract nearly 1000 environmental features empirically linked to mental health. When applied to real world imagery, up to 33 percent of VLM extracted context ratings significantly correlated with affect and stress. These findings establish a scalable objective paradigm for visual exposomics, enabling high throughput decoding of how the visible world is associated with mental health.

ai.tldr: 通过视觉语言模型量化人类视觉暴露组，发现视觉环境语义丰富度与心理健康显著相关。
ai.motivation: 视觉环境是心理健康的关键决定因素，但现有方法依赖粗糙的地理代理或自我报告，无法捕捉日常生活的第一人称视觉背景。
ai.method: 结合生态瞬时评估与视觉语言模型，分析2674张参与者拍摄的照片，并开发基于大语言模型的半自动管道，从700万篇科学文献中提取近1000个与心理健康相关的环境特征。
ai.result: 视觉语言模型提取的绿色度估计能稳健预测瞬时情绪和慢性压力；高达33%的视觉语言模型上下文评分与情绪和压力显著相关。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种可扩展、客观的视觉暴露组学范式，帮助用户理解可见世界与心理健康的关联。

idea_spark.idea: 结合可穿戴摄像头和实时视觉语言模型分析，开发个性化心理健康干预工具。
idea_spark.risk: 隐私问题（持续图像采集）和模型偏差（训练数据代表性不足）可能影响结果泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用大规模文献挖掘与视觉语言模型结合，为环境暴露组学提供新思路。

en.tldr: Quantified the human visual exposome using vision language models, showing that semantic richness of visual environment significantly correlates with mental health.
en.motivation: The visual environment is a key determinant of mental health, but current methods rely on coarse geospatial proxies or biased self-reports, failing to capture first-person visual context.
en.method: Combined ecological momentary assessment with vision language models to analyze 2674 participant-generated photos, and developed a semi-autonomous LLM-based pipeline to mine over 7 million scientific publications for nearly 1000 environmental features linked to mental health.

idea_spark.idea: Develop personalized mental health intervention tools by combining wearable cameras with real-time VLM analysis.
idea_spark.risk: Privacy concerns (continuous image capture) and model bias (unrepresentative training data) may affect generalizability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining large-scale literature mining with vision language models offers a novel approach for environmental exposomics.

papers.title: Enhancing Self-Supervised Talking Head Forgery Detection via a Training-Free Dual-System Framework
papers.summary: Supervised talking head forgery detection faces severe generalization challenges due to the continuous evolution of generators. By reducing reliance on generator-specific forgery patterns, self-supervised detectors offer stronger cross-generator robustness. However, existing research has mainly focused on building stronger detectors, while the discriminative capacity of trained detectors remains insufficiently exploited. In particular, for score-based self-supervised detectors, the limited discriminative ability on hard cases is often reflected in unreliable anomaly ordering, leaving room for further refinement. Motivated by this observation, we draw inspiration from the dual-system theory of human cognition and propose a Training-Free Dual-System (TFDS) framework to further exploit the latent discriminative capacity of existing score-based self-supervised detectors. TFDS treats anomaly-like scores as the basis of System-1, using lightweight threshold-based routing to partition samples into confident and uncertain subsets. System-2 then revisits only the uncertain subset, performing fine-grained evidence-guided reasoning to refine the relative ordering of ambiguous samples within the original score distribution. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements across datasets and perturbation settings, with the gains arising mainly from corrected ordering within the uncertain subset. These findings show that existing self-supervised talking head forgery detectors still contain underexploited discriminative cues that can be effectively unlocked through training-free dual-system reasoning.

ai.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的双系统框架（TFDS），利用人类认知的双系统理论，进一步挖掘现有自监督说话头伪造检测器的判别能力，在无需额外训练的情况下显著提升检测性能。
ai.motivation: 现有自监督检测器在困难样本上的判别能力有限，表现为不可靠的异常排序，存在进一步优化的空间。
ai.method: 将异常分数视为系统1的基础，通过轻量级阈值路由将样本分为置信子集和不确定子集；系统2仅对不确定子集进行细粒度证据引导推理，优化其在原始分数分布中的相对排序。
ai.result: 在多个数据集和扰动设置下均取得一致改进，提升主要来自不确定子集内排序的纠正。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需额外训练即可增强现有自监督伪造检测器性能的通用框架，适用于需要快速部署或资源受限的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将人类认知的双系统理论（快速直觉与慢速推理）引入模型后处理阶段，通过轻量级路由和细粒度推理提升判别能力。
idea_spark.risk: 阈值路由的设定可能对数据分布敏感，需要针对不同任务调整；系统2的推理效率可能成为瓶颈。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴认知科学中的双系统理论，启发我们思考如何在不增加模型复杂度的情况下，通过后处理策略释放已有模型的潜在能力。

en.tldr: Proposes a training-free dual-system framework (TFDS) that leverages the dual-system theory of human cognition to further exploit the discriminative capacity of existing self-supervised talking head forgery detectors, achieving significant performance gains without additional training.
en.motivation: Existing self-supervised detectors have limited discriminative ability on hard cases, reflected in unreliable anomaly ordering, leaving room for refinement.
en.method: Treats anomaly-like scores as System-1 basis, uses lightweight threshold-based routing to partition samples into confident and uncertain subsets; System-2 revisits only the uncertain subset for fine-grained evidence-guided reasoning to refine relative ordering within the original score distribution.
en.result: Consistent improvements across datasets and perturbation settings, with gains mainly from corrected ordering within the uncertain subset.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general framework to enhance existing self-supervised forgery detectors without extra training, suitable for rapid deployment or resource-constrained scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Introduces human dual-system theory (fast intuition vs. slow reasoning) into model post-processing, using lightweight routing and fine-grained reasoning to boost discriminative ability.
idea_spark.risk: Threshold routing may be sensitive to data distribution and requires tuning; System-2 reasoning efficiency could become a bottleneck.
idea_spark.inspiration: Drawing from cognitive science's dual-system theory inspires thinking about how to unlock latent capacity of existing models through post-processing strategies without increasing model complexity.

papers.title: A Paradigm for Interpreting Metrics and Identifying Critical Errors in Automatic Speech Recognition
papers.summary: The most commonly used metrics for evaluating automatic speech transcriptions, namely Word Error Rate (WER) and Character Error Rate (CER), have been heavily criticized for their poor correlation to human perception and their inability to take into account linguistic and semantic information. While metric-based embeddings, seeking to approximate human perception, have been proposed, their scores remain difficult to interpret, unlike WER and CER. In this article, we overcome this problem by proposing a paradigm that consists in incorporating a chosen metric into it in order to obtain an equivalent of the error rate: a Minimum Edit Distance (minED). This approach parallels transcription errors with their human perception, also allowing an original study of the severity of these errors from a human perspective.

ai.tldr: 提出一种将任意指标转化为最小编辑距离（minED）的范式，使自动语音识别错误率更贴近人类感知，并分析错误严重性。
ai.motivation: WER和CER与人类感知相关性差，且缺乏语义信息；现有指标嵌入难以解释。
ai.method: 将选定指标嵌入范式，计算等价的最小编辑距离（minED），对齐转录错误与人类感知。
ai.result: minED可解释性强，能反映人类对错误严重性的判断。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解自动语音识别错误的人类感知意义，优化评估与调试。

idea_spark.idea: 将minED与语义嵌入结合，构建更全面的错误分析框架。
idea_spark.risk: minED可能依赖特定指标，泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从人类感知角度重新设计评估指标，而非仅追求数值匹配。

zh.tldr: 提出一种将任意指标转化为最小编辑距离（minED）的范式，使自动语音识别错误率更贴近人类感知，并分析错误严重性。

zh.method: 将选定指标嵌入范式，计算等价的最小编辑距离（minED），对齐转录错误与人类感知。
zh.result: minED可解释性强，能反映人类对错误严重性的判断。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解自动语音识别错误的人类感知意义，优化评估与调试。

idea_spark.idea: 将minED与语义嵌入结合，构建更全面的错误分析框架。
idea_spark.risk: minED可能依赖特定指标，泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从人类感知角度重新设计评估指标，而非仅追求数值匹配。

en.tldr: Proposes a paradigm that converts any chosen metric into a Minimum Edit Distance (minED), aligning ASR error rates with human perception and enabling error severity analysis.
en.motivation: WER and CER correlate poorly with human perception and lack semantic information; existing metric embeddings are hard to interpret.
en.method: Incorporates a selected metric into the paradigm to compute an equivalent minED, mapping transcription errors to human perception.
en.result: minED is interpretable and reflects human judgment of error severity.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the human-perceptual meaning of ASR errors, improving evaluation and debugging.

idea_spark.idea: Combine minED with semantic embeddings for a more comprehensive error analysis framework.
idea_spark.risk: minED may depend on the chosen metric; generalizability needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Redesign evaluation metrics from a human perception perspective, not just numerical matching.

papers.title: Dante: An Open Source Model Pre-Training and Fine-Tuning Tool for the Dafne Federated Framework for Medical Image Segmentation
papers.summary: Adapting pre-trained deep learning segmentation models to new clinical domains is a persistent challenge in medical image analysis, particularly when annotated data at the target site are scarce. Parameter-efficient fine-tuning strategies offer a principled solution by selectively updating a controlled subset of model parameters, preserving previously acquired representations while reducing the risk of overfitting on small datasets. This paper introduces DAfNe TrainEr (Dante), an open-source module integrating with the Dafne federated segmentation ecosystem as a dedicated training and fine-tuning backend. Dante supports training from scratch with automatic architecture configuration, configurable layer freezing schedules, and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) extended to N-dimensional convolutional layers through channel-wise factorization. To validate the module, Gradual Unfreezing (GU) and LoRA are assessed across realistic cross-domain MRI transfer scenarios covering abdominal organ segmentation and brain white matter lesion segmentation, under full-data and few-shot conditions. GU reduced the epochs required to reach 85% of peak performance by up to 63.6% compared to training from scratch, while LoRA achieved Dice Similarity Coefficients up to 0.957 in data-rich scenarios. Both strategies outperformed the baseline across all tested domains, with gains amplified by richer pre-training datasets. These results validate Dante as a domain-agnostic fine-tuning module for medical image segmentation in real clinical deployment conditions. Dante code is available at https://github.com/dafne-imaging/dafne-torch-trainer while Dafne ecosystem project is available at https://github.com/dafne-imaging.

ai.tldr: 提出Dante开源模块，集成于Dafne联邦分割框架，支持参数高效微调策略（LoRA和逐步解冻），在跨域MRI分割任务中显著提升性能并减少训练轮次。
ai.motivation: 预训练分割模型适应新临床域时面临标注数据稀缺问题，现有微调方法易过拟合或破坏已有表征。
ai.method: 开发Dante模块，支持从零训练、自动架构配置、可配置层冻结调度，并将LoRA扩展至N维卷积层（通道级分解）。
ai.result: 逐步解冻相比从零训练减少最多63.6%训练轮次达到85%峰值性能；LoRA在数据丰富场景下Dice达0.957；两种策略在所有测试域均优于基线。
ai.help_to_user: 提供即用型开源微调工具，降低联邦医学图像分割中跨域适配的标注和数据需求。

idea_spark.idea: 将逐步解冻与LoRA结合，先解冻高层再注入低秩适配器，可能进一步加速收敛。
idea_spark.risk: LoRA秩的选择对性能敏感，需自动秩搜索机制避免手动调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 联邦场景下各客户端可共享LoRA适配器而非完整模型，减少通信开销。

zh.tldr: 提出Dante开源模块，集成于Dafne联邦分割框架，支持参数高效微调策略（LoRA和逐步解冻），在跨域MRI分割任务中显著提升性能并减少训练轮次。
zh.motivation: 预训练分割模型适应新临床域时面临标注数据稀缺问题，现有微调方法易过拟合或破坏已有表征。
zh.method: 开发Dante模块，支持从零训练、自动架构配置、可配置层冻结调度，并将LoRA扩展至N维卷积层（通道级分解）。
zh.result: 逐步解冻相比从零训练减少最多63.6%训练轮次达到85%峰值性能；LoRA在数据丰富场景下Dice达0.957；两种策略在所有测试域均优于基线。
zh.help_to_user: 提供即用型开源微调工具，降低联邦医学图像分割中跨域适配的标注和数据需求。

en.tldr: Dante is an open-source module integrated into the Dafne federated segmentation framework, supporting parameter-efficient fine-tuning (LoRA and Gradual Unfreezing) that improves performance and reduces training epochs in cross-domain MRI segmentation.
en.motivation: Adapting pre-trained segmentation models to new clinical domains suffers from scarce annotated data; existing fine-tuning methods risk overfitting or destroying learned representations.
en.method: Developed Dante module supporting training from scratch, automatic architecture configuration, configurable layer freezing schedules, and LoRA extended to N-dimensional convolutional layers via channel-wise factorization.
en.result: Gradual Unfreezing reduces epochs to reach 85% peak performance by up to 63.6% vs. training from scratch; LoRA achieves Dice up to 0.957 in data-rich scenarios; both strategies outperform baseline across all tested domains.
en.help_to_user: Provides a ready-to-use open-source fine-tuning tool that reduces annotation and data requirements for cross-domain adaptation in federated medical image segmentation.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Gradual Unfreezing with LoRA by first unfreezing high-level layers then injecting low-rank adapters to further accelerate convergence.
idea_spark.risk: LoRA rank selection is performance-sensitive; an automatic rank search mechanism is needed to avoid manual tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: In federated settings, clients can share LoRA adapters instead of full models to reduce communication overhead.

papers.title: What Happens Inside Agent Memory? Circuit Analysis from Emergence to Diagnosis
papers.summary: Agent memory failures are silent: an LLM-based agent can produce a fluent response even when it fails to extract, retain, or retrieve the information needed across sessions. The write-manage-read loop describes the external pipeline of these systems but leaves open which internal computations implement each stage. Tracing internal feature circuits across the Qwen-3 family (0.6B--14B) and two memory frameworks (mem0 and A-MEM), we report three findings. First, control is detectable before content: routing circuitry is causally active at 0.6B, while content circuitry produces no detectable signal until 4B under our tracing setup, creating a deployment regime where small models route with apparent competence but silently fail at extraction and grounding. Second, within the content group, Write and Read share a late-layer hub that operates as a context-grounding substrate already present in the base model; only memory framing recruits a functional grounding direction on this substrate, and the hub transfers across both frameworks. Third, emergence does not imply steerability: although the content circuit becomes detectable at 4B, it becomes reliably steerable only at 8B, indicating that detection and intervention have distinct scale thresholds. As a practical implication, the feature-space separation between the two circuit groups enables per-operation failure localization at 76.2% accuracy without supervision, providing a stage-level diagnostic for otherwise silent agent-memory failures.

ai.tldr: 本文通过电路分析揭示了LLM智能体内部记忆故障的机制：路由电路在小模型（0.6B）中即可检测，而内容电路直到4B才出现，且检测与可干预性存在规模阈值差异。
ai.motivation: 智能体记忆故障是“无声的”——即使无法提取、保留或检索信息，智能体仍能生成流畅回复，现有外部管道分析无法解释内部计算实现。
ai.method: 在Qwen-3系列（0.6B-14B）和两种记忆框架（mem0和A-MEM）上追踪内部特征电路，分析路由电路与内容电路在不同规模下的因果活性与可干预性。
ai.result: 路由电路在0.6B即活跃，内容电路至4B才可检测；内容电路中写入和读取共享一个晚期层枢纽，该枢纽在基模型中已存在；内容电路在8B才可靠可干预；基于特征空间分离可实现76.2%准确率的无监督故障定位。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解LLM智能体记忆故障的内部机制，并提供基于电路分析的诊断方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用路由电路与内容电路的特征空间分离，设计无监督的智能体记忆健康监控系统。
idea_spark.risk: 电路检测依赖于特定模型家族和追踪设置，泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 模型规模与功能涌现之间的非单调关系启发我们重新思考小模型部署中的可靠性边界。

en.tldr: This paper reveals the mechanism of silent agent memory failures via circuit analysis: routing circuitry is detectable in small models (0.6B), while content circuitry emerges only at 4B, with detection and steerability having distinct scale thresholds.
en.motivation: Agent memory failures are silent—LLM agents can produce fluent responses even when failing to extract, retain, or retrieve information, and external pipeline analysis cannot explain internal computations.
en.method: Tracing internal feature circuits across the Qwen-3 family (0.6B–14B) and two memory frameworks (mem0 and A-MEM), analyzing causal activity and steerability of routing and content circuits at different scales.
en.result: Routing circuitry is causally active at 0.6B, while content circuitry produces no detectable signal until 4B; Write and Read share a late-layer hub that exists in the base model; content circuit becomes reliably steerable only at 8B; feature-space separation enables 76.2% accuracy unsupervised failure localization.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the internal mechanisms of LLM agent memory failures and provides a circuit-based diagnostic method.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the feature-space separation between routing and content circuits to design an unsupervised agent memory health monitoring system.
idea_spark.risk: Circuit detection depends on specific model families and tracing setups; generalizability needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: The non-monotonic relationship between model scale and functional emergence inspires rethinking reliability boundaries in small model deployment.

papers.title: Robust Agent Compensation (RAC): Teaching AI Agents to Compensate
papers.summary: We present Robust Agent Compensation (RAC), a log-based recovery paradigm (providing a safety net) implemented through an architectural extension that can be applied to most Agent frameworks to support reliable executions (avoiding unintended side effects). Users can choose to enable RAC without changing their current agent code (e.g., LangGraph agents). The proposed approach can be implemented in most existing agent frameworks via their existing extension points. We present an implementation based on LangChain, demonstrate its viability through the $τ$-bench and REALM-Bench, and show that when solving complex problems, RAC is 1.5-8X or more better in both latency and token economy compared to state-of-the-art LLM-based recovery approaches.

ai.tldr: 提出鲁棒代理补偿（RAC），一种基于日志的恢复范式，通过架构扩展实现，可在不修改现有代理代码的情况下提供安全网，避免意外副作用。
ai.motivation: 现有AI代理在执行复杂任务时容易产生意外副作用，缺乏可靠的恢复机制。
ai.method: 设计RAC架构扩展，利用日志记录代理执行过程，在出现错误时自动回滚或补偿，支持LangGraph等框架的无缝集成。
ai.result: 在τ-bench和REALM-Bench上，RAC在延迟和令牌经济性上比最先进的LLM恢复方法提升1.5-8倍。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助开发者构建更可靠的AI代理系统，减少因代理错误导致的业务风险。

idea_spark.idea: 结合强化学习，让代理在训练中学习何时触发补偿，实现自适应恢复策略。
idea_spark.risk: 日志记录可能增加系统开销，补偿逻辑可能引入新的错误路径。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受数据库事务回滚机制启发，将ACID特性引入AI代理执行流程。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受数据库事务回滚机制启发，将ACID特性引入AI代理执行流程。

en.tldr: Proposes Robust Agent Compensation (RAC), a log-based recovery paradigm implemented via an architectural extension that provides a safety net without modifying existing agent code, avoiding unintended side effects.
en.motivation: Existing AI agents often produce unintended side effects during complex tasks and lack reliable recovery mechanisms.
en.method: Designs RAC as an architectural extension that logs agent execution and automatically rolls back or compensates on errors, seamlessly integrating with frameworks like LangGraph.
en.result: On τ-bench and REALM-Bench, RAC achieves 1.5-8X better latency and token economy compared to state-of-the-art LLM-based recovery approaches.
en.help_to_user: Helps developers build more reliable AI agent systems, reducing business risks caused by agent errors.

idea_spark.idea: Combine with reinforcement learning to let agents learn when to trigger compensation, enabling adaptive recovery strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Logging may increase system overhead, and compensation logic could introduce new error paths.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by database transaction rollback mechanisms, bringing ACID properties to AI agent execution flows.

papers.title: Towards an End-to-End System for 3D Tracking of Physical Objects in Virtual Immersive Environments
papers.summary: This work aims to establish an end-to-end system for tracking of physical 3D objects for virtual reality (VR) applications. We focus on training applications requiring real-time tracking of the position of small physical objects and their reflection in VR space. Out goal is to perform object tracking in a "plug and play" manner, without using complex systems with quite large tracking devices or manually implementing object tracking. We therefore propose a system for object tracking via fiducial markers alongside a software harness, to enable fast and efficient designation of objects to be tracked and data streaming solution for end-use applications. The system utilizes AruCo, AprilTag and an original Colored Control Points based fiducial system. It allows for easy tag detection and use of object position data, which are crucial for immersive training environments based on VR and eXtended Reality (XR). We evaluate various tag sizes, detection distances, and different camera devices against the theoretical limits. In effect, we create a complete solution for implementing marker-based, real-to-virtual object position mapping for various applications.

ai.tldr: 提出一个端到端系统，通过 fiducial 标记实现虚拟现实中物理 3D 物体的实时跟踪，无需复杂设备。
ai.motivation: 现有 VR 物体跟踪系统复杂、设备庞大，难以实现即插即用，尤其在小物体实时跟踪训练场景中。
ai.method: 使用 AruCo、AprilTag 和自研彩色控制点标记系统，配合软件框架实现标记检测、位置数据流传输。
ai.result: 评估了不同标记尺寸、检测距离和相机设备，验证了系统在理论极限下的有效性，实现了完整的虚实映射方案。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种轻量级、易部署的 VR 物体跟踪方案，适合沉浸式训练和扩展现实应用。

idea_spark.idea: 结合深度估计与标记系统，实现无标记的 3D 物体跟踪。
idea_spark.risk: 标记遮挡或光照变化可能降低检测鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 彩色控制点标记的设计可启发多模态视觉标记研究。

en.tldr: Proposes an end-to-end system using fiducial markers for real-time 3D tracking of physical objects in VR, without complex hardware.
en.motivation: Existing VR object tracking systems are complex and bulky, hindering plug-and-play use, especially for small objects in training scenarios.
en.method: Employs AruCo, AprilTag, and a custom Colored Control Points marker system, along with a software harness for marker detection and data streaming.
en.result: Evaluates marker sizes, detection distances, and cameras against theoretical limits, demonstrating a complete real-to-virtual mapping solution.
en.help_to_user: Provides a lightweight, easy-to-deploy VR object tracking solution suitable for immersive training and XR applications.

idea_spark.idea: Combine depth estimation with marker system for markerless 3D object tracking.
idea_spark.risk: Marker occlusion or lighting changes may reduce detection robustness.
idea_spark.inspiration: Colored Control Points marker design may inspire multimodal visual marker research.

papers.title: EQUITRIAGE: A Fairness Audit of Gender Bias in LLM-Based Emergency Department Triage
papers.summary: Emergency department triage assigns patients an acuity score that determines treatment priority, and clinical evidence documents persistent gender disparities in human acuity assessment. As hospitals pilot large language models (LLMs) as triage decision support, a critical question is whether these models reproduce or mitigate known biases. We present EQUITRIAGE, a fairness audit of LLM-based ESI assignment evaluating five models (Gemini-3-Flash, Nemotron-3-Super, DeepSeek-V3.1, Mistral-Small-3.2, GPT-4.1-Nano) across 374,275 evaluations on 18,714 MIMIC-IV-ED vignettes under four prompt strategies. Of 9,368 originals, 9,346 are paired with a gender-swapped counterfactual. All five models produced flip rates above a pre-registered 5% threshold (9.9% to 43.8%). Two showed directional female undertriage (DeepSeek F/M 2.15:1, Gemini 1.34:1); two were near-parity; one had high sensitivity with weak male-direction asymmetry. DeepSeek's directional bias coexisted with a low outcome-linked calibration gap (0.013 against MIMIC-IV admission), a Chouldechova-style dissociation between within-group calibration and between-pair counterfactual invariance. Demographic blinding reduced Gemini's flip rate to 0.5%; an age-preserving blind variant left DeepSeek with residual F/M 1.25, implicating age as a residual channel. Chain-of-thought prompting degraded accuracy for all five models. A two-model ablation reveals opposite underlying mechanisms for the same directional phenotype: in Gemini the signal is emergent in the combined name+gender swap, while in DeepSeek the gender token alone carries it. EQUITRIAGE shows that group parity, counterfactual invariance, and gender calibration are distinct fairness properties, that intervention effectiveness is model-dependent, and that per-model counterfactual auditing should precede clinical deployment.

ai.tldr: 对五种大语言模型在急诊分诊中的性别偏见进行审计，发现所有模型均存在不同程度的性别翻转率，且干预效果因模型而异。
ai.motivation: 急诊分诊中人类评估存在性别偏见，而医院正在试点使用大语言模型辅助分诊，需评估其是否复制或减轻已知偏见。
ai.method: 使用MIMIC-IV-ED数据集构建18,714个临床场景，对五种LLM进行374,275次评估，采用四种提示策略，并生成性别交换的反事实样本。
ai.result: 所有模型翻转率超过5%阈值（9.9%-43.8%），两个模型显示女性低估倾向，去偏干预效果因模型而异，链式思维提示降低所有模型准确性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解LLM在医疗分诊中的公平性风险，以及不同去偏策略的局限性。

idea_spark.idea: 开发模型特定的反事实审计流程，在部署前识别并缓解偏见。
idea_spark.risk: 去偏干预可能降低模型整体准确性，需平衡公平性与性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合群体公平性、反事实不变性和校准性三种公平性度量，揭示不同模型偏见的潜在机制差异。

zh.result: 所有模型翻转率超过5%阈值（9.9%-43.8%），两个模型显示女性低估倾向，去偏干预效果因模型而异，链式思维提示降低所有模型准确性。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解LLM在医疗分诊中的公平性风险，以及不同去偏策略的局限性。

idea_spark.idea: 开发模型特定的反事实审计流程，在部署前识别并缓解偏见。
idea_spark.risk: 去偏干预可能降低模型整体准确性，需平衡公平性与性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合群体公平性、反事实不变性和校准性三种公平性度量，揭示不同模型偏见的潜在机制差异。

en.tldr: A fairness audit of five LLMs for emergency department triage reveals gender flip rates exceeding 5% in all models, with intervention effectiveness varying by model.
en.motivation: Gender disparities exist in human triage; as hospitals pilot LLMs for decision support, it is critical to assess whether they reproduce or mitigate known biases.
en.method: Using 18,714 MIMIC-IV-ED vignettes, we evaluated five LLMs across 374,275 evaluations with four prompt strategies and gender-swapped counterfactuals.
en.result: All models exceeded a pre-registered 5% flip rate threshold (9.9%-43.8%); two showed directional female undertriage; debiasing interventions varied in effectiveness; chain-of-thought degraded accuracy.
en.help_to_user: Provides insights into fairness risks of LLMs in clinical triage and the limitations of different debiasing strategies.

idea_spark.idea: Develop model-specific counterfactual auditing pipelines to identify and mitigate biases before deployment.
idea_spark.risk: Debiasing interventions may reduce overall model accuracy, requiring a trade-off between fairness and performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining group parity, counterfactual invariance, and calibration reveals distinct underlying mechanisms of bias across models.

papers.title: GeoDecider: A Coarse-to-Fine Agentic Workflow for Explainable Lithology Classification
papers.summary: Lithology classification aims to infer subsurface rock types from well-logging signals, supporting downstream applications like reservoir characterization. Despite substantial progress, most existing methods still treat lithology classification as a single-pass classification task. In contrast, practical experts incorporate geological principles, external knowledge, and tool-use capabilities to perform accurate classification. In this work, we propose GeoDecider, a coarse-to-fine agentic workflow that enables accurate and explainable lithology classification through training-free use of large language models (LLMs). GeoDecider reformulates lithology classification as an expert-like structured process and organizes it into a multi-stage workflow involving coarse-to-fine reasoning. Specifically, GeoDecider includes the following stages: (1) base classifier-guided coarse classification, which uses a pre-trained classifier to provide a rough reference for downstream tasks, thus reducing the overall cost of downstream reasoning, (2) tool-augmented reasoning, which utilizes several tools such as contextual analysis and neighbor retrieval to achieve finer and more precise classifications, (3) geological refinement, which post-processes the final results to enforce geological consistency. Experiments on four benchmarks show that GeoDecider outperforms representative baselines. Further analysis demonstrates that the proposed framework produces geologically interpretable predictions while achieving a better trade-off between classification performance and inference efficiency.

ai.tldr: 提出GeoDecider，一种基于大语言模型的粗到细智能工作流，用于可解释的岩性分类。
ai.motivation: 现有方法将岩性分类视为单次分类任务，而地质专家会结合地质原理、外部知识和工具进行准确分类。
ai.method: 设计多阶段工作流：基础分类器粗分类、工具增强推理（上下文分析、邻域检索）、地质精炼后处理。
ai.result: 在四个基准上优于代表性基线，产生地质可解释的预测，并在性能与效率间取得更好平衡。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用LLM构建可解释、高效的地质分类系统。

idea_spark.idea: 结合预训练分类器与LLM工具调用，降低推理成本并提升可解释性。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖LLM的推理能力，可能对复杂地质场景的泛化性有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将专家决策过程显式建模为多阶段工作流，可提升AI系统的可信度。

en.tldr: Proposes GeoDecider, a coarse-to-fine agentic workflow using LLMs for explainable lithology classification.
en.motivation: Existing methods treat lithology classification as a single-pass task, while experts use geological principles, external knowledge, and tools.
en.method: Multi-stage workflow: base classifier-guided coarse classification, tool-augmented reasoning (contextual analysis, neighbor retrieval), and geological refinement.
en.result: Outperforms baselines on four benchmarks, yields geologically interpretable predictions, and achieves a better performance-efficiency trade-off.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to build explainable and efficient geological classification systems using LLMs.

idea_spark.idea: Combining a pretrained classifier with LLM tool calls reduces reasoning cost and improves explainability.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on LLM reasoning capabilities, which may have limited generalization to complex geological scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explicitly modeling expert decision processes as multi-stage workflows can enhance AI system trustworthiness.

papers.title: Sensitivity Analysis of Tactical Wireless Network Design Under Realistic Operational Constraints
papers.summary: The design of tactical wireless networks reflects a complex interplay among structural constraints, technological choices, and underlying modeling assumptions. Although optimization-based approaches have been widely explored, the impact of configuration parameters on network topology quality and overall performance is still not fully understood. This paper presents a comprehensive sensitivity analysis of tactical wireless network design under realistic operational constraints. It systematically investigates three categories of parameters: (i) structural topology rules, including master hub selection; (ii) technological factors such as antenna beamwidth; and (iii) modeling parameters embedded in the objective formulation. Optimized topologies are produced using a Tabu Search metaheuristic, and statistical analyses based on the Friedman and Wilcoxon tests are performed to assess the significance of observed variations across different network sizes. The findings reveal scale-dependent technological transitions and threshold effects in structural constraints. The analysis differentiates parameters that fundamentally reshape network topology from those that primarily influence performance magnitude. Together, these insights provide practical guidance for parameter tuning and topology configuration in mission-critical tactical wireless deployments.

ai.tldr: 本文对战术无线网络设计在现实操作约束下进行了全面的敏感性分析，揭示了结构规则、技术因素和建模参数对网络拓扑质量和性能的影响。
ai.motivation: 尽管已有大量优化方法，但配置参数对战术无线网络拓扑质量和整体性能的影响仍未被充分理解。
ai.method: 使用Tabu搜索元启发式生成优化拓扑，并通过Friedman和Wilcoxon统计检验评估不同网络规模下参数变化的显著性。
ai.result: 发现了尺度依赖的技术转变和结构约束的阈值效应，区分了根本改变拓扑的参数与主要影响性能幅度的参数。
ai.help_to_user: 为任务关键型战术无线部署中的参数调整和拓扑配置提供了实用指导。

idea_spark.idea: 结合机器学习预测参数对拓扑性能的影响，加速参数调优过程。
idea_spark.risk: 统计检验可能忽略参数间的交互效应，需进一步采用全局敏感性分析方法。
idea_spark.inspiration: 阈值效应的发现提示在动态环境中可设计自适应参数调整策略。

en.tldr: This paper presents a comprehensive sensitivity analysis of tactical wireless network design under realistic operational constraints, revealing the impact of structural rules, technological factors, and modeling parameters on network topology quality and performance.
en.motivation: Despite extensive optimization approaches, the impact of configuration parameters on tactical wireless network topology quality and overall performance is not fully understood.
en.method: Optimized topologies are generated using a Tabu Search metaheuristic, and statistical analyses (Friedman and Wilcoxon tests) assess the significance of parameter variations across different network sizes.
en.result: Scale-dependent technological transitions and threshold effects in structural constraints are identified, differentiating parameters that fundamentally reshape topology from those primarily affecting performance magnitude.
en.help_to_user: Provides practical guidance for parameter tuning and topology configuration in mission-critical tactical wireless deployments.

idea_spark.idea: Combine machine learning to predict the impact of parameters on topology performance, accelerating parameter tuning.
idea_spark.risk: Statistical tests may overlook interaction effects among parameters; further global sensitivity analysis is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: The discovery of threshold effects suggests designing adaptive parameter adjustment strategies in dynamic environments.

papers.title: How Language Models Process Negation
papers.summary: We study how Large Language Models (LLMs) process negation mechanistically. First, we establish that even though open-weight models often provide wrong answers to questions involving negation, they do possess internal components that process negation correctly. Their poor accuracy is due to late-layer attention behavior that promotes simple shortcuts; ablating those attention modules greatly improves accuracy on negation-related questions. Second, we uncover how models process negation. We consider two hypotheses: models could use attention heads that attend to the phrase being negated and suppress related concepts, or they could directly construct a representation of the entire negative phrase (e.g., representing "not gas" as a vector that promotes liquids and solids). We apply a range of observational and causal interpretability techniques on Mistral-7B and Llama-3.1-8B to show that models implement both mechanisms, with the "constructive" mechanism being more prominent. Combined, our work deepens the understanding of LLMs' internals, highlighting construction-dominant computations and the coexistence of competing mechanisms within LLMs.

ai.tldr: 研究大型语言模型如何处理否定，发现模型内部存在正确处理的组件，但后期注意力层导致错误，通过消融可提升准确性；模型同时使用抑制和构造两种机制，构造机制更突出。
ai.motivation: 理解LLM处理否定（如“不是气体”）的内部机制，解释其为何在否定问题上准确率低。
ai.method: 对Mistral-7B和Llama-3.1-8B应用观察性和因果可解释性技术，分析注意力头行为并消融后期注意力模块。
ai.result: 模型内部存在正确处理否定的组件，后期注意力层促进简单捷径导致错误；消融后准确率大幅提升；模型同时采用抑制（关注被否定短语并抑制相关概念）和构造（直接构建否定短语的表示）两种机制，构造机制更占主导。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解LLM在否定推理上的内部工作原理，以及如何通过干预（如注意力消融）提升模型在否定问题上的表现。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一种训练策略，在训练过程中显式鼓励构造机制，同时抑制后期注意力层的捷径行为，可能从根本上提升模型对否定的处理能力。
idea_spark.risk: 构造机制可能过度泛化，导致模型在非否定上下文中错误地构建否定表示；消融注意力模块可能影响模型在其他任务上的性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受“构造机制更突出”启发，可探索LLM是否在其他逻辑关系（如因果、对比）中也采用类似的构造性表示，而非简单的抑制或匹配。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一种训练策略，在训练过程中显式鼓励构造机制，同时抑制后期注意力层的捷径行为，可能从根本上提升模型对否定的处理能力。

en.tldr: Studies how LLMs process negation, finding that while models have internal components that correctly handle negation, late-layer attention promotes shortcuts causing errors; ablating those modules improves accuracy. Models use both suppression and constructive mechanisms, with the constructive one being more prominent.
en.motivation: To understand the internal mechanisms of LLMs when processing negation (e.g., 'not gas') and explain their poor accuracy on negation-related questions.
en.method: Applied observational and causal interpretability techniques on Mistral-7B and Llama-3.1-8B, analyzing attention head behavior and ablating late-layer attention modules.
en.result: Models possess internal components that correctly process negation, but late-layer attention promotes simple shortcuts leading to errors; ablating those modules significantly improves accuracy. Models implement both suppression (attending to negated phrase and suppressing related concepts) and constructive (directly building a representation of the negated phrase) mechanisms, with the constructive mechanism being more dominant.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the inner workings of LLMs on negation reasoning and how interventions (e.g., attention ablation) can improve model performance on negation-related questions.

idea_spark.idea: Design a training strategy that explicitly encourages the constructive mechanism while suppressing late-layer attention shortcuts, potentially fundamentally improving the model's ability to handle negation.
idea_spark.risk: The constructive mechanism might overgeneralize, causing the model to incorrectly construct negative representations in non-negation contexts; ablating attention modules could affect performance on other tasks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the finding that the constructive mechanism is more prominent, explore whether LLMs also adopt similar constructive representations for other logical relations (e.g., causality, contrast) rather than simple suppression or matching.

papers.title: MCJudgeBench: A Benchmark for Constraint-Level Judge Evaluation in Multi-Constraint Instruction Following
papers.summary: Multi-constraint instruction following requires verifying whether a response satisfies multiple individual requirements, yet LLM judges are often assessed only through overall-response judgments. We introduce MCJudgeBench, a benchmark for constraint-level judge evaluation in multi-constraint instruction following. Each instance includes an instruction, a candidate response, an explicit constraint list, per-constraint gold labels in {yes, partial, no}, and controlled response-side perturbations. The evaluation protocol further includes evaluation prompt variants to test judge stability. We evaluate proprietary and open-source LLM judges using both correctness and inconsistency metrics, distinguishing intrinsic inconsistency under stochastic decoding from procedural inconsistency under prompt and response perturbations. Our results show that judge reliability has multiple dimensions: strong overall performance does not guarantee equally reliable detection across label categories, especially for rarer partial and no cases. Judges with higher correctness do not always have lower inconsistency. Evaluation with reasoning improves correctness but does not uniformly improve stability. These findings motivate evaluating LLM judges at the constraint level to study these failure modes.

ai.tldr: 提出了MCJudgeBench基准，用于在多约束指令跟随任务中评估LLM法官在约束层面的判断能力，并揭示了正确性与不一致性之间的复杂关系。
ai.motivation: 现有LLM法官评估仅关注整体响应判断，忽略了约束层面的细粒度评估，无法全面反映法官的可靠性。
ai.method: 构建包含指令、候选响应、显式约束列表、每个约束的金标签（是/部分/否）及受控扰动的数据集，并设计评估提示变体以测试稳定性。
ai.result: 法官可靠性具有多个维度：整体性能强不保证各标签类别检测均衡；高正确性法官不一定低不一致性；推理提升正确性但未统一提升稳定性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解LLM法官在细粒度约束评估中的局限性，指导更可靠的法官选择与评估设计。

idea_spark.idea: 设计自适应提示策略，根据约束类型动态调整评估提示，以降低程序性不一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 过度依赖推理可能引入新偏差，需平衡正确性与稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从法官评估的失败模式出发，探索约束级反馈机制以提升LLM指令跟随能力。

zh.tldr: 提出了MCJudgeBench基准，用于在多约束指令跟随任务中评估LLM法官在约束层面的判断能力，并揭示了正确性与不一致性之间的复杂关系。

idea_spark.idea: 设计自适应提示策略，根据约束类型动态调整评估提示，以降低程序性不一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 过度依赖推理可能引入新偏差，需平衡正确性与稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从法官评估的失败模式出发，探索约束级反馈机制以提升LLM指令跟随能力。

en.tldr: Proposes MCJudgeBench, a benchmark for constraint-level judge evaluation in multi-constraint instruction following, revealing complex trade-offs between correctness and inconsistency.
en.motivation: Existing LLM judge evaluations focus on overall response judgments, neglecting fine-grained constraint-level assessment and missing reliability nuances.
en.method: Constructs a dataset with instructions, candidate responses, explicit constraint lists, per-constraint gold labels (yes/partial/no), and controlled perturbations, plus evaluation prompt variants to test stability.
en.result: Judge reliability is multi-dimensional: strong overall performance does not guarantee balanced detection across label categories; higher correctness does not always imply lower inconsistency; reasoning improves correctness but not uniformly stability.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand limitations of LLM judges in fine-grained constraint evaluation, guiding more reliable judge selection and evaluation design.

idea_spark.idea: Design adaptive prompting strategies that dynamically adjust evaluation prompts based on constraint type to reduce procedural inconsistency.
idea_spark.risk: Over-reliance on reasoning may introduce new biases; balance between correctness and stability is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: From judge failure modes, explore constraint-level feedback mechanisms to improve LLM instruction following.

papers.title: Evaluating Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Explainable Malware Analysis
papers.summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly being used as security engineering tools to summarize and explain malware behavior to analysts. A common assumption is that Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) improves explanation quality by injecting external security knowledge. In this work, we empirically evaluate this assumption for malware explanation using VirusTotal reports as structured input. Across multiple LLMs, we find that RAG frequently degrades explanation quality by introducing distracting or weakly related context and adding narrative noise or generic write-ups. Our results highlight a practical risk in security-critical pipelines for malware explanation that RAG can be counterproductive when structured security evidence is already sufficient. We argue that malware explanation is primarily a signal-extraction task, not a knowledge-retrieval problem, and outline design recommendations for secure development workflows.

ai.tldr: 实验发现，在基于VirusTotal报告的结构化输入下，RAG反而降低了恶意软件解释的质量，引入干扰和噪声。
ai.motivation: 验证RAG在恶意软件解释中是否真的能提升解释质量。
ai.method: 以VirusTotal报告为结构化输入，在多个LLM上对比有无RAG的解释效果。
ai.result: RAG经常降低解释质量，产生无关上下文和泛泛的叙述。
ai.help_to_user: 提醒安全分析人员：当已有结构化证据时，RAG可能适得其反，应优先考虑信号提取而非知识检索。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一个自适应RAG开关，根据输入结构化程度自动决定是否启用检索。
idea_spark.risk: 过度依赖RAG可能掩盖关键信号，导致误判。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将恶意软件解释重新定义为信号提取问题，启发更简洁的生成式安全工具设计。

zh.tldr: 实验发现，在基于VirusTotal报告的结构化输入下，RAG反而降低了恶意软件解释的质量，引入干扰和噪声。
zh.motivation: 验证RAG在恶意软件解释中是否真的能提升解释质量。
zh.method: 以VirusTotal报告为结构化输入，在多个LLM上对比有无RAG的解释效果。
zh.result: RAG经常降低解释质量，产生无关上下文和泛泛的叙述。
zh.help_to_user: 提醒安全分析人员：当已有结构化证据时，RAG可能适得其反，应优先考虑信号提取而非知识检索。
